This flexibility is important since a functional observer whose order equals the number of estimated functionals may not always exist. For each structure, algebraic existence conditions are established together with constructive synthesis procedures. A functional augmentation framework is developed to derive verifiable rank-based conditions for observers of various orders. In addition, the notion of generalized functionals, defined over an augmented delayed state vector, is introduced to provide greater flexibility in satisfying observer existence conditions and facilitating systematic design. Numerical examples illustrate the proposed theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对具有不同状态延迟和测量延迟的线性时滞系统进行函数状态估计的方法，并提供了三种不同阶数的函数观测器结构和相应的存在性条件及设计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有观测器设计通常假设输出是瞬时可用的，但实际系统中测量延迟常常与状态延迟不同且不匹配，这促使研究者探索更通用的观测器设计。
AI.method: 文章区分了状态延迟τ和测量延迟h，提出了三种函数观测器结构，并建立了代数存在性条件和构造性综合过程。此外，还开发了一个函数增强框架，提出了基于秩的条件，并引入了广义函数概念。
AI.result: 提出了三种不同阶数的函数观测器结构，并为每种结构建立了代数存在性条件和构造性综合程序。通过函数增强框架推导出了可验证的基于秩的条件，并引入了广义函数概念以提高设计灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 文章成功地解决了具有不同状态延迟和测量延迟的线性时滞系统的函数状态估计问题，并提供了通用的设计方法和存在性条件，能够处理不同阶数的函数观测器设计需求。

title: Reading, Not Thinking: Understanding and Bridging the Modality Gap When Text Becomes Pixels in Multimodal LLMs
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can process text presented as images, yet they often perform worse than when the same content is provided as textual tokens. We systematically diagnose this "modality gap" by evaluating seven MLLMs across seven benchmarks in five input modes, spanning both synthetically rendered text and realistic document images from arXiv PDFs to Wikipedia pages. We find that the modality gap is task- and data-dependent. For example, math tasks degrade by over 60 points on synthetic renderings, while natural document images often match or exceed text-mode performance. Rendering choices such as font and resolution are strong confounds, with font alone swinging accuracy by up to 47 percentage points. To understand this, we conduct a grounded-theory error analysis of over 4,000 examples, revealing that image mode selectively amplifies reading errors (calculation and formatting failures) while leaving knowledge and reasoning errors largely unchanged, and that some models exhibit a chain-of-thought reasoning collapse under visual input. Motivated by these findings, we propose a self-distillation method that trains the model on its own pure text reasoning traces paired with image inputs, raising image-mode accuracy on GSM8K from 30.71% to 92.72% and transferring to unseen benchmarks without catastrophic forgetting. Overall, our study provides a systematic understanding of the modality gap and suggests a practical path toward improving visual text understanding in multimodal language models.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在处理图像中的文本时，性能常低于直接文本输入。这种“模态差距”与任务和数据类型相关，渲染细节（如字体、分辨率）是关键影响因素。错误分析表明，图像模式会放大阅读错误，并可能导致部分模型在视觉输入下出现推理崩溃。研究提出了一种自蒸馏方法，通过将纯文本推理与图像输入配对进行训练，显著提升了模型在图像文本理解上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在处理图像中文本时，性能常不如直接文本输入，研究旨在系统性诊断并理解这种“模态差距”的成因。
AI.method: 1. 评估七个MLLMs在五个输入模式（合成渲染文本、arXiv PDF、维基百科页面等）下的表现。2. 进行基于扎根理论的错误分析（超过4000个样本）。3. 提出一种自蒸馏训练方法。
AI.result: 1. 模态差距与任务和数据类型相关（例如，数学任务在合成渲染下性能下降超过60分，自然文档图像性能接近或超越文本模式）。2. 渲染细节（字体、分辨率）是重要干扰因素。3. 图像模式放大阅读错误（计算、格式错误），知识和推理错误影响不大；部分模型出现推理崩溃。4. 自蒸馏方法将GSM8K的准确率从30.71%提升至92.72%，且能泛化到未见过的数据集。
AI.conclusion: 研究系统性地理解了MLLMs的模态差距，指出了渲染细节的重要性以及图像模式对特定类型错误的影响。提出的自蒸馏方法是一种有效的提升视觉文本理解能力且能迁移到其他任务的解决方案。

title: Formation-Aware Adaptive Conformalized Perception for Safe Leader-Follower Multi-Robot Systems
summary: This paper considers the perception safety problem in distributed vision-based leader-follower formations, where each robot uses onboard perception to estimate relative states, track desired setpoints, and keep the leader within its camera field of view (FOV). Safety is challenging due to heteroscedastic perception errors and the coupling between formation maneuvers and visibility constraints. We propose a distributed, formation-aware adaptive conformal prediction method based on Risk-Aware Mondrian CP to produce formation-conditioned uncertainty quantiles. The resulting bounds tighten in high-risk configurations (near FOV limits) and relax in safer regions. We integrate these bounds into a Formation-Aware Conformal CBF-QP with a smooth margin to enforce visibility while maintaining feasibility and tracking performance. Gazebo simulations show improved formation success rates and tracking accuracy over non-adaptive (global) CP baselines that ignore formation-dependent visibility risk, while preserving finite-sample probabilistic safety guarantees. The experimental videos are available on the \href{https://nail-uh.github.io/iros2026.github.io/}{project website}\footnote{Project Website: https://nail-uh.github.io/iros2026.github.io/}.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于风险感知蒙德里安CP的分布式自适应保形预测方法，用于解决分布式视觉引导的领导者-跟随者编队中的感知安全问题，该方法能根据编队状态调整不确定性边界，并在仿真中提高了成功率和跟踪精度。
AI.motivation: 在分布式视觉引导的领导者-跟随者编队中，由于异方差感知误差和编队机动与可见性约束的耦合，感知安全是一个难题。需要一种方法来处理这种动态变化的风险。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于风险感知蒙德里安CP的分布式、编队感知自适应保形预测方法，生成编队条件下的不确定性分位数。然后将这些边界集成到一个带平滑裕度的编队感知保形CBF-QP中，以强制执行可见性同时保持可行性和跟踪性能。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，与忽略编队依赖可见性风险的非自适应（全局）CP基线相比，该方法提高了编队成功率和跟踪精度，同时保持了有限样本概率安全保证。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的编队感知自适应保形预测方法能够有效地处理分布式编队中的感知安全问题，通过动态调整不确定性边界来适应不同的编队风险，从而实现更好的性能和安全性。

title: PanoAffordanceNet: Towards Holistic Affordance Grounding in 360° Indoor Environments
comment: The source code and benchmark dataset will be made publicly available at https://github.com/GL-ZHU925/PanoAffordanceNet
summary: Global perception is essential for embodied agents in 360° spaces, yet current affordance grounding remains largely object-centric and restricted to perspective views. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel task: Holistic Affordance Grounding in 360° Indoor Environments. This task faces unique challenges, including severe geometric distortions from Equirectangular Projection (ERP), semantic dispersion, and cross-scale alignment difficulties. We propose PanoAffordanceNet, an end-to-end framework featuring a Distortion-Aware Spectral Modulator (DASM) for latitude-dependent calibration and an Omni-Spherical Densification Head (OSDH) to restore topological continuity from sparse activations. By integrating multi-level constraints comprising pixel-wise, distributional, and region-text contrastive objectives, our framework effectively suppresses semantic drift under low supervision. Furthermore, we construct 360-AGD, the first high-quality panoramic affordance grounding dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PanoAffordanceNet significantly outperforms existing methods, establishing a solid baseline for scene-level perception in embodied intelligence. The source code and benchmark dataset will be made publicly available at https://github.com/GL-ZHU925/PanoAffordanceNet.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了全景图像中的整体习得属性识别任务，并开发了一个名为 PanoAffordanceNet 的框架来解决该任务的挑战，该框架包含用于处理图像畸变和恢复拓扑连续性的新模块，并引入了一个新的数据集 360-AGD。
AI.motivation: 现有的习得属性识别方法主要以物体为中心且仅限于视角视图，无法满足具身智能体在360°空间中的全局感知需求。
AI.method: 提出了 PanoAffordanceNet 框架，该框架包含：1. 畸变感知谱调制器 (DASM)，用于处理全景图像（Equirectangular Projection - ERP）的几何畸变；2. 全向球形致密化头 (OSDH)，用于从稀疏激活中恢复拓扑连续性；3. 集成了像素级、分布级和区域-文本对比损失的多层次约束，以减少语义漂移。
AI.result: PanoAffordanceNet 在全景习得属性识别任务上显著优于现有方法。构建了首个高质量的全景习得属性识别数据集 360-AGD。
AI.conclusion: PanoAffordanceNet 成功地解决了全景图像中习得属性识别的挑战，为具身智能体的场景级感知提供了新的基准和方法。

title: Comparative Analysis of Patch Attack on VLM-Based Autonomous Driving Architectures
comment: Accepted at the 2025 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV 2025)
summary: Vision-language models are emerging for autonomous driving, yet their robustness to physical adversarial attacks remains unexplored. This paper presents a systematic framework for comparative adversarial evaluation across three VLM architectures: Dolphins, OmniDrive (Omni-L), and LeapVAD. Using black-box optimization with semantic homogenization for fair comparison, we evaluate physically realizable patch attacks in CARLA simulation. Results reveal severe vulnerabilities across all architectures, sustained multi-frame failures, and critical object detection degradation. Our analysis exposes distinct architectural vulnerability patterns, demonstrating that current VLM designs inadequately address adversarial threats in safety-critical autonomous driving applications.

AI.tldr: 本文系统地评估了三种视觉语言模型（VLMs）在自动驾驶场景下面临物理对抗性攻击的鲁棒性，发现所有模型都存在严重漏洞，可能导致多帧失效和目标检测性能下降。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在自动驾驶领域的应用日益广泛，但其对物理对抗性攻击的鲁棒性仍未得到充分研究，而这对自动驾驶的安全至关重要。
AI.method: 采用黑盒优化和语义同质化技术，在CARLA模拟环境中对三种VLMs（Dolphins, OmniDrive, LeapVAD）进行物理上可实现的patch攻击评估。
AI.result: 所有被评估的VLMs架构都表现出对物理对抗性攻击的严重脆弱性。攻击导致了持续的多帧失效以及关键对象检测性能的显著下降。不同模型架构暴露出了不同的脆弱性模式。
AI.conclusion: 当前设计的视觉语言模型在应对自动驾驶安全关键应用中的对抗性威胁方面仍显不足，需要进一步改进以提高其鲁棒性。

title: $M^2$-Occ: Resilient 3D Semantic Occupancy Prediction for Autonomous Driving with Incomplete Camera Inputs
comment: The source code will be publicly released at https://github.com/qixi7up/M2-Occ
summary: Semantic occupancy prediction enables dense 3D geometric and semantic understanding for autonomous driving. However, existing camera-based approaches implicitly assume complete surround-view observations, an assumption that rarely holds in real-world deployment due to occlusion, hardware malfunction, or communication failures. We study semantic occupancy prediction under incomplete multi-camera inputs and introduce $M^2$-Occ, a framework designed to preserve geometric structure and semantic coherence when views are missing. $M^2$-Occ addresses two complementary challenges. First, a Multi-view Masked Reconstruction (MMR) module leverages the spatial overlap among neighboring cameras to recover missing-view representations directly in the feature space. Second, a Feature Memory Module (FMM) introduces a learnable memory bank that stores class-level semantic prototypes. By retrieving and integrating these global priors, the FMM refines ambiguous voxel features, ensuring semantic consistency even when observational evidence is incomplete. We introduce a systematic missing-view evaluation protocol on the nuScenes-based SurroundOcc benchmark, encompassing both deterministic single-view failures and stochastic multi-view dropout scenarios. Under the safety-critical missing back-view setting, $M^2$-Occ improves the IoU by 4.93%. As the number of missing cameras increases, the robustness gap further widens; for instance, under the setting with five missing views, our method boosts the IoU by 5.01%. These gains are achieved without compromising full-view performance. The source code will be publicly released at https://github.com/qixi7up/M2-Occ.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 M²-Occ 的框架，用于在部分相机输入缺失的情况下进行语义占用预测，通过多视图掩码重建和特征记忆模块来恢复几何结构和语义一致性，并在 nuScenes 数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于相机的语义占用预测方法假设所有相机视图都可用，这在实际应用中难以实现，因为可能存在遮挡、硬件故障或通信中断等问题。因此，研究在相机输入不完整的情况下进行语义占用预测具有重要意义。
AI.method: M²-Occ 框架包含两个主要模块：1. 多视图掩码重建 (MMR) 模块：利用相邻相机之间的空间重叠来直接在特征空间中恢复缺失视图的表示。2. 特征记忆模块 (FMM)：引入一个可学习的记忆库，存储类别级别的语义原型，并通过检索和整合这些全局先验来精炼模糊的体素特征，确保语义一致性。
AI.result: 在 nuScenes 数据集上，M²-Occ 在后视图缺失的关键安全场景下，IoU 提高了 4.93%。当缺失相机数量增加时，例如缺失五个视图，M²-Occ 的 IoU 提高了 5.01%。这些性能提升是在不影响完整视图性能的情况下实现的。
AI.conclusion: M²-Occ 框架能够有效地处理相机输入缺失的情况，在恢复几何结构和语义一致性方面表现出色，为自动驾驶中的语义占用预测提供了一种鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Distributionally robust two-stage model predictive control: adaptive constraint tightening with stability guarantee
summary: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely recognized for its ability to explicitly handle system constraints. In practice, system states are often affected by disturbances with unknown distributions. While robust MPC guarantees constraint satisfaction under worst-case scenarios, it tends to be overly conservative. Stochastic MPC balances conservatism and performance but relies on precise knowledge of the disturbance distribution, which is often unavailable. To address this challenge, this paper introduces Distributionally Robust Optimization (DRO) into the MPC framework and proposes a novel Two-Stage Distributionally Robust MPC (TSDR-MPC) scheme. The key innovation lies in formulating constraint violation penalties as a second-stage optimization problem, which, combined with the first-stage quadratic cost, constitutes a two-stage distributionally robust program. This structure enables adaptive constraint tightening against disturbances with unknown time-varying means and covariances. Utilizing a Wasserstein ambiguity set, we derive a tractable reformulation via strong duality and develop a cutting-plane algorithm that converges in a finite number of iterations, suitable for real-time implementation. To ensure closed-loop stability even under non-zero mean disturbances, we introduce a terminal constraint applied solely to the nominal system; this constraint is proportional to the current state and independent of distributional uncertainty, thus preserving overall feasibility. We provide rigorous theoretical guarantees, including recursive feasibility, finite-time algorithm termination, and an asymptotic performance bound on the average closed-loop cost. Numerical simulations validate the adaptability and robustness of the proposed framework under various disturbance scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的两阶段分布鲁棒模型预测控制（TSDR-MPC）方法，该方法通过将约束违反惩罚项设为第二阶段优化问题，利用 Wasserstein 模糊集和强对偶性，实现了对具有未知时变均值和协方差的扰动具有自适应约束收紧的能力，并具有递归可行性、有限时间算法终止和渐近性能界限的理论保证。
AI.motivation: 传统的鲁棒MPC过于保守，而随机MPC依赖于准确的扰动分布知识，而实际情况中扰动分布往往未知。因此，需要一种能够处理具有未知分布的扰动，并能在保守性和性能之间取得良好平衡的MPC方法。
AI.method: 将分布鲁棒优化（DRO）纳入MPC框架，提出两阶段分布鲁棒MPC（TSDR-MPC）。核心创新是将约束违反惩罚项表述为第二阶段优化问题，结合第一阶段二次成本，形成两阶段分布鲁棒程序。采用Wasserstein模糊集，通过强对偶性推导出可处理的重构形式，并开发了有限迭代收敛的切割平面算法。为保证闭环稳定性，引入了仅应用于标称系统的终端约束。
AI.result: TSDR-MPC能够对具有未知时变均值和协方差的扰动进行自适应约束收紧。理论上保证了递归可行性、有限时间算法终止以及平均闭环成本的渐近性能界限。数值模拟验证了该框架在不同扰动场景下的适应性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的TSDR-MPC框架能够有效地处理具有未知分布的扰动，在保证约束满足的同时，提高了控制性能，并具有良好的实时性和理论稳定性保证。

title: Towards Visual Query Segmentation in the Wild
summary: In this paper, we introduce visual query segmentation (VQS), a new paradigm of visual query localization (VQL) that aims to segment all pixel-level occurrences of an object of interest in an untrimmed video, given an external visual query. Compared to existing VQL locating only the last appearance of a target using bounding boxes, VQS enables more comprehensive (i.e., all object occurrences) and precise (i.e., pixel-level masks) localization, making it more practical for real-world scenarios. To foster research on this task, we present VQS-4K, a large-scale benchmark dedicated to VQS. Specifically, VQS-4K contains 4,111 videos with more than 1.3 million frames and covers a diverse set of 222 object categories. Each video is paired with a visual query defined by a frame outside the search video and its target mask, and annotated with spatial-temporal masklets corresponding to the queried target. To ensure high quality, all videos in VQS-4K are manually labeled with meticulous inspection and iterative refinement. To the best of our knowledge, VQS-4K is the first benchmark specifically designed for VQS. Furthermore, to stimulate future research, we present a simple yet effective method, named VQ-SAM, which extends SAM 2 by leveraging target-specific and background distractor cues from the video to progressively evolve the memory through a novel multi-stage framework with an adaptive memory generation (AMG) module for VQS, significantly improving the performance. In our extensive experiments on VQS-4K, VQ-SAM achieves promising results and surpasses all existing approaches, demonstrating its effectiveness. With the proposed VQS-4K and VQ-SAM, we expect to go beyond the current VQL paradigm and inspire more future research and practical applications on VQS. Our benchmark, code, and results will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了视觉查询分割（VQS）这一新的视频目标定位范式，旨在对视频中所有目标实例进行像素级分割，并发布了一个名为VQS-4K的大规模数据集。同时，提出了一种名为VQ-SAM的有效方法，该方法通过多阶段框架和自适应内存生成模块，利用目标和背景线索来提升VQS性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频查询定位（VQL）方法仅能定位目标的最后一次出现且使用边界框，不够全面和精确。因此，作者提出VQS以实现更全面（所有出现）和更精确（像素级）的目标定位，使其更适用于实际场景。同时，需要一个大规模数据集来促进对VQS的研究。
AI.method: 1. 提出视觉查询分割（VQS）范式，用于在视频中分割所有目标实例的像素级掩码。2. 构建VQS-4K数据集，包含4111个视频，超过130万帧，覆盖222个类别，并提供帧外的视觉查询和目标掩码。3. 提出VQ-SAM方法，该方法扩展了SAM模型，利用视频中的目标线索和背景干扰信息，通过多阶段框架和自适应内存生成（AMG）模块来逐步演化内存，实现VQS。
AI.result: VQ-SAM方法在VQS-4K数据集上取得了有希望的结果，超越了所有现有方法，证明了其有效性。VQS-4K是首个专门为VQS设计的基准数据集。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过提出VQS范式和VQS-4K数据集，为VQS领域的研究奠定了基础，并提出VQ-SAM方法在VQS任务上取得了显著性能提升。作者期望这些工作能推动VQS的研究和实际应用。

title: Meissa: Multi-modal Medical Agentic Intelligence
summary: Multi-modal large language models (MM-LLMs) have shown strong performance in medical image understanding and clinical reasoning. Recent medical agent systems extend them with tool use and multi-agent collaboration, enabling complex decision-making. However, these systems rely almost entirely on frontier models (e.g., GPT), whose API-based deployment incurs high cost, high latency, and privacy risks that conflict with on-premise clinical requirements. We present Meissa, a lightweight 4B-parameter medical MM-LLM that brings agentic capability offline. Instead of imitating static answers, Meissa learns both when to engage external interaction (strategy selection) and how to execute multi-step interaction (strategy execution) by distilling structured trajectories from frontier models. Specifically, we propose: (1) Unified trajectory modeling: trajectories (reasoning and action traces) are represented within a single state-action-observation formalism, allowing one model to generalize across heterogeneous medical environments. (2) Three-tier stratified supervision: the model's own errors trigger progressive escalation from direct reasoning to tool-augmented and multi-agent interaction, explicitly learning difficulty-aware strategy selection. (3) Prospective-retrospective supervision: pairing exploratory forward traces with hindsight-rationalized execution traces enables stable learning of effective interaction policies. Trained on 40K curated trajectories, Meissa matches or exceeds proprietary frontier agents in 10 of 16 evaluation settings across 13 medical benchmarks spanning radiology, pathology, and clinical reasoning. Using over 25x fewer parameters than typical frontier models like Gemini-3, Meissa operates fully offline with 22x lower end-to-end latency compared to API-based deployment. Data, models, and environments are released at https://github.com/Schuture/Meissa.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了 Meissa，一个轻量级的 4B 参数医疗多模态大语言模型，具备离线代理能力，能够在不依赖昂贵的 API 部署的情况下，学习何时以及如何进行多步交互，并在多项医疗任务中达到或超越了现有前沿模型。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗智能体系统依赖于昂贵的、高延迟的、存在隐私风险的前沿模型（如 GPT）的 API 部署，这与临床环境下对离线、低成本和隐私保护的要求相冲突。
AI.method: Meissa 通过蒸馏前沿模型的结构化轨迹，学习策略选择（何时交互）和策略执行（如何交互）。具体方法包括：1. 统一轨迹建模，使用状态-动作-观察形式主义表示推理和动作痕迹，以泛化到不同医疗环境。2. 三层分级监督，通过模型自身错误触发从直接推理到工具增强和多智能体交互的逐步升级，学习难度感知策略选择。3. 前瞻-回顾监督，结合探索性前向轨迹和事后合理化执行轨迹，实现有效交互策略的稳定学习。
AI.result: 在 40K 条精选轨迹上训练的 Meissa，在 13 个医疗基准（包括放射学、病理学和临床推理）的 16 个评估设置中的 10 个，性能匹配或超过了专有前沿代理。与典型的 Gemini-3 等前沿模型相比，Meissa 参数量减少了 25 倍以上，并且能够完全离线运行，端到端延迟降低了 22 倍。
AI.conclusion: Meissa 成功地提供了一个轻量级、离线运行的医疗多模态大语言模型，具备代理能力，克服了现有方法的成本、延迟和隐私限制，并在多项医疗评估中展现出有竞争力的性能。

title: FAME: Force-Adaptive RL for Expanding the Manipulation Envelope of a Full-Scale Humanoid
summary: Maintaining balance under external hand forces is critical for humanoid bimanual manipulation, where interaction forces propagate through the kinematic chain and constrain the feasible manipulation envelope. We propose \textbf{FAME}, a force-adaptive reinforcement learning framework that conditions a standing policy on a learned latent context encoding upper-body joint configuration and bimanual interaction forces. During training, we apply diverse, spherically sampled 3D forces on each hand to inject disturbances in simulation together with an upper-body pose curriculum, exposing the policy to manipulation-induced perturbations across continuously varying arm configurations. At deployment, interaction forces are estimated from the robot dynamics and fed to the same encoder, enabling online adaptation without wrist force/torque sensors. In simulation across five fixed arm configurations with randomized hand forces and commanded base heights, FAME improves mean standing success to 73.84%, compared to 51.40% for the curriculum-only baseline and 29.44% for the base policy. We further deploy the learned policy on a full-scale Unitree H12 humanoid and evaluate robustness in representative load-interaction scenarios, including asymmetric single-arm load and symmetric bimanual load. Code and videos are available on https://fame10.github.io/Fame/

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 FAME 的力适应性强化学习框架，通过学习上身关节配置和双臂交互力的潜在上下文编码，来增强人形机器人在外部手部力作用下的站立平衡能力，并在真实机器人上进行了部署验证。
AI.motivation: 在人形双臂操作中，保持对外部手部力的平衡至关重要，因为交互力会通过运动链传播并限制可行的操作范围。
AI.method: 开发了一个名为 FAME 的力适应性强化学习框架，该框架将站立策略条件化为一个学习到的潜在上下文，该上下文编码了上身关节配置和双臂交互力。在训练过程中，通过在模拟环境中施加多样化的 3D 力和上身姿势课程来注入扰动。在部署时，通过机器人动力学估计交互力，并输入到相同的编码器中，实现在线适应。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中，FAME 在站立成功率方面相比仅使用课程的基线和基础策略分别提高了 73.84%（相对于 51.40% 和 29.44%）。在真实机器人 Unitree H12 上的实验也展示了其在不对称单臂负载和对称双臂负载场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: FAME 框架能够有效地使人形机器人在受到外部手部力扰动时保持平衡，并通过学习到的潜在上下文编码实现了在线自适应，无需腕部力/扭矩传感器。

title: Bioalignment: Measuring and Improving LLM Disposition Toward Biological Systems for AI Safety
summary: Large language models (LLMs) trained on internet-scale corpora can exhibit systematic biases that increase the probability of unwanted behavior. In this study, we examined potential biases towards synthetic vs. biological technological solutions across four domains (materials, energy, manufacturing, and algorithms). A sample of 5 frontier and 5 open-weight models were measured using 50 curated Bioalignment prompts with a Kelly criterion-inspired evaluation framework. According to this metric, most models were not bioaligned in that they exhibit biases in favor of synthetic (non-biological) solutions. We next examined if fine-tuning could increase the preferences of two open-weight models, Llama 3.2-3B-Instruct and Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct, for biological-based approaches. A curated corpus of ~22M tokens from 6,636 PMC articles emphasizing biological problem-solving was used first to fine-tune Llama 3B with a mixed corpus of continued training and instruction-formatted. This was then extended to Qwen 3B using instruction-formatted only. We found that QLoRA fine-tuning significantly increased the scoring of biological solutions for both models without degrading general capabilities (Holm-Bonferroni-corrected p < 0.001 and p < 0.01, respectively). This suggests that even a small amount of fine-tuning can change how models weigh the relative value of biological and bioinspired vs. synthetic approaches. Although this work focused on small open-weight LLMs, it may be extensible to much larger models and could be used to develop models that favor bio-based approaches. We release the benchmark, corpus, code, and adapter weights.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了大型语言模型（LLMs）在合成技术和生物技术解决方案之间的偏见，发现大多数模型偏向合成技术。通过使用PMC文章语料库对Llama 3B和Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct进行微调，显著提高了它们对生物解决方案的偏好，且未损害其通用能力。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在互联网规模语料库上训练时，可能会表现出系统性偏见，导致不期望的行为。本研究旨在调查LLMs在合成技术与生物技术解决方案之间是否存在偏见，并探索通过微调是否可以改变这种偏好。
AI.method: 研究人员使用了4个领域（材料、能源、制造、算法）的50个精选提示，并采用受Kelly准则启发的评估框架，来测量5个前沿模型和5个开源模型。之后，他们使用约2200万个来自6636篇PMC文章的语料库（强调生物问题解决方法）对Llama 3.2-3B-Instruct和Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct进行微调，其中Llama 3B使用了混合语料库（继续训练+指令格式），而Qwen 3B仅使用了指令格式。
AI.result: 在初始评估中，大多数模型在生物对齐方面表现不佳，表现出偏向合成解决方案的偏见。经过QLoRA微调后，Llama 3B和Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct对生物解决方案的评分显著提高（Holm-Bonferroni校正后的p < 0.001和p < 0.01），且通用能力未受损。
AI.conclusion: 即使是少量的微调也能改变模型对生物/仿生与合成方法相对价值的权衡。虽然本研究关注的是小型开源LLMs，但其方法可能适用于更大的模型，并可用于开发偏好生物解决方案的模型。研究人员已公开了基准测试、语料库、代码和适配器权重。

title: DuplexCascade: Full-Duplex Speech-to-Speech Dialogue with VAD-Free Cascaded ASR-LLM-TTS Pipeline and Micro-Turn Optimization
summary: Spoken dialog systems with cascaded ASR-LLM-TTS modules retain strong LLM intelligence, but VAD segmentation often forces half-duplex turns and brittle control. On the other hand, VAD-free end-to-end model support full-duplex interaction but is hard to maintain conversational intelligence. In this paper, we present DuplexCascade, a VAD-free cascaded streaming pipeline for full-duplex speech-to-speech dialogue. Our key idea is to convert conventional utterance-wise long turns into chunk-wise micro-turn interactions, enabling rapid bidirectional exchange while preserving the strengths of a capable text LLM. To reliably coordinate turn-taking and response timing, we introduce a set of conversational special control tokens that steer the LLM's behavior under streaming constraints. On Full-DuplexBench and VoiceBench, DuplexCascade delivers state-of-the-art full-duplex turn-taking and strong conversational intelligence among open-source speech-to-speech dialogue systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DuplexCascade的无语音活动检测（VAD）的级联流式语音到语音对话系统，通过将长语音轮次分解为微轮次交互，实现了全双工通信，并引入了控制令牌来管理LLM行为，从而在保持对话智能的同时提高了交互的实时性和流畅性。
AI.motivation: 现有的语音对话系统要么依赖VAD分割导致半双工交互和控制脆弱，要么采用端到端模型虽然支持全双工但难以维持对话智能。本研究旨在解决全双工交互和对话智能之间的矛盾。
AI.method: 提出DuplexCascade系统，将传统的按话轮长轮次转换为按块（chunk-wise）的微轮次交互。引入了一系列对话特殊控制令牌来指导LLM在流式约束下的行为，以协调轮次切换和响应时序。
AI.result: 在Full-DuplexBench和VoiceBench数据集上，DuplexCascade在开源语音到语音对话系统中实现了最先进的全双工轮次切换能力，并保持了强大的对话智能。
AI.conclusion: DuplexCascade成功地实现了一种无需VAD的级联流式语音到语音对话系统，通过微轮次交互和控制令牌，实现了全双工通信，同时保留了强大的对话智能，优于现有系统。

title: Multi-Kernel Gated Decoder Adapters for Robust Multi-Task Thyroid Ultrasound under Cross-Center Shift
summary: Thyroid ultrasound (US) automation couples two competing requirements: global, geometry-driven reasoning for nodule delineation and local, texture-driven reasoning for malignancy risk assessment. Under cross-center domain shift, these cues degrade asymmetrically, yet most multi-task pipelines rely on a single shared backbone, often inducing negative transfer. In this paper, we characterize this interference across CNN (ResNet34) and medical ViT (MedSAM) backbones, and observe a consistent trend: ViTs transfer geometric priors that benefit segmentation, whereas CNNs more reliably preserve texture cues for malignancy discrimination under strong shift and artifacts. Motivated by this failure mode, we propose a lightweight family of decoder-side adapters, the Multi-Kernel Gated Adapter (MKGA) and a residual variant (ResMKGA), which refine multi-scale skip features using complementary receptive fields and apply semantic, context-conditioned gating to suppress artifact-prone content before fusion. Across two US benchmarks, the proposed adapters improve cross-center robustness: they strengthen out-of-domain segmentation and, in the CNN setting, yield clear gains in clinical TI-RADS diagnostic accuracy compared to standard multi-task baselines. Code and models will be released.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种改进的解码器侧适配器（MKGA 和 ResMKGA），用于解决甲状腺超声图像中分割和恶性风险评估任务之间的冲突，以及跨中心域转移问题。研究发现 ViT 更适合几何推理（分割），而 CNN 更适合纹理推理（恶性风险评估）。所提出的适配器通过多核感受野和门控机制，在融合多尺度特征时提高了鲁棒性，尤其是在 CNN 上，显著提升了 TI-RADS 诊断准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的甲状腺超声多任务学习模型在处理跨中心域转移时，由于共享骨干网络导致几何和纹理推理能力不对称下降，从而产生负面迁移。因此，需要一种方法来有效利用不同骨干网络的优势，并缓解域转移带来的影响。
AI.method: 研究人员首先分析了 CNN (ResNet34) 和 ViT (MedSAM) 在跨中心域转移下的几何和纹理信息保留能力，发现 ViT 擅长几何分割，而 CNN 更擅长纹理分析。在此基础上，他们设计了一种轻量级的解码器侧适配器家族（MKGA 和 ResMKGA），通过结合不同大小的感受野来融合多尺度特征，并引入语义上下文门控机制来抑制受伪影影响的内容，从而在特征融合前进行优化。
AI.result: 在两个甲状腺超声数据集上的实验表明，MKGA 和 ResMKGA 适配器显著提高了跨中心域的鲁棒性。它们在分割任务上增强了模型在未见过的数据上的表现，并且在 CNN 骨干网络上，相较于标准多任务基线，在 TI-RADS 诊断准确性方面取得了明显的提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的 MKGA 和 ResMKGA 适配器是一种有效的方法，可以解决甲状腺超声图像多任务学习中的域转移问题，并融合 CNN 和 ViT 的优势，从而提高分割和恶性风险评估的准确性，尤其是在对抗域转移和伪影时。

title: SurgCalib: Gaussian Splatting-Based Hand-Eye Calibration for Robot-Assisted Minimally Invasive Surgery
summary: We present a Gaussian Splatting-based framework for hand-eye calibration of the da Vinci surgical robot. In a vision-guided robotic system, accurate estimation of the rigid transformation between the robot base and the camera frame is essential for reliable closed-loop control. For cable-driven surgical robots, this task faces unique challenges. The encoders of surgical instruments often produce inaccurate proprioceptive measurements due to cable stretch and backlash. Conventional hand-eye calibration approaches typically rely on known fiducial patterns and solve the AX = XB formulation. While effective, introducing additional markers into the operating room (OR) environment can violate sterility protocols and disrupt surgical workflows. In this study, we propose SurgCalib, an automatic, markerless framework that has the potential to be used in the OR. SurgCalib first initializes the pose of the surgical instrument using raw kinematic measurements and subsequently refines this pose through a two-phase optimization procedure under the RCM constraint within a Gaussian Splatting-based differentiable rendering pipeline. We evaluate the proposed method on the public dVRK benchmark, SurgPose. The results demonstrate average 2D tool-tip reprojection errors of 12.24 px (2.06 mm) and 11.33 px (1.9 mm), and 3D tool-tip Euclidean distance errors of 5.98 mm and 4.75 mm, for the left and right instruments, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯溅射的达芬奇手术机器人手眼标定框架SurgCalib，该框架无需标记，能够自动进行标定，并能在手术室中使用。
AI.motivation: 现有手眼标定方法依赖于附加标记，这在手术室环境中会违反无菌原则并干扰手术流程。对于线驱动手术机器人，编码器测量不准确也是一个挑战。
AI.method: SurgCalib框架首先利用原始运动学测量初始化手术器械的位姿，然后在基于高斯溅射的可微分渲染管线中，在RCM约束下通过两阶段优化过程进行位姿细化。
AI.result: 在dVRK基准SurgPose上评估结果显示，对于左侧和右侧器械，平均2D工具尖端重投影误差分别为12.24 px (2.06 mm)和11.33 px (1.9 mm)，3D工具尖端欧氏距离误差分别为5.98 mm和4.75 mm。
AI.conclusion: SurgCalib框架能够实现自动、无标记的手眼标定，为达芬奇手术机器人在手术室环境中的闭环控制提供了高精度的位姿估计。

title: System-wide Dynamic Performance Metric for IBR-based Power Networks
summary: In power networks based on Inverter-Based Resources (IBRs), fast controllers cause frequency and voltage dynamics to overlap. Thus, it becomes critical to assess the overall dynamic performance of such networks through a combined system-wide metric. This letter presents a unified metric designed to evaluate dynamic performance in such cases. The proposed metric consists of a weighted sum of local voltage phasor variations at each bus, where the weights are the complex powers injected at the buses. The proposed metric is further decomposed into device-driven and network-driven components, enabling a more comprehensive assessment of grid dynamics. A case study based on a modified version of the IEEE 39-bus system is presented, in which synchronous machines are replaced by inverter-based resources. A sensitivity analysis of the R/X ratio is utilized to evaluate the metric in conventional grids, as well as in those characterized by strong voltage-frequency coupling with complex power flows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的指标来评估包含大量逆变器基载资源（IBRs）的电力系统的动态性能，该指标通过加权各母线的电压相量变化来计算，并分解为设备驱动和网络驱动两个部分，通过 IEEE 39 节点系统案例研究验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 在基于 IBR 的电力系统中，快速控制器导致频率和电压动态相互影响，因此需要一个系统级的统一指标来评估整体动态性能。
AI.method: 提出了一种统一的动态性能评估指标，该指标是各母线复功率加权的局部电压相量变化的加权和。该指标进一步分解为设备驱动和网络驱动两个分量。通过修改 IEEE 39 节点系统并用 IBR 替换同步发电机进行案例研究，并进行 R/X 比率的敏感性分析。
AI.result: 提出的统一指标能够有效评估包含 IBR 的电力系统的动态性能，并能区分设备和网络对动态响应的贡献。案例研究表明，该指标在不同电网配置下（包括强电压-频率耦合的电网）均能提供有意义的评估。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一指标为评估 IBR 主导的电力系统的动态性能提供了一种有效且全面的方法，有助于深入理解和分析电网的动态行为。

title: Vector-field guided constraint-following control for path following of uncertain mechanical systems
summary: This note proposes a general control approach, called vector-field guided constraint-following control, to solve the dynamics control problem of geometric path-following for a class of uncertain mechanical systems. More specifically, it operates at the dynamics level and can handle both fully-actuated and underactuated mechanical systems, heterogeneous (possibly fast) time-varying uncertainties with unknown bounds, and geometric desired paths that may be self-intersecting. Simulations are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of the approach.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种向量场引导约束跟随控制方法，用于解决一类不确定机械系统的动力学路径跟随控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有控制方法在处理具有未知界限的异构（可能快速变化的）不确定性以及可能自相交的几何路径时存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出了一种向量场引导约束跟随控制（vector-field guided constraint-following control）的通用控制方法，该方法在动力学层面操作，能够处理全驱动和欠驱动机械系统，以及具有未知界限的异构（可能快速变化的）不确定性，还有可能自相交的几何期望路径。
AI.result: 该方法能够有效地处理所描述的复杂系统和路径，并通过仿真证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 向量场引导约束跟随控制是一种通用的、有效的动力学控制方法，能够解决复杂不确定机械系统的几何路径跟随问题。

title: Vision-Language Models Encode Clinical Guidelines for Concept-Based Medical Reasoning
summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) are a prominent framework for interpretable AI that map learned visual features to a set of meaningful concepts for task-specific downstream predictions. Their sequential structure enhances transparency by connecting model predictions to the underlying concepts that support them. In medical imaging, where transparency is essential, CBMs offer an appealing foundation for explainable model design. However, discrete concept representations often overlook broader clinical context such as diagnostic guidelines and expert heuristics, reducing reliability in complex cases. We propose MedCBR, a concept-based reasoning framework that integrates clinical guidelines with vision-language and reasoning models. Labeled clinical descriptors are transformed into guideline-conformant text, and a concept-based model is trained with a multitask objective combining multimodal contrastive alignment, concept supervision, and diagnostic classification to jointly ground image features, concepts, and pathology. A reasoning model then converts these predictions into structured clinical narratives that explain the diagnosis, emulating expert reasoning based on established guidelines. MedCBR achieves superior diagnostic and concept-level performance, with AUROCs of 94.2% on ultrasound and 84.0% on mammography. Further experiments on non-medical datasets achieve 86.1% accuracy. Our framework enhances interpretability and forms an end-to-end bridge from medical image analysis to decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 MedCBR 的概念化推理框架，用于提高医学影像分析的可解释性和准确性，通过整合临床指南、视觉语言模型和推理模型，实现从图像分析到结构化临床叙事的端到端连接。
AI.motivation: 现有的概念瓶颈模型 (CBMs) 在医学影像领域虽然提高了透明度，但其离散的概念表示忽略了更广泛的临床背景，如诊断指南和专家启发式方法，导致在复杂情况下可靠性降低。因此，需要一个能整合临床指南并提升模型在复杂医学案例中表现的框架。
AI.method: MedCBR 框架首先将标记的临床描述符转化为符合指南的文本。然后，训练一个概念化模型，采用多任务目标，结合多模态对比学习、概念监督和诊断分类，以联合实现图像特征、概念和病理的对齐。最后，利用推理模型将预测转化为结构化的临床叙事，解释诊断，模仿基于既定指南的专家推理。
AI.result: MedCBR 在超声影像上实现了 94.2% 的 AUROC，在乳腺 X 线摄影上实现了 84.0% 的 AUROC。在非医学数据集上的实验也达到了 86.1% 的准确率。框架显著提升了诊断和概念层面的性能。
AI.conclusion: MedCBR 框架通过整合临床指南和先进的 AI 模型，成功地增强了医学影像分析的可解释性，并实现了从图像分析到临床决策制定的端到端连接，提高了诊断的准确性和可靠性。

title: DEO: Training-Free Direct Embedding Optimization for Negation-Aware Retrieval
summary: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) have enabled diverse retrieval methods. However, existing retrieval methods often fail to accurately retrieve results for negation and exclusion queries. To address this limitation, prior approaches rely on embedding adaptation or fine-tuning, which introduce additional computational cost and deployment complexity. We propose Direct Embedding Optimization (DEO), a training-free method for negation-aware text and multimodal retrieval. DEO decomposes queries into positive and negative components and optimizes the query embedding with a contrastive objective. Without additional training data or model updates, DEO outperforms baselines on NegConstraint, with gains of +0.0738 nDCG@10 and +0.1028 MAP@100, while improving Recall@5 by +6\% over OpenAI CLIP in multimodal retrieval. These results demonstrate the practicality of DEO for negation- and exclusion-aware retrieval in real-world settings.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DEO（Direct Embedding Optimization）的训练无关方法，用于提高对包含否定和排除的查询的检索准确性，在文本和多模态检索中均取得了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的检索方法在处理否定和排除查询时效果不佳，而现有解决方案（如嵌入适应或微调）会增加计算成本和部署复杂度。
AI.method: DEO将查询分解为正向和负向组件，并使用对比学习目标来优化查询嵌入，整个过程无需额外训练数据或模型更新。
AI.result: 在NegConstraint数据集上，DEO比基线方法在nDCG@10上提升了0.0738，在MAP@100上提升了0.1028。在多模态检索方面，Recall@5相比OpenAI CLIP提升了6%。
AI.conclusion: DEO是一种高效且实用的方法，能够有效解决否定和排除查询的检索难题，适用于实际应用场景。

title: MEMO: Memory-Augmented Model Context Optimization for Robust Multi-Turn Multi-Agent LLM Games
summary: Multi-turn, multi-agent LLM game evaluations often exhibit substantial run-to-run variance. In long-horizon interactions, small early deviations compound across turns and are amplified by multi-agent coupling. This biases win rate estimates and makes rankings unreliable across repeated tournaments. Prompt choice worsens this further by producing different effective policies. We address both instability and underperformance with MEMO (Memory-augmented MOdel context optimization), a self-play framework that optimizes inference-time context by coupling retention and exploration. Retention maintains a persistent memory bank that stores structured insights from self-play trajectories and injects them as priors during later play. Exploration runs tournament-style prompt evolution with uncertainty-aware selection via TrueSkill, and uses prioritized replay to revisit rare and decisive states. Across five text-based games, MEMO raises mean win rate from 25.1% to 49.5% for GPT-4o-mini and from 20.9% to 44.3% for Qwen-2.5-7B-Instruct, using $2,000$ self-play games per task. Run-to-run variance also drops, giving more stable rankings across prompt variations. These results suggest that multi-agent LLM game performance and robustness have substantial room for improvement through context optimization. MEMO achieves the largest gains in negotiation and imperfect-information games, while RL remains more effective in perfect-information settings.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为MEMO（Memory-augmented MOdel context optimization）的自学习框架，通过优化推理时上下文来解决多轮、多智能体LLM游戏评估中存在的显著运行间方差和欠佳表现问题。MEMO结合了记忆保留和探索机制，显著提高了GPT-4o-mini和Qwen-2.5-7B-Instruct在五种文本游戏中的胜率，并降低了运行间方差，使得排名更加稳定。
AI.motivation: 多轮、多智能体LLM游戏评估中存在显著的运行间方差，导致胜率估计偏差和排名不可靠。早期微小偏差的累积以及多智能体耦合会放大这些问题，而提示词的选择进一步加剧了这种不稳定性。
AI.method: MEMO是一个自学习框架，通过以下方式优化推理时上下文：1. 记忆保留：维护一个持久的记忆库，存储结构化的自我博弈轨迹洞察，并在后续博弈中作为先验注入。2. 探索：采用类锦标赛的提示词演化，通过基于不确定性的TrueSkill进行选择，并使用优先回放来重新访问稀有和关键的状态。
AI.result: 在五种文本游戏中，MEMO使GPT-4o-mini的平均胜率从25.1%提升到49.5%，Qwen-2.5-7B-Instruct的平均胜率从20.9%提升到44.3%，每个任务使用2000次自我博弈。运行间方差也显著降低，不同提示词下的排名更加稳定。MEMO在谈判和不完全信息游戏中提升效果最明显，而在完全信息游戏中，强化学习方法仍然更有效。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体LLM游戏的表现和鲁棒性仍有很大提升空间，通过上下文优化是有效途径。MEMO框架能够显著提升LLM在多轮、多智能体游戏中的表现和稳定性，尤其在谈判和不完全信息游戏中效果显著。

title: MEGC2026: Micro-Expression Grand Challenge on Visual Question Answering
summary: Facial micro-expressions (MEs) are involuntary movements of the face that occur spontaneously when a person experiences an emotion but attempts to suppress or repress the facial expression, typically found in a high-stakes environment. In recent years, substantial advancements have been made in the areas of ME recognition, spotting, and generation. The emergence of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and large vision-language models (LVLMs) offers promising new avenues for enhancing ME analysis through their powerful multimodal reasoning capabilities. The ME grand challenge (MEGC) 2026 introduces two tasks that reflect these evolving research directions: (1) ME video question answering (ME-VQA), which explores ME understanding through visual question answering on relatively short video sequences, leveraging MLLMs or LVLMs to address diverse question types related to MEs; and (2) ME long-video question answering (ME-LVQA), which extends VQA to long-duration video sequences in realistic settings, requiring models to handle temporal reasoning and subtle micro-expression detection across extended time periods. All participating algorithms are required to submit their results on a public leaderboard. More details are available at https://megc2026.github.io.

AI.tldr: MEGC 2026 提出了两个任务：ME-VQA 和 ME-LVQA，旨在利用 MLLMs/LVLMs 提升对微表情（MEs）的理解和分析能力，尤其是在长视频和真实场景下。
AI.motivation: 近期在微表情识别、检测和生成方面取得了显著进展，而多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）和大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）的出现为增强微表情分析提供了新的可能性。
AI.method: MEGC 2026 包含两个任务：ME-VQA，将 VQA 应用于短视频序列以理解微表情；ME-LVQA，将 VQA 扩展到长视频序列，处理时序推理和长时段的细微微表情检测。参赛算法需提交结果至公开排行榜。
AI.result: 该摘要未包含具体的研究结果，而是概述了 MEGC 2026 竞赛的任务和目标。
AI.conclusion: MEGC 2026 旨在推动利用 MLLMs/LVLMs 在微表情理解和分析方面的研究，特别是在复杂的长视频和真实场景应用中。

title: Emotion is Not Just a Label: Latent Emotional Factors in LLM Processing
summary: Large language models are routinely deployed on text that varies widely in emotional tone, yet their reasoning behavior is typically evaluated without accounting for emotion as a source of representational variation. Prior work has largely treated emotion as a prediction target, for example in sentiment analysis or emotion classification. In contrast, we study emotion as a latent factor that shapes how models attend to and reason over text. We analyze how emotional tone systematically alters attention geometry in transformer models, showing that metrics such as locality, center-of-mass distance, and entropy vary across emotions and correlate with downstream question-answering performance. To facilitate controlled study of these effects, we introduce Affect-Uniform ReAding QA (AURA-QA), a question-answering dataset with emotionally balanced, human-authored context passages. Finally, an emotional regularization framework is proposed that constrains emotion-conditioned representational drift during training. Experiments across multiple QA benchmarks demonstrate that this approach improves reading comprehension in both emotionally-varying and non-emotionally varying datasets, yielding consistent gains under distribution shift and in-domain improvements on several benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了情绪对大型语言模型（LLM）文本理解和推理能力的影响，提出了一种情绪正则化框架，并在新的QA数据集AURA-QA上进行了验证，结果表明该框架能提高LLM在不同情绪分布下的阅读理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究大多将情绪视为预测目标（如情感分析），而忽略了情绪作为一种潜在因素如何影响LLM的文本表征和推理。作者认为，理解情绪对模型注意力和推理行为的影响对于提高LLM在真实世界多变情绪文本上的表现至关重要。
AI.method: 1. 分析了情绪如何系统性地改变Transformer模型中的注意力几何结构（如局部性、质心距离、熵）。 2. 引入了AURA-QA数据集，一个在情绪上均衡、由人类编写的QA数据集，用于可控研究。 3. 提出了一种情绪正则化框架，在训练过程中约束情绪条件下的表征漂移。
AI.result: 实验表明，情绪会影响模型的注意力几何，并且这种影响与下游问答性能相关。情绪正则化框架在多个QA基准测试中均表现出一致的改进，尤其是在分布外（distribution shift）和领域内（in-domain）的阅读理解任务上。
AI.conclusion: 情绪是影响LLM文本表征和推理的重要因素。通过引入情绪正则化框架，可以在训练过程中减轻情绪变化带来的负面影响，从而提高LLM在不同情绪分布下的鲁棒性和阅读理解能力。

title: Constrained finite-time stabilization by model predictive control: an infinite control horizon framework
summary: Existing results on finite-time model predictive control (MPC) often rely on terminal equality constraint, switching inside one-step region, or terminal cost with short control horizon, leading to limited initial feasibility. This paper proposes an infinite-horizon Model Predictive Control (MPC) framework for the constrained finite-time stabilization of discrete-time systems, overcoming limitations found in existing finite-time MPC results. The proposed framework is built upon a terminal cost strategy, but expands it by replacing the short-horizon terminal cost with the sum of stage costs over an infinite control horizon. This design choice significantly enlarges the initial feasibility region and avoids the need for terminal equality constraints or switching strategies during implementation. It is proved that the proposed finite-time MPC guarantees finite-time stabilization performance once the state trajectory enters the predefined terminal set. The infinite-horizon finite-time MPC is shown to be equivalently implementable as a finite-horizon MPC with a terminal cost, thereby ensuring computational tractability. The proposed finite-time MPC is systematically extended and shown to be applicable to both constrained multi-input linear systems and a class of constrained nonlinear systems that are feedback linearizable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无限时域模型预测控制（MPC）框架，用于离散时间系统的约束有限时间稳定，扩大了初始可行性区域，并保证了有限时间稳定性能。
AI.motivation: 现有有限时间MPC方法存在初始可行性受限的问题，需要依赖终端等式约束、单步区域内切换或短控制时域的终端成本。
AI.method: 使用无限控制时域的阶段成本之和作为终端成本策略，取代短时域终端成本，从而扩大初始可行性区域，并避免终端等式约束或切换策略。
AI.result: 所提出的有限时间MPC保证了状态轨迹进入预定义终端集后能够实现有限时间稳定。该无限时域有限时间MPC可等效地实现为具有终端成本的有限时域MPC，确保了计算可行性。该方法成功应用于约束多输入线性系统和一类反馈线性化约束非线性系统。
AI.conclusion: 该无限时域有限时间MPC框架克服了现有方法的局限性，显著扩大了初始可行性，并保证了有限时间稳定性能，同时保持了计算可行性。

title: Time, Identity and Consciousness in Language Model Agents
comment: Accepted at AAAI 2026 Spring Symposium - Machine Consciousness: Integrating Theory, Technology, and Philosophy
summary: Machine consciousness evaluations mostly see behavior. For language model agents that behavior is language and tool use. That lets an agent say the right things about itself even when the constraints that should make those statements matter are not jointly present at decision time. We apply Stack Theory's temporal gap to scaffold trajectories. This separates ingredient-wise occurrence within an evaluation window from co-instantiation at a single objective step. We then instantiate Stack Theory's Arpeggio and Chord postulates on grounded identity statements. This yields two persistence scores that can be computed from instrumented scaffold traces. We connect these scores to five operational identity metrics and map common scaffolds into an identity morphospace that exposes predictable tradeoffs. The result is a conservative toolkit for identity evaluation. It separates talking like a stable self from being organized like one.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于“栈理论”（Stack Theory）的方法来评估语言模型代理的“身份”持久性，区分其语言表达与内在组织结构，并提供了衡量工具。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器意识评估方法主要依赖行为观察，但对于语言模型代理而言，其行为（语言和工具使用）可能不足以真正反映其内在的“身份”稳定性，因为代理可能能够“说”出符合身份的话，即使其决策过程中关键的约束条件并未同时满足。研究旨在解决如何区分“谈论像一个稳定的自我”与“组织像一个稳定的自我”的问题。
AI.method: 研究应用了“栈理论”中的“时间差”（temporal gap）概念来构建“脚手架轨迹”（scaffold trajectories）。这使得在评估窗口内按成分发生的实例与在单一客观步骤中共同实例化的过程得以分离。接着，该研究将“栈理论”的“琶音”（Arpeggio）和“弦”（Chord）公设应用于有根据的身份陈述，计算出两个“持久性得分”（persistence scores）。这些得分与五个操作性身份指标（operational identity metrics）相关联，并将常见的脚手架映射到一个“身份形态空间”（identity morphospace）中，揭示了可预测的权衡。
AI.result: 研究提出了两个可以从仪器化的脚手架轨迹计算出的“持久性得分”，并将其与五个操作性身份指标联系起来。通过将常见的脚手架映射到“身份形态空间”，揭示了可预测的权衡关系，从而提供了一个更保守的身份评估工具集。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功区分了语言模型代理的“谈论像一个稳定的自我”和“组织像一个稳定的自我”这两个方面，为机器身份评估提供了一个更精细、更具操作性的工具。通过将“栈理论”应用于评估过程，能够更准确地衡量代理的内在身份持久性。

title: Improving through Interaction: Searching Behavioral Representation Spaces with CMA-ES-IG
summary: Robots that interact with humans must adapt to individual users' preferences to operate effectively in human-centered environments. An intuitive and effective technique to learn non-expert users' preferences is through rankings of robot behaviors, e.g., trajectories, gestures, or voices. Existing techniques primarily focus on generating queries that optimize preference learning outcomes, such as sample efficiency or final preference estimation accuracy. However, the focus on outcome overlooks key user expectations in the process of providing these rankings, which can negatively impact users' adoption of robotic systems. This work proposes the Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategies with Information Gain (CMA-ES-IG) algorithm. CMA-ES-IG explicitly incorporates user experience considerations into the preference learning process by suggesting perceptually distinct and informative trajectories for users to rank. We demonstrate these benefits through both simulated studies and real-robot experiments. CMA-ES-IG, compared to state-of-the-art alternatives, (1) scales more effectively to higher-dimensional preference spaces, (2) maintains computational tractability for high-dimensional problems, (3) is robust to noisy or inconsistent user feedback, and (4) is preferred by non-expert users in identifying their preferred robot behaviors. This project's code is available at github.com/interaction-lab/CMA-ES-IG

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CMA-ES-IG的算法，该算法通过在学习用户偏好时考虑用户体验，生成更易于区分和信息量更大的机器人行为建议，从而提高了用户对机器人的接受度，并且在多项指标上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人偏好学习技术主要关注学习效率和准确性，忽略了用户在提供偏好排序过程中的体验，这可能导致用户对机器人系统的排斥。因此，研究需要一种能够同时优化学习效果和用户体验的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为CMA-ES-IG（Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategies with Information Gain）的算法。该算法将信息增益（Information Gain）与协方差矩阵自适应进化策略（CMA-ES）相结合，显式地将用户体验因素纳入偏好学习过程，通过推荐感知上可区分且信息量大的轨迹来提升用户体验。
AI.result: CMA-ES-IG算法在模拟研究和真实机器人实验中均取得了良好效果。与现有最先进的方法相比，CMA-ES-IG：1) 能更有效地扩展到高维偏好空间；2) 在高维问题上保持计算可行性；3) 对噪声或不一致的用户反馈具有鲁棒性；4) 在识别机器人行为偏好方面更受非专家用户的青睐。
AI.conclusion: CMA-ES-IG算法通过整合信息增益和用户体验考量，为机器人偏好学习提供了一种有效且用户友好的新方法，克服了现有技术的局限性，并在实际应用中展现出优越性能。

title: EPOCH: An Agentic Protocol for Multi-Round System Optimization
summary: Autonomous agents are increasingly used to improve prompts, code, and machine learning systems through iterative execution and feedback. Yet existing approaches are usually designed as task-specific optimization loops rather than as a unified protocol for establishing baselines and managing tracked multi-round self-improvement. We introduce EPOCH, an engineering protocol for multi-round system optimization in heterogeneous environments. EPOCH organizes optimization into two phases: baseline construction and iterative self-improvement. It further structures each round through role-constrained stages that separate planning, implementation, and evaluation, and standardizes execution through canonical command interfaces and round-level tracking. This design enables coordinated optimization across prompts, model configurations, code, and rule-based components while preserving stability, reproducibility, traceability, and integrity of evaluation. Empirical studies in various tasks illustrate the practicality of EPOCH for production-oriented autonomous improvement workflows.

AI.tldr: EPOCH 是一种用于异构环境中多轮系统优化的工程协议，它将优化分为基线构建和迭代自改进两个阶段，并通过标准化接口和流程保证了稳定性、可复现性、可追溯性和评估的完整性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在改进提示、代码和机器学习系统时通常是任务特定的优化循环，缺乏一个统一的协议来建立基线和管理多轮自我改进。
AI.method: EPOCH 将优化过程分为两个阶段：基线构建和迭代自改进。每个轮次进一步划分为规划、实施和评估等角色约束阶段，并使用标准化的命令接口和轮次级跟踪来实现执行的标准化。
AI.result: EPOCH 能够协调提示、模型配置、代码和基于规则的组件的优化，同时保持稳定性、可复现性、可追溯性和评估的完整性。在各种任务上的实证研究表明了 EPOCH 在面向生产的自主改进工作流中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: EPOCH 提供了一个通用的、工程化的协议，用于在异构环境中进行多轮系统优化，能够有效地管理和协调自主改进过程，适用于生产环境。

title: Characterization, Analytical Planning, and Hybrid Force Control for the Inspire RH56DFX Hand
summary: Commercially accessible dexterous robot hands are increasingly prevalent, but many remain difficult to use as scientific instruments. For example, the Inspire RH56DFX hand exposes only uncalibrated proprioceptive information and shows unreliable contact behavior at high speed (up to 1618% force limit overshoot). Furthermore, its underactuated, coupled finger linkages make antipodal grasps non-trivial. We contribute three improvements to the Inspire RH56DFX to transform it from a black-box device to a research tool: (1) hardware characterization (force calibration, latency, and overshoot), (2) a sim2real validated MuJoCo model for analytical width-to-grasp planning, and (3) a hybrid, closed-loop speed-force grasp controller. We validate these components on peg-in-hole insertion, achieving 65% success and outperforming a wrist-force-only baseline of 10% and on 300 grasps across 15 physically diverse objects, achieving 87% success and outperforming plan-free grasps and learned grasps. Our approach is modular, designed for compatibility with external object detectors and vision-language models for width & force estimation and high-level planning, and provides an interpretable and immediately deployable interface for dexterous manipulation with the Inspire RH56DFX hand, open-sourced at this website https://correlllab.github.io/rh56dfx.html.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Inspire RH56DFX灵巧机械手进行了硬件表征、仿真模型构建和闭环控制器开发，显著提升了其作为科学仪器的可用性，并在抓取和插入任务中取得了高性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的商用灵巧机械手（如Inspire RH56DFX）虽然易于获取，但作为科学仪器的可用性不足，存在未标定的本体感觉信息、不可靠的高速接触行为以及复杂的耦合连杆设计，使得通用抓取任务变得困难。
AI.method: 本文提出了三项改进：1. 对Inspire RH56DFX进行硬件特性分析（力校准、延迟和超调）；2. 构建了一个经过sim2real验证的MuJoCo仿真模型，用于分析宽度到抓取的规划；3. 开发了一个混合式的闭环速度-力抓取控制器。
AI.result: 在实际应用中，该方法在销钉孔插入任务中实现了65%的成功率，远超仅使用腕部力的基线（10%）；在300次跨越15个物理特性各异的物体抓取任务中，成功率达到87%，优于无规划抓取和学习抓取方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过硬件校准、仿真建模和闭环控制器的开发，Inspire RH56DFX机械手的功能得到了显著增强，从一个“黑匣子”设备转变为一个可解释且易于部署的科学研究工具，为灵巧操作提供了即插即用的接口，并且兼容外部对象检测器和视觉-语言模型。

title: Embedded Model Predictive Control for EMS-type Maglev Vehicles
summary: Current developments of high-speed magnetic levitation technology using the principle of the electromagnet suspension (EMS) focus on reaching vehicle speeds of more than 600 km/h. With increasing vehicle speeds, however, updated control algorithms need to be investigated to reliably stabilize the system and meet the demands in terms of ride comfort. This article examines the modern and popular approach of model predictive control and its application to the magnetic levitation control system. Investigated key aspects are the parameterization of the model predictive controller and its implementation on embedded, resource constrained hardware. The results reveal that model predictive control is capable to robustly stabilize the highly nonlinear and constrained system even at very high speed. Furthermore, processor-in-the-loop studies are carried out to validate the designed control algorithms on a microcontroller.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了模型预测控制（MPC）在高速电磁悬浮（EMS）磁悬浮列车系统中的应用，重点在于参数化和在资源受限硬件上的实现，以实现超过600 km/h的速度并保证乘坐舒适性。
AI.motivation: 随着磁悬浮列车速度的提升（超过600 km/h），需要新的控制算法来确保系统的稳定性和乘坐舒适性。
AI.method: 本文采用了模型预测控制（MPC）方法，并研究了其参数化和在嵌入式硬件上的实现。通过处理器在环（PIL）仿真验证了控制算法在微控制器上的性能。
AI.result: 研究表明，MPC能够鲁棒地稳定高度非线性和有约束的EMS系统，即使在非常高的速度下也能胜任。PIL仿真验证了设计算法在微控制器上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 模型预测控制（MPC）是一种有效的方法，可以用于控制高速EMS磁悬浮列车系统，在保证系统稳定性和乘坐舒适性的同时，也能在资源受限的硬件上实现。

title: TIDE: Text-Informed Dynamic Extrapolation with Step-Aware Temperature Control for Diffusion Transformers
summary: Diffusion Transformer (DiT) faces challenges when generating images with higher resolution compared at training resolution, causing especially structural degradation due to attention dilution. Previous approaches attempt to mitigate this by sharpening attention distributions, but fail to preserve fine-grained semantic details and introduce obvious artifacts. In this work, we analyze the characteristics of DiTs and propose TIDE, a training-free text-to-image (T2I) extrapolation method that enables generation with arbitrary resolution and aspect ratio without additional sampling overhead. We identify the core factor for prompt information loss, and introduce a text anchoring mechanism to correct the imbalance between text and image tokens. To further eliminate artifacts, we design a dynamic temperature control mechanism that leverages the pattern of spectral progression in the diffusion process. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that TIDE delivers high-quality resolution extrapolation capability and integrates seamlessly with existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为TIDE的训练无关文本到图像外插方法，用于解决Diffusion Transformer (DiT)在高分辨率生成时因注意力稀释导致的结构退化问题，该方法通过文本锚定和动态温度控制来保持语义细节并消除伪影。
AI.motivation: Diffusion Transformer (DiT) 在生成超出训练分辨率的图像时存在结构退化问题，现有方法通过锐化注意力来缓解但会丢失语义细节并引入伪影。
AI.method: 提出TIDE方法，一种训练无关的文本到图像外插技术。核心在于引入文本锚定机制以纠正文本和图像token间的不平衡，以及设计动态温度控制机制利用谱演进模式消除伪影。
AI.result: TIDE能够高质量地进行任意分辨率和长宽比的图像生成，且无需额外采样开销。该方法能有效保持精细的语义细节，并消除伪影，同时可以无缝集成到现有先进方法中。
AI.conclusion: TIDE是一种有效的、训练无关的DiT高分辨率外插方法，通过解决注意力稀释和文本信息丢失问题，实现了高质量、高效率的任意分辨率图像生成。

title: PlayWorld: Learning Robot World Models from Autonomous Play
summary: Action-conditioned video models offer a promising path to building general-purpose robot simulators that can improve directly from data. Yet, despite training on large-scale robot datasets, current state-of-the-art video models still struggle to predict physically consistent robot-object interactions that are crucial in robotic manipulation. To close this gap, we present PlayWorld, a simple, scalable, and fully autonomous pipeline for training high-fidelity video world simulators from interaction experience. In contrast to prior approaches that rely on success-biased human demonstrations, PlayWorld is the first system capable of learning entirely from unsupervised robot self-play, enabling naturally scalable data collection while capturing complex, long-tailed physical interactions essential for modeling realistic object dynamics. Experiments across diverse manipulation tasks show that PlayWorld generates high-quality, physically consistent predictions for contact-rich interactions that are not captured by world models trained on human-collected data.We further demonstrate the versatility of PlayWorld in enabling fine-grained failure prediction and policy evaluation, with up to 40% improvements over human-collected data. Finally, we demonstrate how PlayWorld enables reinforcement learning in the world model, improving policy performance by 65% in success rates when deployed in the real world.

AI.tldr: PlayWorld是一个新的视频世界模拟器训练管道，它通过无监督的机器人自我玩耍学习，能够生成更高保真度、物理上一致的机器人-物体交互预测，并在机器人操作任务中显著提高了失败预测、策略评估和强化学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于视频的模型在预测机器人操作中的物理上一致的机器人-物体交互方面存在不足，尽管它们在大量机器人数据集上进行了训练。作者希望弥合这一差距，以提高机器人模拟器的性能。
AI.method: PlayWorld采用了一个完全自主的管道，通过无监督的机器人自我玩耍来学习。这种方法避免了对人类演示的依赖，从而能够进行大规模的数据收集，并捕获复杂的、长尾的物理交互。
AI.result: PlayWorld在各种操作任务中生成了高质量、物理上一致的接触交互预测，优于使用人类收集的数据训练的世界模型。此外，PlayWorld在细粒度失败预测和策略评估方面展现了高达40%的改进，并在现实世界中将强化学习策略的成功率提高了65%。
AI.conclusion: PlayWorld是一个有效的方法，可以通过无监督的机器人自我玩耍来训练高保真度的视频世界模拟器。它能够捕捉更现实的物理交互，并在机器人操作相关的下游任务（如失败预测、策略评估和强化学习）中带来显著的性能提升。

title: From Days to Minutes: An Autonomous AI Agent Achieves Reliable Clinical Triage in Remote Patient Monitoring
comment: 46 pages, 11 figures, Abstract in metadata is shortened to meet arXiv character limits; see PDF for full version
summary:
Background: Remote patient monitoring (RPM) generates vast data, yet landmark trials (Tele-HF, BEAT-HF) failed because data volume overwhelmed clinical staff. While TIM-HF2 showed 24/7 physician-led monitoring reduces mortality by 30%, this model remains prohibitively expensive and unscalable.
  Methods: We developed Sentinel, an autonomous AI agent using Model Context Protocol (MCP) for contextual triage of RPM vitals via 21 clinical tools and multi-step reasoning. Evaluation included: (1) self-consistency (100 readings x 5 runs); (2) comparison against rule-based thresholds; and (3) validation against 6 clinicians (3 physicians, 3 NPs) using a connected matrix design. A leave-one-out (LOO) analysis compared the agent against individual clinicians; severe overtriage cases underwent independent physician adjudication.
  Results: Against a human majority-vote standard (N=467), the agent achieved 95.8% emergency sensitivity and 88.5% sensitivity for all actionable alerts (85.7% specificity). Four-level exact accuracy was 69.4% (quadratic-weighted kappa=0.778); 95.9% of classifications were within one severity level. In LOO analysis, the agent outperformed every clinician in emergency sensitivity (97.5% vs. 60.0% aggregate) and actionable sensitivity (90.9% vs. 69.5%). While disagreements skewed toward overtriage (22.5%), independent adjudication of severe gaps (>=2 levels) validated agent escalation in 88-94% of cases; consensus resolution validated 100%. The agent showed near-perfect self-consistency (kappa=0.850). Median cost was $0.34/triage.
  Conclusions: Sentinel triages RPM vitals with sensitivity exceeding individual clinicians. By automating systematic context synthesis, Sentinel addresses the core limitation of prior RPM trials, offering a scalable path toward the intensive monitoring shown to reduce mortality while maintaining a clinically defensible overtriage profile.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个名为Sentinel的自主AI代理，利用模型上下文协议（MCP）和21种临床工具进行远程患者监测（RPM）生命体征的上下文分诊，结果显示其在紧急情况下的敏感性优于临床医生，并能经济高效地解决RPM数据过载问题，为实现高强度监测提供了可扩展的途径。
AI.motivation: 远程患者监测（RPM）产生大量数据，但之前的试验因数据量过大而失败。虽然高强度的医生主导监测已被证明能降低死亡率，但成本过高且难以扩展。研究旨在解决RPM数据过载问题，实现高强度监测的益处。
AI.method: 开发了名为Sentinel的自主AI代理，使用模型上下文协议（MCP）和21种临床工具进行RPM生命体征的上下文分诊。评估方法包括：1）自洽性测试；2）与基于规则的阈值比较；3）与6名临床医生（3名医生，3名NP）进行对照验证。还进行了留一法（LOO）分析，并将严重误报案例进行独立医生裁定。
AI.result: 与人类多数投票标准相比，Sentinel在紧急情况下的敏感性为95.8%，所有可操作警报的敏感性为88.5%，特异性为85.7%。在LOO分析中，Sentinel在紧急敏感性和可操作敏感性方面均优于所有临床医生。独立裁定验证了Sentinel在88-94%的案例中进行上报的合理性。平均每次分诊成本为0.34美元。
AI.conclusion: Sentinel能够以超过个体临床医生的敏感性对RPM生命体征进行分诊。通过自动化系统化的上下文综合，Sentinel解决了先前RPM试验的核心限制，提供了一条可扩展的途径，能够实现已被证明可以降低死亡率的高强度监测，同时保持临床可接受的误报率。

title: LooComp: Leverage Leave-One-Out Strategy to Encoder-only Transformer for Efficient Query-aware Context Compression
summary: Efficient context compression is crucial for improving the accuracy and scalability of question answering. For the efficiency of Retrieval Augmented Generation, context should be delivered fast, compact, and precise to ensure clue sufficiency and budget-friendly LLM reader cost. We propose a margin-based framework for query-driven context pruning, which identifies sentences that are critical for answering a query by measuring changes in clue richness when they are omitted. The model is trained with a composite ranking loss that enforces large margins for critical sentences while keeping non-critical ones near neutral. Built on a lightweight encoder-only Transformer, our approach generally achieves strong exact-match and F1 scores with high-throughput inference and lower memory requirements than those of major baselines. In addition to efficiency, our method yields effective compression ratios without degrading answering performance, demonstrating its potential as a lightweight and practical alternative for retrieval-augmented tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于边距的查询驱动上下文剪枝框架，通过测量句子移除后的线索丰富度变化来识别对回答查询至关重要的句子，并在检索增强问答任务中实现了高效的上下文压缩。
AI.motivation: 为了提高检索增强生成（RAG）的效率、准确性和可扩展性，需要对上下文进行快速、紧凑且精确的压缩，以确保线索的充分性和LLM阅读成本的经济性。
AI.method: 设计了一个基于边距的查询驱动上下文剪枝框架。通过计算移除句子后线索丰富度的变化来衡量句子对回答查询的重要性。模型采用复合排序损失进行训练，为关键句子施加大的边距，同时使非关键句子接近中性。该方法基于轻量级的仅编码器Transformer。
AI.result: 所提出的方法在推理吞吐量和内存需求方面优于主要基线。在不降低回答性能的情况下，实现了有效的压缩率，同时保持了强的精确匹配和F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法是一种轻量级且实用的检索增强任务替代方案，能够高效地压缩上下文，提高RAG系统的效率和性能。

title: Using Vision Language Foundation Models to Generate Plant Simulation Configurations via In-Context Learning
summary: This paper introduces a synthetic benchmark to evaluate the performance of vision language models (VLMs) in generating plant simulation configurations for digital twins. While functional-structural plant models (FSPMs) are useful tools for simulating biophysical processes in agricultural environments, their high complexity and low throughput create bottlenecks for deployment at scale. We propose a novel approach that leverages state-of-the-art open-source VLMs -- Gemma 3 and Qwen3-VL -- to directly generate simulation parameters in JSON format from drone-based remote sensing images. Using a synthetic cowpea plot dataset generated via the Helios 3D procedural plant generation library, we tested five in-context learning methods and evaluated the models across three categories: JSON integrity, geometric evaluations, and biophysical evaluations. Our results show that while VLMs can interpret structural metadata and estimate parameters like plant count and sun azimuth, they often exhibit performance degradation due to contextual bias or rely on dataset means when visual cues are insufficient. Validation on a real-world drone orthophoto dataset and an ablation study using a blind baseline further characterize the models' reasoning capabilities versus their reliance on contextual priors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to utilize VLMs to generate structural JSON configurations for plant simulations, providing a scalable framework for reconstruction 3D plots for digital twin in agriculture.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个使用视觉语言模型（VLMs）根据遥感图像生成植物模拟配置（JSON格式）的合成基准，以解决功能结构植物模型（FSPMs）在高复杂性和低吞吐量方面的瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有植物模拟模型（FSPMs）因其高复杂性和低吞吐量，难以大规模部署。研究旨在探索利用先进的视觉语言模型（VLMs）自动生成模拟参数，以提高效率和可扩展性。
AI.method: 使用Gemma 3和Qwen3-VL等开源VLMs，从无人机遥感图像直接生成JSON格式的模拟参数。构建了一个基于Helios 3D生成的合成豇豆图数据集，并测试了五种上下文学习方法。评估指标包括JSON完整性、几何评估和生物物理评估。此外，还在真实无人机正射影像数据集上进行了验证，并进行了消融研究。
AI.result: VLMs能够解释结构元数据并估计植物数量和太阳方位角等参数。然而，模型表现可能因上下文偏见而下降，或者在视觉线索不足时依赖数据集的平均值。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次利用VLMs生成用于植物模拟的结构化JSON配置的研究，为在农业领域创建数字孪生重构3D图提供了可扩展的框架。研究表明VLMs在理解植物结构和参数估计方面有潜力，但也存在局限性，需要进一步研究以提高其准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Chaotic Dynamics in Multi-LLM Deliberation
comment: Main text: 6 pages, 4 figures; Supplementary Information: 14 pages, 7 supplementary figures
summary: Collective AI systems increasingly rely on multi-LLM deliberation, but their stability under repeated execution remains poorly characterized. We model five-agent LLM committees as random dynamical systems and quantify inter-run sensitivity using an empirical Lyapunov exponent ($\hatλ$) derived from trajectory divergence in committee mean preferences. Across 12 policy scenarios, a factorial design at $T=0$ identifies two independent routes to instability: role differentiation in homogeneous committees and model heterogeneity in no-role committees. Critically, these effects appear even in the $T=0$ regime where practitioners often expect deterministic behavior. In the HL-01 benchmark, both routes produce elevated divergence ($\hatλ=0.0541$ and $0.0947$, respectively), while homogeneous no-role committees also remain in a positive-divergence regime ($\hatλ=0.0221$). The combined mixed+roles condition is less unstable than mixed+no-role ($\hatλ=0.0519$ vs $0.0947$), showing non-additive interaction. Mechanistically, Chair-role ablation reduces $\hatλ$ most strongly, and targeted protocol variants that shorten memory windows further attenuate divergence. These results support stability auditing as a core design requirement for multi-LLM governance systems.

AI.tldr: 解析错误
AI.motivation: 解析错误
AI.method: 解析错误
AI.result: 解析错误
AI.conclusion: 解析错误

title: Learning-Augmented Primal-Dual Control Design for Secondary Frequency Regulation
summary: Frequency stability is fundamental to the secure operation of power systems. With growing uncertainty and volatility introduced by renewable generation, secondary frequency regulation must now deliver enhanced performance not only in the steady state but also during transients. This paper presents a systematic framework to embed learning in the design of a primal-dual controller that provides provable (potentially exponential) stability and steady-state optimality, while simultaneously improving key transient metrics, including frequency nadir and control effort, in a data-driven manner. In particular, we employ the primal-dual dynamics of an optimization problem that encodes steady-state objectives to realize secondary frequency control with asymptotic stability guarantee. To augment transient performance of the controller via learning, a change of variables on control inputs, which will be deployed by neural networks, is proposed such that under mild conditions, stability and steady-state optimality are preserved. It further allows us to define a learning goal that accounts for the exponential convergence rate, frequency nadir and accumulated control effort, and use sample trajectories to enhance these metrics. Simulation results validate the theories and demonstrate superior transient performance of the learning-augmented primal-dual controller.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的、结合学习的原对偶控制器，用于提高电网频率稳定性，尤其是在瞬态响应方面，同时保证了渐近稳定性和稳态最优性。
AI.motivation: 可再生能源发电的波动性增加了电网频率不确定性，需要提高二次频率调节在稳态和瞬态下的性能。
AI.method: 利用编码稳态目标的优化问题的原对偶动力学实现二次频率控制，并引入控制输入变量变换，利用神经网络进行学习，以改善瞬态性能，并定义了考虑指数收敛率、频率谷值和控制能量的学习目标。
AI.result: 所提出的学习增强型原对偶控制器在仿真中表现出优越的瞬态性能，验证了理论的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够通过学习以数据驱动的方式提高电网频率控制的瞬态性能，同时保持原有的稳定性与稳态最优性保证。

title: SPAR-K: Scheduled Periodic Alternating Early Exit for Spoken Language Models
summary: Interleaved spoken language models (SLMs) alternately generate text and speech tokens, but decoding at full transformer depth for every step becomes costly, especially due to long speech sequences. We propose SPAR-K, a modality-aware early exit framework designed to accelerate interleaved SLM inference while preserving perceptual quality. SPAR-K introduces a speech alternating-depth schedule: most speech positions exit at a fixed intermediate layer, while periodic full-depth "refresh" steps mitigate distribution shift due to early exit. We evaluate our framework using Step-Audio-2-mini and GLM-4-Voice across four datasets spanning reasoning, factual QA, and dialogue tasks, measuring performance in terms of ASR transcription accuracy and perceptual quality. Experimental results demonstrate that SPAR-K largely preserves question-answering accuracy with a maximum accuracy drop of 0.82\% while reducing average speech decoding depth by up to 11\% on Step-Audio-2-mini and 5\% on GLM-4-Voice, both with negligible changes in MOS and WER and no auxiliary computation overhead. We further demonstrate that confidence-based early exit strategies, widely used in text LLMs, are suboptimal for SLMs, highlighting that the unique statistical nature of speech tokens necessitates a specialized early exit design.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SPAR-K的模态感知早期退出框架，用于加速交织语音语言模型（SLM）的推理，同时保持感知质量。SPAR-K通过交替的深度策略，让大部分语音位置在中间层退出，并通过周期性的全深度“刷新”步骤来减轻分布偏移。实验表明，SPAR-K在保持问答准确率的同时，显著减少了语音解码深度，并且对MOS和WER的影响微乎其微。
AI.motivation: 交织语音语言模型（SLM）在每次推理时都需要解码完整的Transformer深度，这在处理长语音序列时成本很高。需要一种加速SLM推理的方法，同时保持感知质量。
AI.method: 提出SPAR-K框架，采用语音交替深度调度策略。大部分语音位置在固定的中间层退出，而周期性的全深度“刷新”步骤用于缓解由于早期退出导致的分布偏移。在Step-Audio-2-mini和GLM-4-Voice模型上进行评估，使用了涵盖推理、事实问答和对话任务的四个数据集。
AI.result: SPAR-K在保持问答准确率方面表现良好，准确率下降最大为0.82%。在Step-Audio-2-mini和GLM-4-Voice上，平均语音解码深度分别减少了高达11%和5%。MOS和WER几乎没有变化，且没有额外的计算开销。基于置信度的早期退出策略对于SLM来说不是最优的。
AI.conclusion: SPAR-K是一种有效的框架，可以显著加速交织SLM的推理，同时保持问答准确性和感知质量。语音令牌的统计特性需要专门设计的早期退出机制，而非简单的借鉴文本LLM的方法。

title: Field Free Novel Architecture for Spintronic Flash Analog to Digital Converter
comment: 9 pages incluinding 2 pages of reference, 11 figures and 2 tables. Invited and presented at conference(ICMAGMA,2024)
summary: A 3 bit Analog to Digital Converter (ADC) is designed using perpendicular Spin Orbit Torque Magnetic Tunnel Junction (SOT MTJ). A sampled analog input signal is transmitted as a spin orbit torque current (Iin) to a perpendicular SOT MTJ, and deterministic switching is supported by the Voltage Controlled Magnetic Anisotropy (VCMA) and Spin Transfer Torque (STT) switching methods. Analog to digital conversion is done by comparing input signal with varied critical current of SOT MTJs. The critical current of each is SOT MTJ governed by varying widths of Heavy Metal (HM). In the 3 bit ADC, there are two sets of 7 SOT MTJs for quantizing input value, a conversion set and dummy set for comparing the change in resistance state. As input signal passed through conversion set SOT MTJs switches from Parallel (P) to AntiParallel (AP) state if the input signal exceeds its critical current. The conversion set change in state is converted to thermometer codes by StrongARM latch comparator by comparing the resistance with dummy set SOT MTJs, where all the in P state or low resistance. A novel architecture is proposed for increasing speed of throughput, by utilizing the dummy set of as a conversion set and conversion set as dummy set, thus eliminating the reset step from analog to digital conversion. And by improving SOT-MTJ and timing blocks a field free spin flash ADC has a power consumption of 476 uW with a conversion rate of 304.1 MHz is produced.

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于垂直自旋轨道力矩磁隧道结（SOT MTJ）的 3 位 ADC，通过比较输入电流与不同临界电流的 SOT MTJ 来实现模拟数字转换。提出了一种新颖的架构，通过利用冗余 MTJ 组来消除重置步骤，从而提高了吞吐速度，并实现了低功耗和高转换率。
AI.motivation: 现有 ADC 在速度和功耗方面存在挑战，特别是对于需要高吞吐量的应用。
AI.method: 设计了一个 3 位 ADC，使用垂直 SOT MTJ 作为基本元件。模拟输入信号被转换为电流，并与不同临界电流的 SOT MTJ 进行比较。通过 VCMA 和 STT 机制实现确定性开关。通过强ARM锁存比较器将 MTJ 的电阻状态变化转换为温度码，并利用冗余 MTJ 组消除重置步骤以提高速度。
AI.result: 所提出的 ADC 架构实现了 476 uW 的功耗和 304.1 MHz 的转换速率，这表明其在速度和功耗方面都有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 基于 SOT MTJ 的 ADC 是一种有前途的模拟数字转换技术，通过新颖的架构设计和优化，可以实现高速度和低功耗，为未来的高性能 ADC 应用奠定了基础。

title: ImpedanceDiffusion: Diffusion-Based Global Path Planning for UAV Swarm Navigation with Generative Impedance Control
comment: This is paper is under review
summary:
Safe swarm navigation in cluttered indoor environment requires long-horizon planning, reactive obstacle avoidance, and adaptive compliance. We propose ImpedanceDiffusion, a hierarchical framework that leverages image-conditioned diffusion-based global path planning with Artificial Potential Field (APF) tracking and semantic-aware variable impedance control for aerial drone swarms.
  The diffusion model generates geometric global trajectories directly from RGB images without explicit map construction. These trajectories are tracked by an APF-based reactive layer, while a VLM-RAG module performs semantic obstacle classification with 90% retrieval accuracy to adapt impedance parameters for mixed obstacle environments during execution.
  Two diffusion planners are evaluated: (i) a top-view long-horizon planner using single-pass inference and (ii) a first-person-view (FPV) short-horizon planner deployed via a two-stage inference pipeline. Both planners achieve a 100% trajectory generation rate across twenty static and dynamic experimental configurations and are validated via zero-shot sim-to-real deployment on Crazyflie 2.1 drones through the hierarchical APF-impedance control stack. The top-view planner produces smoother trajectories that yield conservative tracking speeds of 1.0-1.2 m/s near hard obstacles and 0.6-1.0 m/s near soft obstacles. In contrast, the FPV planner generates trajectories with greater local clearance and typically higher speeds, reaching 1.4-2.0 m/s near hard obstacles and up to 1.6 m/s near soft obstacles. Across 20 experimental configurations (100 total runs), the framework achieved a 92% success rate while maintaining stable impedance-based formation control with bounded oscillations and no in-flight collisions, demonstrating reliable and adaptive swarm navigation in cluttered indoor environments.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为ImpedanceDiffusion的层次化框架，用于在杂乱的室内环境中安全地进行无人机群导航。该框架结合了基于图像的扩散模型进行全局路径规划，以及人工势场（APF）进行跟踪和自适应阻抗控制。
AI.motivation: 在杂乱的室内环境中安全地进行无人机群导航需要长远规划、反应式避障和自适应顺从，而现有的方法在这些方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出ImpedanceDiffusion层次化框架，包括：1. 图像条件扩散模型进行全局路径规划，直接从RGB图像生成几何轨迹，无需显式建图。2. APF-based反应层跟踪扩散模型生成的轨迹。3. 语义感知变阻抗控制，利用VLM-RAG模块进行语义障碍物分类，自适应调整阻抗参数。评估了两种扩散规划器：(i) 单通道推理的顶视图长视距规划器；(ii) 两阶段推理的单目第一人称视角（FPV）短视距规划器。
AI.result: 两种规划器在20种静态和动态实验配置中均实现了100%的轨迹生成率。框架通过零样本sim-to-real部署在Crazyflie 2.1无人机上进行了验证。顶视图规划器产生更平滑的轨迹，近硬障碍物速度为1.0-1.2 m/s，近软障碍物速度为0.6-1.0 m/s。FPV规划器产生局部间隙更大的轨迹，近硬障碍物速度为1.4-2.0 m/s，近软障碍物速度可达1.6 m/s。在20种实验配置（共100次运行）中，框架成功率达到92%，实现了稳定的基于阻抗的编队控制，振荡有界且无空中碰撞。
AI.conclusion: ImpedanceDiffusion框架能够实现可靠且自适应的无人机群在杂乱室内环境中的导航，能够处理长远规划、反应式避障和混合障碍物环境下的自适应顺从。

title: PathoScribe: Transforming Pathology Data into a Living Library with a Unified LLM-Driven Framework for Semantic Retrieval and Clinical Integration
summary: Pathology underpins modern diagnosis and cancer care, yet its most valuable asset, the accumulated experience encoded in millions of narrative reports, remains largely inaccessible. Although institutions are rapidly digitizing pathology workflows, storing data without effective mechanisms for retrieval and reasoning risks transforming archives into a passive data repository, where institutional knowledge exists but cannot meaningfully inform patient care. True progress requires not only digitization, but the ability for pathologists to interrogate prior similar cases in real time while evaluating a new diagnostic dilemma. We present PathoScribe, a unified retrieval-augmented large language model (LLM) framework designed to transform static pathology archives into a searchable, reasoning-enabled living library. PathoScribe enables natural language case exploration, automated cohort construction, clinical question answering, immunohistochemistry (IHC) panel recommendation, and prompt-controlled report transformation within a single architecture. Evaluated on 70,000 multi-institutional surgical pathology reports, PathoScribe achieved perfect Recall@10 for natural language case retrieval and demonstrated high-quality retrieval-grounded reasoning (mean reviewer score 4.56/5). Critically, the system operationalized automated cohort construction from free-text eligibility criteria, assembling research-ready cohorts in minutes (mean 9.2 minutes) with 91.3% agreement to human reviewers and no eligible cases incorrectly excluded, representing orders-of-magnitude reductions in time and cost compared to traditional manual chart review. This work establishes a scalable foundation for converting digital pathology archives from passive storage systems into active clinical intelligence platforms.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为 PathoScribe 的框架，它利用大型语言模型（LLM）将静态的病理报告档案转化为可搜索、可推理的知识库，实现了自然语言查询、自动队列构建、临床问答、IHC 方案推荐和报告转换，显著提高了病理信息的可及性和利用效率。
AI.motivation: 现代病理学诊断和癌症治疗依赖于大量积累的病理报告，但这些报告中的经验知识在很大程度上难以获取。将这些数据仅仅数字化而不进行有效的检索和推理，会导致机构知识无法有效指导临床实践。研究的动机是开发一种能够实时检索相似病例并提供推理能力的系统，以将病理档案从被动存储转变为主动的临床情报平台。
AI.method: 研究者提出了一种名为 PathoScribe 的统一的检索增强大型语言模型（LLM）框架。该框架能够支持自然语言的病例探索、自动队列构建、临床问题回答、免疫组化（IHC）方案推荐以及受提示词控制的报告转换。该模型在 70,000 份多机构手术病理报告上进行了评估。
AI.result: 在 70,000 份报告的评估中，PathoScribe 在自然语言病例检索方面达到了完美的 Recall@10。在检索增强的推理方面，平均评审得分达到 4.56/5。该系统能够根据自由文本的纳入标准自动构建研究队列，平均耗时 9.2 分钟，与人工评审者的一致性达到 91.3%，并且没有排除任何符合条件的病例。这表明相比传统手动病历回顾，在时间和成本上实现了数量级的降低。
AI.conclusion: PathoScribe 成功地将静态的数字病理档案转化为动态的、可用于临床推理的智能平台，为将数字病理档案从被动存储系统转变为主动的临床智能平台奠定了可扩展的基础。

title: Beyond Amplitude: Channel State Information Phase-Aware Deep Fusion for Robotic Activity Recognition
comment: Accepted at 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), May 4--8, 2026, Barcelona, Spain
summary: Wi-Fi Channel State Information (CSI) has emerged as a promising non-line-of-sight sensing modality for human and robotic activity recognition. However, prior work has predominantly relied on CSI amplitude while underutilizing phase information, particularly in robotic arm activity recognition. In this paper, we present GateFusion-Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory network (GF-BiLSTM) for WiFi sensing in robotic activity recognition. GF-BiLSTM is a two-stream gated fusion network that encodes amplitude and phase separately and adaptively integrates per-time features through a learned gating mechanism. We systematically evaluate state-of-the-art deep learning models under a Leave-One-Velocity-Out (LOVO) protocol across four input configurations: amplitude only, phase only, amplitude + unwrapped phase, and amplitude + sanitized phase. Experimental results demonstrate that incorporating phase alongside amplitude consistently improves recognition accuracy and cross-speed robustness, with GF-BiLSTM achieving the best performance. To the best of our knowledge, this work provides the first systematic exploration of CSI phase for robotic activity recognition, establishing its critical role in Wi-Fi-based sensing.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为GF-BiLSTM的两流门控融合网络，用于利用Wi-Fi CSI的幅度和相位信息来识别机器人手臂的活动，结果表明相位信息能显著提升识别准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有Wi-Fi感知研究主要依赖CSI幅度，忽视了相位信息，尤其是在机器人手臂活动识别领域。研究旨在探索CSI相位信息在机器人活动识别中的作用，并提出有效利用它的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为GF-BiLSTM的两流门控融合网络。该网络将CSI幅度和相位信息分开编码，并通过学习到的门控机制自适应地融合每时刻的特征。通过幅度和相位（包括解缠相位和修正相位）的不同组合，在Leave-One-Velocity-Out (LOVO)协议下评估了多种深度学习模型。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，将相位信息与幅度信息结合使用，能够持续提高识别准确性和跨速度的鲁棒性。GF-BiLSTM模型在所有评估配置中均取得了最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: CSI相位信息对于Wi-Fi基的机器人活动识别至关重要，能够显著提升识别准确性和鲁棒性。GF-BiLSTM网络能够有效地利用幅度和相位信息，并在机器人活动识别任务中表现出色，为Wi-Fi传感领域提供了新的视角。

title: TaSR-RAG: Taxonomy-guided Structured Reasoning for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) helps large language models (LLMs) answer knowledge-intensive and time-sensitive questions by conditioning generation on external evidence. However, most RAG systems still retrieve unstructured chunks and rely on one-shot generation, which often yields redundant context, low information density, and brittle multi-hop reasoning. While structured RAG pipelines can improve grounding, they typically require costly and error-prone graph construction or impose rigid entity-centric structures that do not align with the query's reasoning chain.
  We propose \textsc{TaSR-RAG}, a taxonomy-guided structured reasoning framework for evidence selection. We represent both queries and documents as relational triples, and constrain entity semantics with a lightweight two-level taxonomy to balance generalization and precision. Given a complex question, \textsc{TaSR-RAG} decomposes it into an ordered sequence of triple sub-queries with explicit latent variables, then performs step-wise evidence selection via hybrid triple matching that combines semantic similarity over raw triples with structural consistency over typed triples.
  By maintaining an explicit entity binding table across steps, \textsc{TaSR-RAG} resolves intermediate variables and reduces entity conflation without explicit graph construction or exhaustive search.
