AI.result: 在 LIBERO 基准测试中，SPR 比 MolmoAct 基线提高了 5%。在具有未见过指令和初始状态的 LIBERO-Plus 基准测试中，SPR 实现了最先进的鲁棒性，性能下降最小，优于 OpenVLA-OFT 和 UniVLA。
AI.conclusion: SPR 框架通过其进度感知能力，实现了无需额外训练数据或辅助模型的鲁棒错误纠正。该框架在各种挑战性任务中表现出卓越的性能和泛化能力，特别是在处理分布外（out-of-distribution）场景时。

title: Rotation Equivariant Mamba for Vision Tasks
summary: Rotation equivariance constitutes one of the most general and crucial structural priors for visual data, yet it remains notably absent from current Mamba-based vision architectures. Despite the success of Mamba in natural language processing and its growing adoption in computer vision, existing visual Mamba models fail to account for rotational symmetry in their design. This omission renders them inherently sensitive to image rotations, thereby constraining their robustness and cross-task generalization. To address this limitation, we propose to incorporate rotation symmetry, a universal and fundamental geometric prior in images, into Mamba-based architectures. Specifically, we introduce EQ-VMamba, the first rotation equivariant visual Mamba architecture for vision tasks. The core components of EQ-VMamba include a carefully designed rotation equivariant cross-scan strategy and group Mamba blocks. Moreover, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis of the intrinsic equivariance error, demonstrating that the proposed architecture enforces end-to-end rotation equivariance throughout the network. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks - including high-level image classification task, mid-level semantic segmentation task, and low-level image super-resolution task - demonstrate that EQ-VMamba achieves superior or competitive performance compared to non-equivariant baselines, while requiring approximately 50% fewer parameters. These results indicate that embedding rotation equivariance not only effectively bolsters the robustness of visual Mamba models against rotation transformations, but also enhances overall performance with significantly improved parameter efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/zhongchenzhao/EQ-VMamba.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EQ-VMamba的新型视觉Mamba架构，通过引入旋转等变性来解决现有Mamba模型对图像旋转敏感的问题，并在图像分类、语义分割和超分辨率等任务上取得了优于或媲美基线模型的性能，同时参数量减少了约50%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Mamba的视觉架构缺乏旋转等变性，导致其对图像旋转敏感，限制了模型的鲁棒性和跨任务泛化能力。引入旋转对称性这一通用的几何先验可以解决此问题。
AI.method: 提出EQ-VMamba架构，其核心包括精心设计的旋转等变交叉扫描策略和群Mamba块。对模型的内禀等变误差进行了理论分析，证明了网络的端到端旋转等变性。
AI.result: 在图像分类、语义分割和超分辨率等多个基准测试中，EQ-VMamba取得了优于或媲美非等变基线模型的性能，并且参数量减少了约50%。
AI.conclusion: 将旋转等变性嵌入视觉Mamba模型，不仅能有效增强模型对旋转变换的鲁棒性，还能显著提高参数效率，从而提升整体性能。

title: CORAL: Scalable Multi-Task Robot Learning via LoRA Experts
summary: Deploying Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models in real-world robotics exposes a core multi-task learning challenge: reconciling task interference in multi-task robotic learning. When multiple tasks are jointly fine-tuned in a single stage, gradients from different tasks can conflict, causing negative transfer and reducing per-task performance. Yet maintaining a separate full checkpoint per task is often storage- and deployment-prohibitive. To address this dilemma, we present CORAL, a backbone- and embodiment-agnostic framework designed primarily to mitigate multi-task interference while remaining naturally extensible to a continuous stream of new tasks. CORAL freezes a single pre-trained VLA backbone and attaches one lightweight Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) expert per task; at runtime, a dynamic inference engine (the CORAL Manager) routes language instructions to the appropriate expert and swaps experts on the fly with zero inference overhead. This strict parameter isolation avoids complex gating networks and prevents parameter-level cross-task interference by construction; as an added capability, it also enables sequentially introducing new tasks without parameter overwriting caused by catastrophic forgetting. We validate CORAL on a real-world Galaxea R1 dual-arm mobile manipulator and three simulation benchmarks (LIBERO, WidowX, Google Robot), where CORAL overcomes fine-grained instructional ambiguity and substantially outperforms joint training, yielding a practical and scalable system for lifelong multi-task robot learning. Website: https://frontierrobo.github.io/CORAL

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CORAL的框架，用于解决多任务机器人学习中的任务干扰问题。CORAL通过冻结预训练的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型主干，并为每个任务附加一个轻量级的LoRA专家，从而实现了参数隔离，有效避免了任务间的冲突，并支持新任务的持续添加。
AI.motivation: 在实际机器人应用中，多任务学习会面临任务干扰问题，导致性能下降。而为每个任务维护独立的模型检查点又会带来存储和部署上的挑战。
AI.method: CORAL框架冻结预训练的VLA主干，并为每个任务分配一个独立的LoRA（Low-Rank Adaptation）专家。运行时，一个名为CORAL Manager的动态推理引擎负责将语言指令路由到相应的专家，并实现专家间的无缝切换，且无推理开销。这种参数隔离机制避免了复杂的门控网络，并防止了参数层面的跨任务干扰，同时也能有效解决灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.result: 在真实机器人（Galaxea R1）和多个模拟环境（LIBERO, WidowX, Google Robot）上进行了验证。CORAL能够处理细粒度的指令歧义，并且性能显著优于联合训练方法。
AI.conclusion: CORAL是一个实用的、可扩展的、支持终身学习的多任务机器人学习系统，能够有效缓解任务干扰，并支持新任务的增量学习。

title: Enhancing Debunking Effectiveness through LLM-based Personality Adaptation
comment: In: Computational Intelligence. IJCCI 2025. Springer, Cham (2026)
summary: This study proposes a novel methodology for generating personalized fake news debunking messages by prompting Large Language Models (LLMs) with persona-based inputs aligned to the Big Five personality traits: Extraversion, Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Neuroticism, and Openness. Our approach guides LLMs to transform generic debunking content into personalized versions tailored to specific personality profiles. To assess the effectiveness of these transformations, we employ a separate LLM as an automated evaluator simulating corresponding personality traits, thereby eliminating the need for costly human evaluation panels. Our results show that personalized messages are generally seen as more persuasive than generic ones. We also find that traits like Openness tend to increase persuadability, while Neuroticism can lower it. Differences between LLM evaluators suggest that using multiple models provides a clearer picture. Overall, this work demonstrates a practical way to create more targeted debunking messages exploiting LLMs, while also raising important ethical questions about how such technology might be used.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种利用大型语言模型（LLM）生成个性化假新闻辟谣信息的方法，通过结合大五人格特质来调整提示。通过LLM模拟人类评估者来评估效果，结果显示个性化信息更具说服力，并探讨了相关伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 为了提高假新闻辟谣信息的说服力，作者希望探索一种能够根据个体人格特质定制辟谣信息的方法。
AI.method: 该研究使用大型语言模型（LLM）根据大五人格特质（外倾性、宜人性、尽责性、神经质和开放性）生成个性化的辟谣信息。同时，利用另一个LLM模拟具有相应人格特质的评估者来评估辟谣信息的有效性，从而避免了昂贵的人工评估。
AI.result: 研究发现，个性化辟谣信息比通用信息更具说服力。开放性人格特质倾向于提高说服力，而神经质人格特质则可能降低说服力。使用多个LLM作为评估者可以提供更全面的评估结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了利用LLM生成个性化辟谣信息的可行性，并强调了这种技术在提高信息传播效果方面的潜力，同时也指出了其潜在的伦理风险。

title: NLiPsCalib: An Efficient Calibration Framework for High-Fidelity 3D Reconstruction of Curved Visuotactile Sensors
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, accepted to 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics & Automation (ICRA 2026)
summary: Recent advances in visuotactile sensors increasingly employ biomimetic curved surfaces to enhance sensorimotor capabilities. Although such curved visuotactile sensors enable more conformal object contact, their perceptual quality is often degraded by non-uniform illumination, which reduces reconstruction accuracy and typically necessitates calibration. Existing calibration methods commonly rely on customized indenters and specialized devices to collect large-scale photometric data, but these processes are expensive and labor-intensive. To overcome these calibration challenges, we present NLiPsCalib, a physics-consistent and efficient calibration framework for curved visuotactile sensors. NLiPsCalib integrates controllable near-field light sources and leverages Near-Light Photometric Stereo (NLiPs) to estimate contact geometry, simplifying calibration to just a few simple contacts with everyday objects. We further introduce NLiPsTac, a controllable-light-source tactile sensor developed to validate our framework. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach enables high-fidelity 3D reconstruction across diverse curved form factors with a simple calibration procedure. We emphasize that our approach lowers the barrier to developing customized visuotactile sensors of diverse geometries, thereby making visuotactile sensing more accessible to the broader community.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 NLiPsCalib 的高效、物理一致的曲面视触觉传感器校准框架，利用近场光源和近光光度立体法，仅需少量日常物体接触即可实现高精度三维重建，降低了视触觉传感器的开发门槛。
AI.motivation: 现有曲面视触觉传感器在非均匀光照下感知质量下降，且传统校准方法成本高、劳动强度大，需要克服这些校准挑战。
AI.method: 提出 NLiPsCalib 框架，集成可控近场光源，利用近光光度立体法（NLiPs）估计接触几何。开发了 NLiPsTac 可控光源触觉传感器进行验证。
AI.result: NLiPsCalib 框架能够在各种曲面形状下实现高保真三维重建，校准过程简单。
AI.conclusion: NLiPsCalib 框架简化了曲面视触觉传感器的校准过程，提高了其精度，降低了开发定制化视触觉传感器的门槛，使视触觉感知更加普及。

title: EPIC-EuroParl-UdS: Information-Theoretic Perspectives on Translation and Interpreting
comment: 16 pages with appendices, 8 figures to be published in LREC-2026 main conference proceedings
summary: This paper introduces an updated and combined version of the bidirectional English-German EPIC-UdS (spoken) and EuroParl-UdS (written) corpora containing original European Parliament speeches as well as their translations and interpretations. The new version corrects metadata and text errors identified through previous use, refines the content, updates linguistic annotations, and adds new layers, including word alignment and word-level surprisal indices. The combined resource is designed to support research using information-theoretic approaches to language variation, particularly studies comparing written and spoken modes, and examining disfluencies in speech, as well as traditional translationese studies, including parallel (source vs. target) and comparable (original vs. translated) analyses. The paper outlines the updates introduced in this release, summarises previous results based on the corpus, and presents a new illustrative study. The study validates the integrity of the rebuilt spoken data and evaluates probabilistic measures derived from base and fine-tuned GPT-2 and machine translation models on the task of filler particles prediction in interpreting.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个更新并合并的英德语双语语料库EPIC-UdS和EuroParl-UdS，其中包含了欧洲议会的演讲及其翻译和口译。新版本纠正了错误，更新了语言标注，并增加了词对齐和词语惊奇度等新层级。该语料库旨在支持信息论方法在语言变异研究中的应用，特别是关于书面和口语模式对比、语音中的不流畅现象以及翻译风格的研究。此外，本文还概述了更新内容，总结了基于该语料库的先前研究成果，并展示了一项新的插图研究，该研究验证了重建口语数据的完整性，并评估了不同GPT-2和机器翻译模型在填充语预测任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 研究者希望通过更新和合并现有的英德语语料库，创建一个更完善的资源，以支持信息论方法在语言变异研究中的应用，并促进对口语与书面语对比、语音不流畅现象以及翻译风格的研究。同时，也为评估不同模型在特定语言任务（如填充语预测）上的性能提供基础。
AI.method: 本文通过纠正元数据和文本错误、优化内容、更新语言标注、增加词对齐和词语惊奇度等新层级来更新和合并EPIC-UdS和EuroParl-UdS语料库。然后，通过一项插图研究来验证重建的口语数据的完整性，并使用基于和微调的GPT-2以及机器翻译模型来评估它们在填充语预测任务上的性能。
AI.result: 更新后的语料库纠正了先前版本中的错误，并增加了有价值的新层级，如词对齐和词语惊奇度。插图研究验证了口语数据的完整性，并表明不同GPT-2和机器翻译模型在填充语预测任务上具有一定的评估能力。
AI.conclusion: 更新和合并后的EPIC-UdS和EuroParl-UdS语料库为语言变异研究提供了更强大的资源。研究表明，通过信息论方法和对不同模型的评估，可以更好地理解语言现象，如口语中的填充语。

title: Agentic AI as a Network Control-Plane Intelligence Layer for Federated Learning over 6G
summary: The shift toward user-customized on-device learning places new demands on wireless systems: models must be trained on diverse, distributed data while meeting strict latency, bandwidth, and reliability constraints. To address this, we propose an Agentic AI as the control layer for managing federated learning (FL) over 6G networks, which translates high-level task goals into actions that are aware of network conditions. Rather than simply viewing FL as a learning challenge, our system sees it as a combined task of learning and network management. A set of specialized agents focused on retrieval, planning, coding, and evaluation utilizes monitoring tools and optimization methods to handle client selection, incentive structuring, scheduling, resource allocation, adaptive local training, and code generation. The use of closed-loop evaluation and memory allows the system to consistently refine its decisions, taking into account varying signal-to-noise ratios, bandwidth conditions, and device capabilities. Finally, our case study has demonstrated the effectiveness of the Agentic AI system's use of tools for achieving high performance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Agentic AI的联邦学习（FL）管理系统，用于在6G网络中处理用户定制的设备端学习，该系统能够感知网络状况并优化学习过程。
AI.motivation: 用户定制的设备端学习对无线系统提出了新的要求，需要在满足严格的延迟、带宽和可靠性限制的同时，在分布式数据上训练模型。
AI.method: 构建了一个Agentic AI控制层，用于管理6G网络中的联邦学习。该系统包含检索、规划、编码和评估等专业代理，利用监控工具和优化方法来处理客户端选择、激励结构、调度、资源分配、自适应本地训练和代码生成。系统使用闭环评估和记忆来不断优化决策，考虑了信号噪声比、带宽条件和设备能力等因素。
AI.result: 通过案例研究证明了Agentic AI系统使用工具实现高性能的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Agentic AI可以作为一种有效的控制层，用于管理6G网络中的联邦学习，能够动态适应网络条件并优化学习过程，以满足用户定制的学习需求。

title: One-Eval: An Agentic System for Automated and Traceable LLM Evaluation
summary: Reliable evaluation is essential for developing and deploying large language models, yet in practice it often requires substantial manual effort: practitioners must identify appropriate benchmarks, reproduce heterogeneous evaluation codebases, configure dataset schema mappings, and interpret aggregated metrics. To address these challenges, we present One-Eval, an agentic evaluation system that converts natural-language evaluation requests into executable, traceable, and customizable evaluation workflows. One-Eval integrates (i) NL2Bench for intent structuring and personalized benchmark planning, (ii) BenchResolve for benchmark resolution, automatic dataset acquisition, and schema normalization to ensure executability, and (iii) Metrics \& Reporting for task-aware metric selection and decision-oriented reporting beyond scalar scores. The system further incorporates human-in-the-loop checkpoints for review, editing, and rollback, while preserving sample evidence trails for debugging and auditability. Experiments show that One-Eval can execute end-to-end evaluations from diverse natural-language requests with minimal user effort, supporting more efficient and reproducible evaluation in industrial settings. Our framework is publicly available at https://github.com/OpenDCAI/One-Eval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 One-Eval 的智能评估系统，该系统可以将自然语言评估请求转换为可执行、可追溯和可定制的评估工作流，从而简化大型语言模型的评估过程。
AI.motivation: 现有的语言模型评估方法通常需要大量的人工操作，包括选择基准测试、处理不同的评估代码库、映射数据集模式以及解读指标，这效率低下且难以复现。因此，需要一个更智能、更自动化的评估系统。
AI.method: One-Eval 系统包含三个主要组件：1. NL2Bench：用于解析自然语言请求，构建意图结构和规划评估计划。2. BenchResolve：负责解析基准测试、自动获取数据集、标准化模式，以确保评估的可执行性。3. Metrics & Reporting：根据任务选择合适的指标，并提供超越单一分数的、面向决策的报告。该系统还支持人机协作检查点，用于审查、编辑和回滚，并保留证据链以供调试和审计。
AI.result: 实验表明，One-Eval 能够根据各种自然语言评估请求，以极少的人工干预执行端到端的评估，提高了工业环境中评估的效率和可复现性。
AI.conclusion: One-Eval 系统能够有效地将自然语言评估请求转化为可执行的工作流，显著降低了大型语言模型评估的人工成本和复杂性，为更高效、更可复现的评估提供了解决方案。

title: RTFDNet: Fusion-Decoupling for Robust RGB-T Segmentation
summary: RGB-Thermal (RGB-T) semantic segmentation is essential for robotic systems operating in low-light or dark environments. However, traditional approaches often overemphasize modality balance, resulting in limited robustness and severe performance degradation when sensor signals are partially missing. Recent advances such as cross-modal knowledge distillation and modality-adaptive fine-tuning attempt to enhance cross-modal interaction, but they typically decouple modality fusion and modality adaptation, requiring multi-stage training with frozen models or teacher-student frameworks. We present RTFDNet, a three-branch encoder-decoder that unifies fusion and decoupling for robust RGB-T segmentation. Synergistic Feature Fusion (SFF) performs channel-wise gated exchange and lightweight spatial attention to inject complementary cues. Cross-Modal Decouple Regularization (CMDR) isolates modality-specific components from the fused representation and supervises unimodal decoders via stop-gradient targets. Region Decouple Regularization (RDR) enforces class-selective prediction consistency in confident regions while blocking gradients to the fusion branch. This feedback loop strengthens unimodal paths without degrading the fused stream, enabling efficient standalone inference at test time. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of RTFDNet, showing consistent performance across varying modality conditions. Our implementation will be released to facilitate further research. Our source code are publicly available at https://github.com/curapima/RTFDNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RTFDNet的RGB-Thermal（RGB-T）语义分割网络，该网络通过联合特征融合（SFF）和跨模态解耦正则化（CMDR）以及区域解耦正则化（RDR）来实现RGB-T分割的鲁棒性，即使在传感器信号缺失的情况下也能保持良好性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的RGB-T语义分割方法在处理传感器信号缺失时鲁棒性不足，性能下降严重。现有的方法通常将模态融合与模态自适应分离开，需要多阶段训练，效率低下。
AI.method: RTFDNet采用一个三分支的编码器-解码器结构，其中：1. 协同特征融合（SFF）通过通道门控交换和轻量级空间注意力来融合互补信息。2. 跨模态解耦正则化（CMDR）将融合表示中的模态特异性组件分离，并通过stop-gradient目标来监督单模态解码器。3. 区域解耦正则化（RDR）在置信区域强制执行类别选择性预测一致性，同时阻止梯度流向融合分支。
AI.result: RTFDNet在各种模态条件下都能保持一致的性能，证明了其在RGB-T语义分割中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RTFDNet通过统一融合和解耦，实现了鲁棒的RGB-T语义分割，克服了传统方法的局限性，并能够在测试时进行高效的独立推理。

title: Chow-Liu Ordering for Long-Context Reasoning in Chain-of-Agents
comment: Published as a workshop paper at ICLR 2026 Workshop MemAgents
summary:
Sequential multi-agent reasoning frameworks such as Chain-of-Agents (CoA) handle long-context queries by decomposing inputs into chunks and processing them sequentially using LLM-based worker agents that read from and update a bounded shared memory. From a probabilistic perspective, CoA aims to approximate the conditional distribution corresponding to a model capable of jointly reasoning over the entire long context. CoA achieves this through a latent-state factorization in which only bounded summaries of previously processed evidence are passed between agents. The resulting bounded-memory approximation introduces a lossy information bottleneck, making the final evidence state inherently dependent on the order in which chunks are processed.
  In this work, we study the problem of chunk ordering for long-context reasoning. We use the well-known Chow-Liu trees to learn a dependency structure that prioritizes strongly related chunks. Empirically, we show that a breadth-first traversal of the resulting tree yields chunk orderings that reduce information loss across agents and consistently outperform both default document-chunk ordering and semantic score-based ordering in answer relevance and exact-match accuracy across three long-context benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了长上下文多智能体推理中的分块顺序问题，提出使用Chow-Liu树学习依赖关系，并采用广度优先遍历生成最优分块顺序，以减少信息丢失并提升推理准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的顺序多智能体推理框架（如CoA）在处理长上下文时存在信息瓶颈，导致最终结果依赖于分块的处理顺序，影响了推理的有效性。
AI.method: 利用Chow-Liu树学习分块之间的依赖关系，并通过广度优先遍历来确定最优的分块处理顺序。
AI.result: 与默认顺序和基于语义分数的顺序相比，提出的广度优先遍历顺序在信息损失方面有所减少，并在答案相关性和精确匹配准确性上取得了更好的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习分块依赖关系并采用广度优先遍历，可以优化长上下文多智能体推理中的分块顺序，从而提高推理的准确性。

title: Context Engineering: From Prompts to Corporate Multi-Agent Architecture
summary: As artificial intelligence (AI) systems evolve from stateless chatbots to autonomous multi-step agents, prompt engineering (PE), the discipline of crafting individual queries, proves necessary but insufficient. This paper introduces context engineering (CE) as a standalone discipline concerned with designing, structuring, and managing the entire informational environment in which an AI agent makes decisions. Drawing on vendor architectures (Google ADK, Anthropic, LangChain), current academic work (ACE framework, Google DeepMind's intelligent delegation), enterprise research (Deloitte, 2026; KPMG, 2026), and the author's experience building a multi-agent system, the paper proposes five context quality criteria: relevance, sufficiency, isolation, economy, and provenance, and frames context as the agent's operating system. Two higher-order disciplines follow. Intent engineering (IE) encodes organizational goals, values, and trade-off hierarchies into agent infrastructure. Specification engineering (SE) creates a machine-readable corpus of corporate policies and standards enabling autonomous operation of multi-agent systems at scale. Together these four disciplines form a cumulative pyramid maturity model of agent engineering, in which each level subsumes the previous one as a necessary foundation. Enterprise data reveals a gap: while 75% of enterprises plan agentic AI deployment within two years (Deloitte, 2026), deployment has surged and retreated as organizations confront scaling complexity (KPMG, 2026). The Klarna case illustrates a dual deficit, contextual and intentional. Whoever controls the agent's context controls its behavior; whoever controls its intent controls its strategy; whoever controls its specifications controls its scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了上下文工程（CE）作为一种独立于提示工程（PE）的新兴学科，用于管理AI代理的决策信息环境。CE包含五个质量标准（相关性、充分性、隔离性、经济性和溯源性），并被视为代理的“操作系统”。结合意图工程（IE）和规范工程（SE），作者构建了一个分层的代理工程成熟度模型。该模型旨在解决当前企业在部署自主AI代理时面临的规模化复杂性问题，并以Klarna案例说明了上下文和意图的重要性。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统向多步自主代理发展，传统的提示工程已不足以应对复杂的决策环境。企业在部署自主AI代理时面临规模化挑战，急需新的工程化方法来管理AI的决策环境、组织目标和操作规范。
AI.method: 本文通过借鉴供应商架构（Google ADK, Anthropic, LangChain）、学术研究（ACE框架, Google DeepMind）、企业调研（Deloitte, KPMG）以及作者构建多代理系统的经验，提出了上下文工程（CE）的概念，并定义了五个上下文质量标准：相关性、充分性、隔离性、经济性和溯源性。在此基础上，作者构建了一个包含提示工程（PE）、上下文工程（CE）、意图工程（IE）和规范工程（SE）的四层代理工程成熟度模型。
AI.result: 提出了上下文工程（CE）作为AI代理工程的关键组成部分，并定义了五个质量标准。构建了一个包含PE、CE、IE、SE的代理工程成熟度模型。指出企业在部署自主AI代理时存在上下文和意图方面的双重不足，并强调了控制上下文、意图和规范在AI代理行为、策略和规模化中的核心作用。
AI.conclusion: 上下文工程（CE）与意图工程（IE）和规范工程（SE）共同构成了代理工程（AE）的完整框架，是实现大规模、自主AI代理部署的关键。企业需要关注代理的上下文、意图和规范，以克服部署中的挑战并实现AI的最大价值。

title: Vision-Augmented On-Track System Identification for Autonomous Racing via Attention-Based Priors and Iterative Neural Correction
summary: Operating autonomous vehicles at the absolute limits of handling requires precise, real-time identification of highly non-linear tire dynamics. However, traditional online optimization methods suffer from "cold-start" initialization failures and struggle to model high-frequency transient dynamics. To address these bottlenecks, this paper proposes a novel vision-augmented, iterative system identification framework. First, a lightweight CNN (MobileNetV3) translates visual road textures into a continuous heuristic friction prior, providing a robust "warm-start" for parameter optimization. Next, a S4 model captures complex temporal dynamic residuals, circumventing the memory and latency limitations of traditional MLPs and RNNs. Finally, a derivative-free Nelder-Mead algorithm iteratively extracts physically interpretable Pacejka tire parameters via a hybrid virtual simulation. Co-simulation in CarSim demonstrates that the lightweight vision backbone reduces friction estimation error by 76.1 using 85 fewer FLOPs, accelerating cold-start convergence by 71.4. Furthermore, the S4-augmented framework improves parameter extraction accuracy and decreases lateral force RMSE by over 60 by effectively capturing complex vehicle dynamics, demonstrating superior performance compared to conventional neural architectures.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合视觉信息和S4模型的迭代系统辨识框架，用于精确识别车辆极限操控下的非线性轮胎动力学，解决了传统方法的冷启动问题和高频动态建模困难。
AI.motivation: 传统在线优化方法在识别高度非线性的轮胎动力学时存在“冷启动”初始化失败和难以建模高频瞬态动力学的问题，阻碍了自动驾驶车辆在极限操控下的运行。
AI.method: 1. 使用轻量级CNN（MobileNetV3）将视觉路面纹理转换为连续的启发式摩擦先验，为参数优化提供鲁棒的“预热启动”。 2. 使用S4模型捕捉复杂的时序动态残差，克服MLP和RNN的内存和延迟限制。 3. 通过无导数的Nelder-Mead算法，利用混合虚拟仿真迭代提取物理可解释的Pacejka轮胎参数。
AI.result: 与传统方法相比，轻量级视觉骨干网络将摩擦估计误差减少了76.1%，计算量减少了85%，冷启动收敛速度提高了71.4%。S4增强框架提高了参数提取精度，并将横向力RMSE降低了60%以上，有效捕捉了复杂的车辆动力学。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的视觉增强、迭代系统辨识框架能够有效解决传统方法的不足，在自动驾驶车辆的极限操控中实现精确、实时的非线性轮胎动力学识别，具有优越的性能。

title: PRECEPT: Planning Resilience via Experience, Context Engineering & Probing Trajectories A Unified Framework for Test-Time Adaptation with Compositional Rule Learning and Pareto-Guided Prompt Evolution
comment: 50 pages, 14 figures. Code and reproducibility resources: https://github.com/arash-shahmansoori/precept-framework
summary:
LLM agents that store knowledge as natural language suffer steep retrieval degradation as condition count grows, often struggle to compose learned rules reliably, and typically lack explicit mechanisms to detect stale or adversarial knowledge. We introduce PRECEPT, a unified framework for test-time adaptation with three tightly coupled components: (1) deterministic exact-match rule retrieval over structured condition keys, (2) conflict-aware memory with Bayesian source reliability and threshold-based rule invalidation, and (3) COMPASS, a Pareto-guided prompt-evolution outer loop. Exact retrieval eliminates partial-match interpretation errors on the deterministic path (0% by construction, vs 94.4% under Theorem~B.6's independence model at N=10) and supports compositional stacking through a semantic tier hierarchy; conflict-aware memory resolves static--dynamic disagreements and supports drift adaptation; COMPASS evaluates prompts through the same end-to-end execution pipeline.
  Results (9--10 seeds): PRECEPT achieves a +41.1pp first-try advantage over Full Reflexion (d>1.9), +33.3pp compositional generalization (d=1.55), 100% $P_1$ on 2-way logistics compositions (d=2.64), +40--55pp continuous learning gains, strong eventual robustness under adversarial static knowledge (100% logistics with adversarial SK active; partial recovery on integration), +55.0pp drift recovery (d=0.95, p=0.031), and 61% fewer steps. Core comparisons are statistically significant, often at p<0.001.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 PRECEPT 的新框架，用于提高大型语言模型（LLM）代理在知识检索、规则组合和知识时效性方面的性能。PRECEPT 通过精确匹配规则检索、冲突感知记忆和帕累托最优的提示演化来实现这些目标，并在多项任务中取得了显著的改进。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 代理在知识检索、规则组合和检测过时或对抗性知识方面存在严重问题，尤其是在条件数量增加时。作者希望解决这些局限性。
AI.method: PRECEPT 框架包含三个组件：1. 确定性的精确匹配规则检索，基于结构化的条件键。2. 冲突感知记忆，结合了贝叶斯源可靠性和基于阈值的规则失效机制。3. COMPASS，一个帕累托最优引导的提示演化外部循环。
AI.result: PRECEPT 在多个评估指标上表现出色：在首次尝试时，相比 Full Reflexion 提高了 41.1 个百分点；在组合泛化方面提高了 33.3 个百分点；在两路逻辑组合上达到了 100% 的 $P_1$；在连续学习方面提高了 40-55 个百分点；在对抗性静态知识下具有鲁棒性；在漂移恢复方面提高了 55.0 个百分点；并减少了 61% 的步骤。大部分比较结果具有统计学意义。
AI.conclusion: PRECEPT 框架通过其集成的精确检索、冲突感知记忆和提示演化机制，有效地解决了 LLM 代理在知识管理和可靠性方面的挑战，并在多项评估中取得了显著的性能提升。

title: MiniAppBench: Evaluating the Shift from Text to Interactive HTML Responses in LLM-Powered Assistants
summary: With the rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) in code generation, human-AI interaction is evolving from static text responses to dynamic, interactive HTML-based applications, which we term MiniApps. These applications require models to not only render visual interfaces but also construct customized interaction logic that adheres to real-world principles. However, existing benchmarks primarily focus on algorithmic correctness or static layout reconstruction, failing to capture the capabilities required for this new paradigm. To address this gap, we introduce MiniAppBench, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate principle-driven, interactive application generation. Sourced from a real-world application with 10M+ generations, MiniAppBench distills 500 tasks across six domains (e.g., Games, Science, and Tools). Furthermore, to tackle the challenge of evaluating open-ended interactions where no single ground truth exists, we propose MiniAppEval, an agentic evaluation framework. Leveraging browser automation, it performs human-like exploratory testing to systematically assess applications across three dimensions: Intention, Static, and Dynamic. Our experiments reveal that current LLMs still face significant challenges in generating high-quality MiniApps, while MiniAppEval demonstrates high alignment with human judgment, establishing a reliable standard for future research. Our code is available in github.com/MiniAppBench.

AI.tldr: 提出MiniAppBench基准和MiniAppEval评估框架，以评估大型语言模型生成交互式HTML应用（MiniApps）的能力，并发现现有模型在该领域仍有待提高。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成基准无法评估大型语言模型在生成遵循真实世界原理的交互式HTML应用（MiniApps）方面的能力，而这种能力在人机交互新范式中至关重要。
AI.method: 构建MiniAppBench基准，包含500个来自真实世界应用的交互式任务；设计MiniAppEval代理评估框架，利用浏览器自动化进行探索性测试，从意图、静态和动态三个维度评估MiniApps。
AI.result: 当前的大型语言模型在生成高质量MiniApps方面仍面临显著挑战；MiniAppEval评估框架与人类判断高度一致，为未来研究提供了可靠标准。
AI.conclusion: MiniAppBench和MiniAppEval是评估和推动大型语言模型在交互式Web应用生成领域发展的重要工具，表明该领域仍有巨大的改进空间。

title: From Flow to One Step: Real-Time Multi-Modal Trajectory Policies via Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation-based Distribution Distillation
summary: Generative policies based on diffusion and flow matching achieve strong performance in robotic manipulation by modeling multi-modal human demonstrations. However, their reliance on iterative Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE) integration introduces substantial latency, limiting high-frequency closed-loop control. Recent single-step acceleration methods alleviate this overhead but often exhibit distributional collapse, producing averaged trajectories that fail to execute coherent manipulation strategies. We propose a framework that distills a Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) expert into a fast single-step student via Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (IMLE). A bi-directional Chamfer distance provides a set-level objective that promotes both mode coverage and fidelity, enabling preservation of the teacher multi-modal action distribution in a single forward pass. A unified perception encoder further integrates multi-view RGB, depth, point clouds, and proprioception into a geometry-aware representation. The resulting high-frequency control supports real-time receding-horizon re-planning and improved robustness under dynamic disturbances.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于隐式最大似然估计（IMLE）的方法，将复杂的条件流匹配（CFM）生成模型提炼成一个单步推理的快速学生模型，通过双向Chamfer距离保留了专家模型的多模态动作分布，并结合多模态感知编码器，实现了高频机器人控制，支持实时再规划和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于扩散和流匹配的生成策略在机器人操作方面表现出色，但其迭代ODE积分带来了显著的延迟，限制了高频闭环控制。单步加速方法虽然解决了延迟问题，但常导致分布崩溃，生成平均轨迹，无法执行连贯的操作策略。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种将条件流匹配（CFM）专家模型通过隐式最大似然估计（IMLE）提炼成单步学生模型的方法。利用双向Chamfer距离作为集合级目标，以保证模式覆盖和保真度，从而在单次前向传播中保留教师的多模态动作分布。一个统一的感知编码器进一步融合了多视图RGB、深度、点云和本体感受信息，生成几何感知表示。
AI.result: 通过这种方法，实现了高频控制，能够支持实时后视再规划，并在动态干扰下提高了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功地将高性能的生成策略加速到单步推理，有效解决了现有方法的延迟和分布崩溃问题，为实现更高频、更鲁棒的机器人控制提供了新的解决方案。

title: RubiCap: Rubric-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Dense Image Captioning
summary: Dense image captioning is critical for cross-modal alignment in vision-language pretraining and text-to-image generation, but scaling expert-quality annotations is prohibitively expensive. While synthetic captioning via strong vision-language models (VLMs) is a practical alternative, supervised distillation often yields limited output diversity and weak generalization. Reinforcement learning (RL) could overcome these limitations, but its successes have so far been concentrated in verifiable domains that rely on deterministic checkers -- a luxury not available in open-ended captioning. We address this bottleneck with RubiCap, a novel RL framework that derives fine-grained, sample-specific reward signals from LLM-written rubrics. RubiCap first assembles a diverse committee of candidate captions, then employs an LLM rubric writer to extract consensus strengths and diagnose deficiencies in the current policy. These insights are converted into explicit evaluation criteria, enabling an LLM judge to decompose holistic quality assessment and replace coarse scalar rewards with structured, multi-faceted evaluations. Across extensive benchmarks, RubiCap achieves the highest win rates on CapArena, outperforming supervised distillation, prior RL methods, human-expert annotations, and GPT-4V-augmented outputs. On CaptionQA, it demonstrates superior word efficiency: our 7B model matches Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct, and our 3B model surpasses its 7B counterpart. Remarkably, using the compact RubiCap-3B as a captioner produces stronger pretrained VLMs than those trained on captions from proprietary models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RubiCap，一个基于强化学习的新框架，利用大型语言模型（LLM）生成的评分标准来解决图像描述生成中的奖励信号稀疏问题，显著提升了描述的多样性和质量，并在多项基准测试中超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的大规模图像描述标注成本高昂，而通过监督学习蒸馏的方法生成的描述多样性有限且泛化能力弱。传统的强化学习方法依赖于可验证的确定性检查器，这在开放式的图像描述生成任务中不可行。
AI.method: RubiCap首先生成一个候选描述委员会，然后利用LLM根据这些候选描述生成包含优点和缺点的评分标准。这些评分标准被转化为明确的评估标准，LLM裁判基于此进行多方面评估，取代了单一的标量奖励。最终，这些细粒度的、样本特定的奖励信号用于指导强化学习模型的训练。
AI.result: RubiCap在CapArena上获得了最高的胜率，优于监督蒸馏、先前RL方法、人类专家标注和GPT-4V增强的输出。在CaptionQA任务上，RubiCap展示了更高的词汇效率，其7B模型性能与Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct相当，3B模型甚至超越了后者的7B版本。此外，使用RubiCap-3B作为描述生成器预训练的VLM性能优于使用专有模型生成的描述训练的VLM。
AI.conclusion: RubiCap框架通过引入LLM生成的评分标准，有效地解决了图像描述生成中的奖励信号稀疏问题，实现了高质量、多样化且高效的描述生成，并在多项下游任务中展现出优越性能，为预训练VLM提供了一种新的途径。

title: N-gram-like Language Models Predict Reading Time Best
summary: Recent work has found that contemporary language models such as transformers can become so good at next-word prediction that the probabilities they calculate become worse for predicting reading time. In this paper, we propose that this can be explained by reading time being sensitive to simple n-gram statistics rather than the more complex statistics learned by state-of-the-art transformer language models. We demonstrate that the neural language models whose predictions are most correlated with n-gram probability are also those that calculate probabilities that are the most correlated with eye-tracking-based metrics of reading time on naturalistic text.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，语言模型在预测下一个词时过于复杂，反而影响了对阅读时间的准确预测。简单n-gram统计模型比复杂的Transformer模型更能反映阅读时间。
AI.motivation: 发现当代语言模型（如Transformer）在预测下一个词时表现优异，但其计算出的概率却不适用于预测阅读时间。研究者推测这是因为阅读时间对更简单的n-gram统计信息敏感，而非Transformer模型学习到的复杂统计信息。
AI.method: 通过比较不同神经网络语言模型的预测概率与n-gram概率的相关性，并进一步分析哪种模型的预测概率与基于眼动追踪的阅读时间指标相关性最高。
AI.result: 发现与n-gram概率最相关的神经网络语言模型，其预测概率与眼动追踪的阅读时间指标的相关性也最高。
AI.conclusion: 阅读时间对简单的n-gram统计信息比现代Transformer语言模型所学习到的复杂统计信息更敏感。Transformer模型过于关注下一个词的预测，忽略了对阅读时间更重要的简单统计模式。

title: Logics-Parsing-Omni Technical Report
summary: Addressing the challenges of fragmented task definitions and the heterogeneity of unstructured data in multimodal parsing, this paper proposes the Omni Parsing framework. This framework establishes a Unified Taxonomy covering documents, images, and audio-visual streams, introducing a progressive parsing paradigm that bridges perception and cognition. Specifically, the framework integrates three hierarchical levels: 1) Holistic Detection, which achieves precise spatial-temporal grounding of objects or events to establish a geometric baseline for perception; 2) Fine-grained Recognition, which performs symbolization (e.g., OCR/ASR) and attribute extraction on localized objects to complete structured entity parsing; and 3) Multi-level Interpreting, which constructs a reasoning chain from local semantics to global logic. A pivotal advantage of this framework is its evidence anchoring mechanism, which enforces a strict alignment between high-level semantic descriptions and low-level facts. This enables ``evidence-based'' logical induction, transforming unstructured signals into standardized knowledge that is locatable, enumerable, and traceable. Building on this foundation, we constructed a standardized dataset and released the Logics-Parsing-Omni model, which successfully converts complex audio-visual signals into machine-readable structured knowledge. Experiments demonstrate that fine-grained perception and high-level cognition are synergistic, effectively enhancing model reliability. Furthermore, to quantitatively evaluate these capabilities, we introduce OmniParsingBench. Code, models and the benchmark are released at https://github.com/alibaba/Logics-Parsing/tree/master/Logics-Parsing-Omni.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Omni Parsing框架，用于解决多模态解析中任务定义碎片化和数据异构性问题。该框架通过统一的分类体系和渐进式解析范式，整合了感知和认知过程，实现了从非结构化信号到机器可读的结构化知识的转换，并发布了相关模型、数据集和评估基准。
AI.motivation: 多模态解析面临任务定义碎片化和非结构化数据异构性的挑战。
AI.method: 提出了Omni Parsing框架，包含统一分类体系、渐进式解析范式。该范式分为三个层次：1) 整体检测（Holistic Detection），实现时空定位；2) 细粒度识别（Fine-grained Recognition），进行符号化和属性提取；3) 多层次解读（Multi-level Interpreting），构建推理链。框架引入证据锚定机制，确保高层语义描述与低层事实的对齐。
AI.result: 构建了标准化数据集，发布了Logics-Parsing-Omni模型，成功将音频-视觉信号转换为机器可读的结构化知识。实验证明细粒度感知和高层认知具有协同效应，提高了模型可靠性。引入了OmniParsingBench进行量化评估。
AI.conclusion: Omni Parsing框架通过整合感知和认知，实现了将非结构化多模态信号转化为标准化、可定位、可枚举、可追溯的结构化知识。细粒度感知与高层认知协同工作能有效提升模型性能和可靠性。

title: Stein Variational Ergodic Surface Coverage with SE(3) Constraints
summary: Surface manipulation tasks require robots to generate trajectories that comprehensively cover complex 3D surfaces while maintaining precise end-effector poses. Existing ergodic trajectory optimization (TO) methods demonstrate success in coverage tasks, while struggling with point-cloud targets due to the nonconvex optimization landscapes and the inadequate handling of SE(3) constraints in sampling-as-optimization (SAO) techniques. In this work, we introduce a preconditioned SE(3) Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD) approach for SAO ergodic trajectory generation. Our proposed approach comprises multiple innovations. First, we reformulate point-cloud ergodic coverage as a manifold-aware sampling problem. Second, we derive SE(3)-specific SVGD particle updates, and, third, we develop a preconditioner to accelerate TO convergence. Our sampling-based framework consistently identifies superior local optima compared to strong optimization-based and SAO baselines while preserving the SE(3) geometric structure. Experiments on a 3D point-cloud surface coverage benchmark and robotic surface drawing tasks demonstrate that our method achieves superior coverage quality with tractable computation in our setting relative to existing TO and SAO approaches, and is validated in real-world robot experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预处理 SE(3) Stein 变分梯度下降 (SVGD) 的采样优化 (SAO) 方法，用于在复杂 3D 表面上进行遍历轨迹生成，解决了现有方法在点云目标上的非凸优化和 SE(3) 约束处理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有遍历轨迹优化方法在处理具有非凸优化景观的点云目标时，以及在采样优化技术中未能充分处理 SE(3) 约束时存在不足。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种预处理 SE(3) SVGD 方法，将点云遍历覆盖重构为流形感知采样问题，推导了 SE(3) 特定的 SVGD 粒子更新，并开发了一个预处理器来加速轨迹优化收敛。
AI.result: 与基于优化的和 SAO 的基线方法相比，本文提出的方法在局部最优解的识别上表现更优，同时保持了 SE(3) 的几何结构。在 3D 点云表面覆盖和机器人绘图任务上的实验表明，该方法在计算可行性的前提下，取得了优于现有轨迹优化和 SAO 方法的覆盖质量。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的预处理 SE(3) SVGD 方法为解决点云表面遍历覆盖问题提供了一种有效的采样优化框架，并在模拟和真实机器人实验中得到了验证。

title: SEA-Nav: Efficient Policy Learning for Safe and Agile Quadruped Navigation in Cluttered Environments
summary: Efficiently training quadruped robot navigation in densely cluttered environments remains a significant challenge. Existing methods are either limited by a lack of safety and agility in simple obstacle distributions or suffer from slow locomotion in complex environments, often requiring excessively long training phases. To this end, we propose SEA-Nav (Safe, Efficient, and Agile Navigation), a reinforcement learning framework for quadruped navigation. Within diverse and dense obstacle environments, a differentiable control barrier function (CBF)-based shield constraints the navigation policy to output safe velocity commands. An adaptive collision replay mechanism and hazardous exploration rewards are introduced to increase the probability of learning from critical experiences, guiding efficient exploration and exploitation. Finally, kinematic action constraints are incorporated to ensure safe velocity commands, facilitating successful physical deployment. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first approach that achieves highly challenging quadruped navigation in the real world with minute-level training time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SEA-Nav，一个用于四足机器人导航的强化学习框架，通过可微分的控制屏障函数（CBF）提供安全保障，结合自适应碰撞回放机制和危险探索奖励，以及运动学约束，实现了在密集障碍环境下的高效、安全和敏捷的导航，并且训练时间极短。
AI.motivation: 现有四足机器人导航方法在密集障碍环境中面临安全性和敏捷性不足或移动速度慢的问题，并且训练时间过长。
AI.method: 提出SEA-Nav框架，该框架包含：1. 基于可微分CBF的保护机制，限制导航策略输出安全的指令；2. 自适应碰撞回放机制和危险探索奖励，增强从关键经验中学习；3. 运动学动作约束，确保输出的指令安全。
AI.result: SEA-Nav在多样且密集的障碍环境中实现了高效、安全和敏捷的四足机器人导航，并且在现实世界中实现了分钟级的训练时间。
AI.conclusion: SEA-Nav是首个能够在真实世界中实现极具挑战性的四足机器人导航，并且训练时间极短的方法。

title: Progressive Split Mamba: Effective State Space Modelling for Image Restoration
summary: Image restoration requires simultaneously preserving fine-grained local structures and maintaining long-range spatial coherence. While convolutional networks struggle with limited receptive fields, and Transformers incur quadratic complexity for global attention, recent State Space Models (SSMs), such as Mamba, provide an appealing linear-time alternative for long-range dependency modelling. However, naively extending Mamba to 2D images exposes two intrinsic shortcomings. First, flattening 2D feature maps into 1D sequences disrupts spatial topology, leading to locality distortion that hampers precise structural recovery. Second, the stability-driven recurrent dynamics of SSMs induce long-range decay, progressively attenuating information across distant spatial positions and weakening global consistency. Together, these effects limit the effectiveness of state-space modelling in high-fidelity restoration. We propose Progressive Split-Mamba (PS-Mamba), a topology-aware hierarchical state-space framework designed to reconcile locality preservation with efficient global propagation. Instead of sequentially flattening entire feature maps, PS-Mamba performs geometry-consistent partitioning, maintaining neighbourhood integrity prior to state-space processing. A progressive split hierarchy (halves, quadrants, octants) enables structured multi-scale modelling while retaining linear complexity. To counteract long-range decay, we introduce symmetric cross-scale shortcut pathways that directly transmit low-frequency global context across hierarchical levels, stabilising information flow over large spatial extents. Extensive experiments on super-resolution, denoising, and JPEG artifact reduction show consistent improvements over recent Mamba-based and attention-based models with a clear margin.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为PS-Mamba的图像恢复新框架，通过分层分割和对称跨尺度快捷连接来解决现有状态空间模型（如Mamba）在图像处理中的局部结构丢失和长距离信息衰减问题，并在超分辨率、去噪和JPEG伪影去除等任务上取得了显著改进。
AI.motivation: 现有的卷积网络和Transformer在处理图像恢复任务时存在局限性（感受野有限或计算复杂度高）。虽然Mamba等状态空间模型在长距离依赖建模方面有优势，但直接应用于2D图像时，其展平操作会破坏空间拓扑，并且递归动力学可能导致长距离信息衰减，影响恢复效果。
AI.method: 提出PS-Mamba框架，它是一种拓扑感知的层级状态空间模型。具体方法包括：1. 几何一致的分割（而非全局展平）来保持局部邻域完整性；2. 渐进式分割层级（半切、四象限、八象限）以实现多尺度建模并保持线性复杂度；3. 对称跨尺度快捷连接，将低频全局上下文直接传输到不同层级，以对抗长距离衰减，稳定信息流。
AI.result: PS-Mamba在超分辨率、去噪和JPEG伪影去除等任务上进行了广泛实验，结果显示其在性能上优于最近的基于Mamba和基于注意力的方法，且优势明显。
AI.conclusion: PS-Mamba成功地解决了传统状态空间模型在2D图像恢复中的局限性，通过其创新的拓扑感知层级结构和信息流稳定机制，实现了局部结构保持和高效全局信息传播的统一，为高保真图像恢复提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: Do What I Say: A Spoken Prompt Dataset for Instruction-Following
summary: Speech Large Language Models (SLLMs) have rapidly expanded, supporting a wide range of tasks. These models are typically evaluated using text prompts, which may not reflect real-world scenarios where users interact with speech. To address this gap, we introduce DoWhatISay (DOWIS), a multilingual dataset of human-recorded spoken and written prompts designed to pair with any existing benchmark for realistic evaluation of SLLMs under spoken instruction conditions. Spanning 9 tasks and 11 languages, it provides 10 prompt variants per task-language pair, across five styles. Using DOWIS, we benchmark state-of-the-art SLLMs, analyzing the interplay between prompt modality, style, language, and task type. Results show that text prompts consistently outperform spoken prompts, particularly for low-resource and cross-lingual settings. Only for tasks with speech output, spoken prompts do close the gap, highlighting the need for speech-based prompting in SLLM evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了 DoWhatISay (DOWIS) 数据集，一个包含口头和书面提示的多语言数据集，用于更真实地评估语音大语言模型 (SLLM) 在语音指令下的表现。研究发现，文本提示普遍优于语音提示，尤其是在低资源和跨语言场景下，只有在需要语音输出的任务中，语音提示的差距才有所缩小。
AI.motivation: 现有的 SLLM 评估主要依赖文本提示，这无法反映用户在真实场景中通过语音与模型交互的情况，因此需要一个能够模拟真实语音交互的评估数据集。
AI.method: 构建了一个名为 DoWhatISay (DOWIS) 的多语言数据集，包含 9 个任务和 11 种语言，为每个任务-语言对提供了 10 种不同风格的口头和书面提示。使用该数据集对 SLLM 进行了基准测试，并分析了提示模态、风格、语言和任务类型之间的相互作用。
AI.result: 文本提示在所有测试中普遍优于语音提示，特别是在低资源和跨语言的场景下。只有当任务的输出也为语音时，语音提示的表现才能接近文本提示。
AI.conclusion: 为了更准确地评估 SLLM，尤其是在真实世界的应用中，引入语音提示至关重要。现有的 SLLM 在理解语音指令方面仍有提升空间，特别是在低资源和跨语言的任务上。

title: Point Cloud as a Foreign Language for Multi-modal Large Language Model
comment: Accepted in The IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026
summary: Multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have shown remarkable progress in integrating visual and linguistic understanding. Recent efforts have extended these capabilities to 3D understanding through encoder-based architectures that rely on pre-trained 3D encoders to extract geometric features. However, such approaches suffer from semantic misalignment between geometric and linguistic spaces, resolution sensitivity, and substantial computational overhead. In this work, we present SAGE, the first end-to-end 3D MLLM that directly processes raw point clouds without relying on a pre-trained 3D encoder. Our approach introduces a lightweight 3D tokenizer that combines geometric sampling and neighbourhood aggregation with vector quantization to convert point clouds into discrete tokens--treating 3D data as a foreign language that naturally extends the LLM's vocabulary. Furthermore, to enhance the model's reasoning capability on complex 3D tasks, we propose a preference optimization training strategy with a semantic alignment-based reward, specifically designed for open-ended 3D question answering where responses are descriptive. Extensive experiments across diverse 3D understanding benchmarks demonstrate that our end-to-end approach outperforms existing encoder-based methods while offering significant advantages in computational efficiency, generalization across LLM backbones, and robustness to input resolution variations. Code is available at: github.com/snehaputul/SAGE3D.

AI.tldr: SAGE是一个首个端到端的3D多模态大型语言模型（MLLM），它直接处理原始点云，无需预训练的3D编码器。它使用一个轻量级的3D分词器将点云转换为离散标记，并采用基于偏好优化的训练策略来增强其在复杂3D任务上的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于编码器的3D MLLM在几何和语言空间之间存在语义不匹配、对分辨率敏感以及计算开销大等问题。作者希望开发一个更高效、更鲁棒且能解决语义不匹配问题的3D MLLM。
AI.method: SAGE提出了一种新颖的3D分词器，它结合了几何采样、邻域聚合和向量量化，将点云转换为离散标记。此外，为了提升模型在开放式3D问答任务上的推理能力，引入了一种基于语义对齐奖励的偏好优化训练策略。
AI.result: SAGE在多个3D理解基准测试中表现优于现有的基于编码器的方法，并在计算效率、LLM骨干模型的泛化能力以及对输入分辨率变化的鲁棒性方面展现出显著优势。
AI.conclusion: SAGE成功地实现了首个端到端的3D MLLM，通过直接处理点云和创新的分词及训练策略，解决了现有方法的局限性，并在3D理解任务上取得了优越的性能和效率。

title: MM-Zero: Self-Evolving Multi-Model Vision Language Models From Zero Data
summary: Self-evolving has emerged as a key paradigm for improving foundational models such as Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) with minimal human intervention. While recent approaches have demonstrated that LLM agents can self-evolve from scratch with little to no data, VLMs introduce an additional visual modality that typically requires at least some seed data, such as images, to bootstrap the self-evolution process. In this work, we present Multi-model Multimodal Zero (MM-Zero), the first RL-based framework to achieve zero-data self-evolution for VLM reasoning. Moving beyond prior dual-role (Proposer and Solver) setups, MM-Zero introduces a multi-role self-evolving training framework comprising three specialized roles: a Proposer that generates abstract visual concepts and formulates questions; a Coder that translates these concepts into executable code (e.g., Python, SVG) to render visual images; and a Solver that performs multimodal reasoning over the generated visual content. All three roles are initialized from the same base model and trained using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), with carefully designed reward mechanisms that integrate execution feedback, visual verification, and difficulty balancing. Our experiments show that MM-Zero improves VLM reasoning performance across a wide range of multimodal benchmarks. MM-Zero establishes a scalable path toward self-evolving multi-model systems for multimodal models, extending the frontier of self-improvement beyond the conventional two-model paradigm.

AI.tldr: MM-Zero 是一个基于强化学习的框架，实现了视觉语言模型（VLM）的零数据自进化推理。它引入了一个包含 Proposer、Coder 和 Solver 三个角色的多模型自进化训练框架，并使用 GRPO 和专门设计的奖励机制进行训练，显著提升了 VLM 在多模态基准上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的自进化方法主要针对大型语言模型（LLMs），而视觉语言模型（VLMs）由于引入了视觉模态，通常需要种子数据才能启动自进化过程。本研究旨在开发一种能够在没有种子数据的情况下实现 VLM 推理自进化的方法。
AI.method: MM-Zero 采用了一个包含三个角色的自进化训练框架：Proposer 负责生成抽象视觉概念和问题；Coder 负责将概念转化为可执行代码以生成图像；Solver 负责对生成的视觉内容进行多模态推理。所有角色均初始化自同一基础模型，并使用 Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) 进行训练，结合了执行反馈、视觉验证和难度平衡的奖励机制。
AI.result: MM-Zero 在多种多模态基准测试中显著提升了 VLM 的推理性能。
AI.conclusion: MM-Zero 是首个实现 VLM 零数据自进化推理的基于强化学习的框架，为构建可扩展的多模型自进化系统开辟了道路，将自改进的范畴扩展到了多模态领域。

title: Receptogenesis in a Vascularized Robotic Embodiment
comment: Supplementary Files currently unavailable online. Please contact the First Author to request any Supplementary Files
summary: Equipping robotic systems with the capacity to generate $\textit{ex novo}$ hardware during operation extends control of physical adaptability. Unlike modular systems that rely on discrete component integration pre- or post-deployment, we envision the possibility that physical adaptation and development emerge from dynamic material restructuring to shape the body's intrinsic functions. Drawing inspiration from circulatory systems that redistribute mass and function in biological organisms, we utilize fluidics to restructure the material interface, a capability currently unpaired in robotics. Here, we realize this synthetic growth capability through a vascularized robotic composite designed for programmable material synthesis, demonstrated via receptogenesis - the on-demand construction of sensors from internal fluid reserves based on environmental cues. By coordinating the fluidic transport of precursors with external localized UV irradiation, we drive an $\textit{in situ}$ photopolymerization that chemically reconstructs the vasculature from the inside out. This reaction converts precursors with photolatent initiator into a solid dispersion of UV-sensitive polypyrrole, establishing a sensing modality validated by a characteristic decrease in electrical impedance. The newly synthesized sensor closed a control loop to regulate wing flapping in a moth-inspired robotic demonstrator. This physical update increased the robot's capability in real time. This work establishes a materials-based framework for constitutive evolution, enabling robots to physically grow the hardware needed to support emerging behaviors in a complex environment; for example, suggesting a pathway toward autonomous systems capable of generating specialized features, such as neurovascular systems in situated robotics.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种通过内部流体驱动的材料重构技术，使机器人能够实时“生长”新的硬件，以实现物理适应性。通过在血管化复合材料中输送前驱体并结合紫外线照射，可以原位光聚合生成传感器，从而闭合控制环路，增强机器人能力。
AI.motivation: 传统的模块化机器人硬件适应性有限，而生物体可以通过物质重分布和功能演化实现高度适应性。作者希望借鉴生物学原理，使机器人能够生成新的硬件以实现更强的物理适应性。
AI.method: 研究人员设计了一种血管化机器人复合材料，利用流体系统输送前驱体，并通过局部紫外线照射驱动原位光聚合反应。该反应将前驱体转化为导电聚合物（UV-敏感的聚吡咯），形成传感器，并通过测量其阻抗变化来验证其感应能力。
AI.result: 该方法成功实现了“受体发生”（receptogenesis），即根据环境线索按需构建传感器。合成的新型传感器能够闭合控制环路，用于调控扑翼机器人的扑翼行为，并实时提升了机器人的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提出了一种基于材料的构成性演化框架，使机器人能够自主生长所需硬件以支持新兴行为，为未来能够生成特定功能（如神经血管系统）的自主系统指明了方向。

title: EsoLang-Bench: Evaluating Genuine Reasoning in Large Language Models via Esoteric Programming Languages
summary: Large language models achieve near-ceiling performance on code generation benchmarks, yet these results increasingly reflect memorization rather than genuine reasoning. We introduce EsoLang-Bench, a benchmark using five esoteric programming languages (Brainfuck, Befunge-98, Whitespace, Unlambda, and Shakespeare) that lack benchmark gaming incentives due to their economic irrationality for pre-training. These languages require the same computational primitives as mainstream programming but have 1,000-100,000x fewer public repositories than Python (based on GitHub search counts). We evaluate five frontier models across five prompting strategies and find a dramatic capability gap: models achieving 85-95% on standard benchmarks score only 0-11% on equivalent esoteric tasks, with 0% accuracy beyond the Easy tier. Few-shot learning and self-reflection fail to improve performance, suggesting these techniques exploit training priors rather than enabling genuine learning. EsoLang-Bench provides the first benchmark designed to mimic human learning by acquiring new languages through documentation, interpreter feedback, and iterative experimentation, measuring transferable reasoning skills resistant to data contamination.

AI.tldr: 现有的大型语言模型在代码生成上表现优异，但很大程度上是由于记忆而非真正的推理。本文提出了 EsoLang-Bench 基准测试，使用五种非主流的、预训练收益低的“晦涩”编程语言（Brainfuck, Befunge-98, Whitespace, Unlambda, and Shakespeare），以评估模型在不依赖记忆情况下的推理能力。结果显示，在标准代码生成任务上表现优异的模型在这些晦涩语言任务上表现急剧下降，且少样本学习和自我反思等技术也未能显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成基准测试的评估结果可能受到模型过度拟合和记忆训练数据的“基准游戏化”现象的影响，无法真实反映模型的泛化推理能力。作者希望通过引入一种新的基准测试，迫使模型像人类学习新语言一样，依赖文档、解释器反馈和迭代实验来解决问题，从而评估模型真正的、抗污染的迁移学习和推理能力。
AI.method: 构建了一个名为 EsoLang-Bench 的新基准测试，其中包含五种晦涩的编程语言（Brainfuck, Befunge-98, Whitespace, Unlambda, and Shakespeare）。这些语言的特点是公共代码库稀少，经济效益低，不易被模型通过预训练数据记忆。在 EsoLang-Bench 上评估了五种前沿的大型语言模型，并尝试了五种不同的提示策略（prompting strategies），包括少样本学习（few-shot learning）和自我反思（self-reflection）。
AI.result: 在 EsoLang-Bench 上，模型的表现与在标准代码生成基准上的表现存在巨大差距。在标准基准上能达到 85-95% 准确率的模型，在晦涩语言任务上仅能获得 0-11% 的准确率，并且在“简单”难度级别以上准确率降为 0%。少样本学习和自我反思等技术未能有效提升模型在这些任务上的性能。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型在代码生成方面的高性能很大程度上依赖于其训练数据中的记忆，而非真正的推理能力。EsoLang-Bench 提供了一个衡量模型在缺乏训练数据先验知识的情况下，通过类人学习过程（查阅文档、使用解释器反馈、迭代实验）来解决问题的能力的新途径。实验表明，模型在面对新的、未见过的编程范式时，其推理能力受到严重限制，现有的改进技术（如少样本学习和自我反思）效果有限，这些技术似乎更多地依赖于利用已有的训练知识，而非真正地学习新知识。

title: StyleVLA: Driving Style-Aware Vision Language Action Model for Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) bridge visual perception and linguistic reasoning. In Autonomous Driving (AD), this synergy has enabled Vision Language Action (VLA) models, which translate high-level multimodal understanding into driving behaviors, typically represented as future trajectories. However, existing VLA models mainly generate generic collision-free trajectories. Beyond collision avoidance, adapting to diverse driving styles (e.g., sporty, comfortable) is essential for personalized driving. Moreover, many methods treat trajectory generation as naive token prediction, which can produce kinematically infeasible actions. To address these limitations, we present StyleVLA, a physics-informed VLA framework for generating diverse and physically plausible driving behaviors. We introduce a hybrid loss that combines a kinematic consistency constraint with a continuous regression head to improve trajectory feasibility. To train StyleVLA, built on Qwen3-VL-4B, we construct a large-scale instruction dataset with over 1.2k scenarios, 76k Bird's Eye View (BEV) samples, and 42k First Person View (FPV) samples, with ground-truth trajectories for five driving styles and natural-language instructions. Experiments show that our 4B-parameter StyleVLA significantly outperforms proprietary models (e.g., Gemini-3-Pro) and state-of-the-art VLA models. Using a composite driving score measuring success rate, physical feasibility, and style adherence, StyleVLA achieves 0.55 on BEV and 0.51 on FPV, versus 0.32 and 0.35 for Gemini-3-Pro. These results show that a specialized, physics-informed, lightweight model can surpass closed-source models on domain-specific tasks.

AI.tldr: StyleVLA是一个基于Qwen3-VL-4B的物理约束VLA框架，通过混合损失和大规模数据集，实现了生成多样化且物理上可行的驾驶行为，并在多项指标上超越了现有模型，包括Gemini-3-Pro。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型主要生成通用的无碰撞轨迹，缺乏对运动学可行性的保证，也无法适应不同的驾驶风格。研究的动机是开发一种能够生成多样化、运动学上可行且符合特定驾驶风格的驾驶行为的模型。
AI.method: StyleVLA框架结合了运动学一致性约束和连续回归头，以混合损失函数的形式提高轨迹的可行性。模型基于Qwen3-VL-4B构建，并使用包含1.2k个场景、76k个BEV样本和42k个FPV样本的大规模指令数据集进行训练，该数据集包含五种驾驶风格和自然语言指令的地面真实轨迹。
AI.result: StyleVLA在BEV和FPV任务上均显著优于Gemini-3-Pro等专有模型和SOTA VLA模型。使用综合驾驶评分（包括成功率、物理可行性和风格遵从性）衡量，StyleVLA在BEV和FPV上分别获得0.55和0.51的得分，而Gemini-3-Pro分别为0.32和0.35。
AI.conclusion: 专门化的、物理约束的轻量级模型（StyleVLA）可以在特定领域任务中超越闭源模型，表明通过融合物理知识和大规模定制化数据，可以实现更先进的VLA能力，以生成多样化和物理上可行的驾驶行为。

title: Thinking to Recall: How Reasoning Unlocks Parametric Knowledge in LLMs
summary: While reasoning in LLMs plays a natural role in math, code generation, and multi-hop factual questions, its effect on simple, single-hop factual questions remains unclear. Such questions do not require step-by-step logical decomposition, making the utility of reasoning highly counterintuitive. Nevertheless, we find that enabling reasoning substantially expands the capability boundary of the model's parametric knowledge recall, unlocking correct answers that are otherwise effectively unreachable. Why does reasoning aid parametric knowledge recall when there are no complex reasoning steps to be done? To answer this, we design a series of hypothesis-driven controlled experiments, and identify two key driving mechanisms: (1) a computational buffer effect, where the model uses the generated reasoning tokens to perform latent computation independent of their semantic content; and (2) factual priming, where generating topically related facts acts as a semantic bridge that facilitates correct answer retrieval. Importantly, this latter generative self-retrieval mechanism carries inherent risks: we demonstrate that hallucinating intermediate facts during reasoning increases the likelihood of hallucinations in the final answer. Finally, we show that our insights can be harnessed to directly improve model accuracy by prioritizing reasoning trajectories that contain hallucination-free factual statements.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在处理简单、单跳事实性问题时，大型语言模型（LLMs）的推理能力。研究发现，即使在不需要复杂逻辑分解的情况下，启用推理也能显著提高模型参数知识回忆的准确性，解锁原本难以触及的正确答案。通过实验，文章指出了两种关键驱动机制：计算缓冲效应和事实引导。同时，研究也强调了生成过程中事实幻觉的风险，并提出通过优先选择无幻觉推理路径来提升模型准确性。
AI.motivation: 文章的动机在于探究LLMs在处理简单、单跳事实性问题时，推理能力的作用。尽管这类问题看似不需要复杂的逻辑推理，但研究人员发现推理能力在此类任务中仍然能带来显著的性能提升，这引发了对其中原因的探究。
AI.method: 作者设计了一系列基于假设的对照实验，以识别推理机制如何帮助参数知识回忆。实验旨在分离推理的语义内容和其作为计算缓冲的作用，并分析了生成相关事实对知识检索的影响。此外，作者还通过实验评估了推理过程中事实幻觉对最终答案的影响，并提出了改进模型准确性的方法。
AI.result: 研究发现，启用推理可以显著扩展模型参数知识回忆的边界，使其能够回答原本无法回答的问题。文章确定了两种关键机制：1）计算缓冲效应，即模型利用生成的推理令牌进行潜在计算，无论其语义内容如何；2）事实引导，即生成与主题相关的“事实”作为语义桥梁，促进正确答案的检索。研究还表明，推理过程中的事实幻觉会增加最终答案出现幻觉的可能性。
AI.conclusion: 文章得出结论，推理能力对于LLMs在简单事实性问题上的性能至关重要，这得益于计算缓冲效应和事实引导机制。同时，必须警惕生成过程中事实幻觉的风险，并通过优先选择无幻觉的推理路径来有效提升模型的准确性。

title: OOD-MMSafe: Advancing MLLM Safety from Harmful Intent to Hidden Consequences
summary: While safety alignment for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has gained significant attention, current paradigms primarily target malicious intent or situational violations. We propose shifting the safety frontier toward consequence-driven safety, a paradigm essential for the robust deployment of autonomous and embodied agents. To formalize this shift, we introduce OOD-MMSafe, a benchmark comprising 455 curated query-image pairs designed to evaluate a model's ability to identify latent hazards within context-dependent causal chains. Our analysis reveals a pervasive causal blindness among frontier models, with the highest 67.5% failure rate in high-capacity closed-source models, and identifies a preference ceiling where static alignment yields format-centric failures rather than improved safety reasoning as model capacity grows. To address these bottlenecks, we develop the Consequence-Aware Safety Policy Optimization (CASPO) framework, which integrates the model's intrinsic reasoning as a dynamic reference for token-level self-distillation rewards. Experimental results demonstrate that CASPO significantly enhances consequence projection, reducing the failure ratio of risk identification to 7.3% for Qwen2.5-VL-7B and 5.7% for Qwen3-VL-4B while maintaining overall effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了“基于后果的安全”新范式，旨在解决多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在自主和具身智能体部署中的安全问题。为此，设计了OOD-MMSafe基准测试，并开发了CASPO框架，通过整合模型内在推理进行 token-level 自我蒸馏，显著提升了模型对潜在风险的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 当前 MLLMs 的安全对齐主要关注恶意意图或情境违规，而对于自动和具身智能体部署而言，更重要的是“基于后果的安全”范式，以识别潜在的、情境依赖的危险。
AI.method: 1. 提出“基于后果的安全”范式。2. 构建OOD-MMSafe基准（455个查询-图像对），评估模型识别潜在危险的能力。3. 开发CASPO框架，通过 token-level 自我蒸馏奖励，将模型内在推理作为动态参考。4. 通过实验评估CASPO在Qwen2.5-VL-7B和Qwen3-VL-4B上的效果。
AI.result: 前沿模型存在普遍的“因果盲视”问题，高容量闭源模型失败率高达67.5%。静态对齐在高容量模型上表现出“偏好天花板”效应，导致格式中心化失败而非提升安全推理。CASPO框架显著提升了后果预测能力，将Qwen2.5-VL-7B的风险识别失败率降至7.3%，Qwen3-VL-4B降至5.7%，同时保持了整体有效性。
AI.conclusion: “基于后果的安全”是 MLLMs 在自主和具身智能体部署中的关键。OOD-MMSafe基准和CASPO框架能够有效解决当前模型在识别潜在风险方面的不足，并显著提升其安全推理能力。

title: Geometry-Aware Metric Learning for Cross-Lingual Few-Shot Sign Language Recognition on Static Hand Keypoints
summary: Sign language recognition (SLR) systems typically require large labeled corpora for each language, yet the majority of the world's 300+ sign languages lack sufficient annotated data. Cross-lingual few-shot transfer, pretraining on a data-rich source language and adapting with only a handful of target-language examples, offers a scalable alternative, but conventional coordinate-based keypoint representations are susceptible to domain shift arising from differences in camera viewpoint, hand scale, and recording conditions. This shift is particularly detrimental in the few-shot regime, where class prototypes estimated from only K examples are highly sensitive to extrinsic variance. We propose a geometry-aware metric-learning framework centered on a compact 20-dimensional inter-joint angle descriptor derived from MediaPipe static hand keypoints. These angles are invariant to SO(3) rotation, translation, and isotropic scaling, eliminating the dominant sources of cross-dataset shift and yielding tighter, more stable class prototypes. Evaluated on four fingerspelling alphabets spanning typologically diverse sign languages, ASL, LIBRAS, Arabic Sign Language, and Thai Sign Language, the proposed angle features improve over normalized-coordinate baselines by up to 25 percentage points within-domain and enable frozen cross-lingual transfer that frequently exceeds within-domain accuracy, using a lightweight MLP encoder with about 10^5 parameters. These findings demonstrate that invariant hand-geometry descriptors provide a portable and effective foundation for cross-lingual few-shot SLR in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于手部关节角度的几何感知度量学习框架，用于解决低资源手语识别（SLR）中的跨语言少样本迁移问题，该框架通过不变的几何描述子有效减少了域偏移，并在多种手语字母识别任务中取得了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的手语识别系统需要大量标注数据，而世界上大多数手语缺乏足够的标注数据。跨语言少样本迁移（在数据丰富的源语言上预训练，然后在少量目标语言样本上进行微调）是可行的替代方案，但现有的基于关键点的表示容易受到域偏移的影响，尤其是在少样本场景下，这会导致类原型不稳定。
AI.method: 提出了一种几何感知度量学习框架，使用从MediaPipe静态手部关键点派生出的紧凑的20维关节角度描述子。这些角度对SO(3)旋转、平移和各向同性缩放具有不变性，从而消除了跨数据集偏移的主要来源，并生成更稳定、更紧凑的类原型。使用一个轻量级的MLP编码器（约10^5个参数）来处理这些角度特征。
AI.result: 在ASL、LIBRAS、阿拉伯手语和泰语手语的四种拼写字母识别任务中，所提出的角度特征相比于归一化坐标基线，在同域（within-domain）性能上提升了高达25个百分点。在冻结模型进行跨语言迁移时，性能也常常超过了同域精度。
AI.conclusion: 不变的手部几何描述子（关节角度）为低资源设置下的跨语言少样本手语识别提供了一个可移植且有效的解决方案，有效克服了域偏移问题，并能在数据稀疏的情况下实现高性能。

title: Benchmarking Political Persuasion Risks Across Frontier Large Language Models
summary: Concerns persist regarding the capacity of Large Language Models (LLMs) to sway political views. Although prior research has claimed that LLMs are not more persuasive than standard political campaign practices, the recent rise of frontier models warrants further study. In two survey experiments (N=19,145) across bipartisan issues and stances, we evaluate seven state-of-the-art LLMs developed by Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, and xAI. We find that LLMs outperform standard campaign advertisements, with heterogeneity in performance across models. Specifically, Claude models exhibit the highest persuasiveness, while Grok exhibits the lowest. The results are robust across issues and stances. Moreover, in contrast to the findings in Hackenburg et al. (2025b) and Lin et al. (2025) that information-based prompts boost persuasiveness, we find that the effectiveness of information-based prompts is model-dependent: they increase the persuasiveness of Claude and Grok while substantially reducing that of GPT. We introduce a data-driven and strategy-agnostic LLM-assisted conversation analysis approach to identify and assess underlying persuasive strategies. Our work benchmarks the persuasive risks of frontier models and provides a framework for cross-model comparative risk assessment.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，先进的大语言模型（LLMs）比传统的竞选广告更能影响政治观点，但不同模型的效果存在差异。信息型提示对模型的影响也不同，有的增强说服力，有的则削弱。
AI.motivation: 鉴于人们对大型语言模型（LLMs）影响政治观点的担忧，以及前沿模型的出现，需要对LLMs的说服力进行更深入的研究，并与传统的竞选活动进行比较。
AI.method: 通过两次调查实验（N=19,145）评估了七种最先进的LLMs（来自Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, xAI）在跨党派议题和立场上的说服力。还引入了一种数据驱动、策略无关的LLM辅助对话分析方法来评估说服策略。
AI.result: LLMs在说服力上优于传统的竞选广告。Claude模型最具说服力，Grok模型说服力最低。信息型提示的效果因模型而异，对Claude和Grok有增强作用，但对GPT则显著降低了说服力。
AI.conclusion: 前沿LLMs具有潜在的政治说服风险，且这种风险因模型和所使用的提示策略而异。研究提供了一个跨模型比较风险评估的框架。

title: Does the Question Really Matter? Training-Free Data Selection for Vision-Language SFT
summary: Visual instruction tuning is crucial for improving vision-language large models (VLLMs). However, many samples can be solved via linguistic patterns or common-sense shortcuts, without genuine cross-modal reasoning, limiting the effectiveness of multimodal learning. Prior data selection methods often rely on costly proxy model training and focus on difficulty or diversity, failing to capture a sample's true contribution to vision-language joint reasoning. In this paper, we propose CVS, a training-free data selection method based on the insight that, for high-quality multimodal samples, introducing the question should substantially alter the model's assessment of answer validity given an image. CVS leverages a frozen VLLM as an evaluator and measures the discrepancy in answer validity with and without conditioning on the question, enabling the identification of samples that require vision-language joint reasoning while filtering semantic-conflict noise. Experiments on Vision-Flan and The Cauldron show that CVS achieves solid performance across datasets. On Vision-Flan, CVS outperforms full-data training by 3.5% and 4.8% using only 10% and 15% of the data, respectively, and remains robust on the highly heterogeneous Cauldron dataset. Moreover, CVS reduces computational cost by 17.3% and 44.4% compared to COINCIDE and XMAS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CVS的训练无关数据选择方法，用于提高视觉指令微调的效率和效果，通过评估问题对模型答案有效性的影响来识别需要跨模态推理的样本，并有效过滤噪声。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉指令微调方法的数据选择策略存在不足，例如依赖昂贵的代理模型训练，或侧重于难度/多样性，未能有效捕捉样本在视觉-语言联合推理中的真正价值。许多样本可通过语言模式或常识解决，而非真正的跨模态推理。
AI.method: CVS是一种训练无关的数据选择方法。其核心思想是：对于高质量的多模态样本，引入问题应显著改变模型在给定图像时对答案有效性的评估。CVS使用一个冻结的VLLM作为评估器，衡量在考虑和不考虑问题条件的情况下答案有效性的差异，从而识别需要视觉-语言联合推理的样本并过滤语义冲突噪声。
AI.result: 在Vision-Flan和The Cauldron数据集上的实验表明，CVS取得了优异的性能。在Vision-Flan上，使用10%和15%的数据，CVS分别比全数据训练高出3.5%和4.8%的性能。在异构的Cauldron数据集上，CVS也表现出鲁棒性。此外，与COINCIDE和XMAS相比，CVS将计算成本分别降低了17.3%和44.4%。
AI.conclusion: CVS是一种有效的训练无关数据选择方法，能够识别需要视觉-语言联合推理的样本，过滤掉语义冲突噪声，从而显著提高视觉指令微调的效率和性能，并降低计算成本。

title: Model Merging in the Era of Large Language Models: Methods, Applications, and Future Directions
summary: Model merging has emerged as a transformative paradigm for combining the capabilities of multiple neural networks into a single unified model without additional training. With the rapid proliferation of fine-tuned large language models~(LLMs), merging techniques offer a computationally efficient alternative to ensembles and full retraining, enabling practitioners to compose specialized capabilities at minimal cost. This survey presents a comprehensive and structured examination of model merging in the LLM era through the \textbf{FUSE} taxonomy, a four-dimensional framework organized along \textbf{F}oundations, \textbf{U}nification Strategies, \textbf{S}cenarios, and \textbf{E}cosystem. We first establish the theoretical underpinnings of merging, including loss landscape geometry, mode connectivity, and the linear mode connectivity hypothesis. We then systematically review the algorithmic landscape, spanning weight averaging, task vector arithmetic, sparsification-enhanced methods, mixture-of-experts architectures, and evolutionary optimization approaches. For each method family, we analyze the core formulation, highlight representative works, and discuss practical trade-offs. We further examine downstream applications across multi-task learning, safety alignment, domain specialization, multilingual transfer, and federated learning. Finally, we survey the supporting ecosystem of open-source tools, community platforms, and evaluation benchmarks, and identify key open challenges including theoretical gaps, scalability barriers, and standardization needs. This survey aims to equip researchers and practitioners with a structured foundation for advancing model merging.

AI.tldr: 本文对大语言模型（LLM）时代的模型合并技术进行了全面的调研，提出了 FUSE 四维度分类框架，涵盖了模型合并的基础理论、统一策略、应用场景和生态系统，并指出了未来的研究方向。
AI.motivation: 随着精调大语言模型的快速发展，模型合并技术为整合多个模型能力提供了一种无需额外训练且计算效率高的方法，是模型集成和重新训练的替代方案。
AI.method: 本文采用 FUSE 分类框架，从基础（Foundations）、统一策略（Unification Strategies）、场景（Scenarios）和生态系统（Ecosystem）四个维度对模型合并进行梳理。具体方法包括：阐述损失景观几何、模式连通性等理论基础；回顾权重平均、任务向量算术、稀疏化增强、专家混合以及进化优化等算法；分析多任务学习、安全对齐、领域专业化、多语言迁移和联邦学习等下游应用；并调研开源工具、社区平台和评估基准等支持生态。
AI.result: 本文系统性地梳理了模型合并的理论、算法、应用和生态，为理解和实践模型合并提供了结构化基础，并指出了模型合并领域存在的理论空白、可扩展性障碍和标准化需求等开放性挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本调研旨在为研究人员和实践者提供一个结构化的模型合并基础，以推动该领域的进一步发展，并解决当前面临的理论和实践挑战。

title: NS-VLA: Towards Neuro-Symbolic Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are formulated to ground instructions in visual context and generate action sequences for robotic manipulation. Despite recent progress, VLA models still face challenges in learning related and reusable primitives, reducing reliance on large-scale data and complex architectures, and enabling exploration beyond demonstrations. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Neuro-Symbolic Vision-Language-Action (NS-VLA) framework via online reinforcement learning (RL). It introduces a symbolic encoder to embedding vision and language features and extract structured primitives, utilizes a symbolic solver for data-efficient action sequencing, and leverages online RL to optimize generation via expansive exploration. Experiments on robotic manipulation benchmarks demonstrate that NS-VLA outperforms previous methods in both one-shot training and data-perturbed settings, while simultaneously exhibiting superior zero-shot generalizability, high data efficiency and expanded exploration space. Our code is available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NS-VLA的新型神经符号视觉-语言-动作框架，通过在线强化学习解决机器人操作中VLA模型在学习相关且可重用的原语、减少对大规模数据和复杂架构的依赖以及实现超越演示的探索方面面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在处理机器人操作指令、视觉背景和动作序列生成方面仍面临挑战，尤其是在学习可重用原语、减少数据和架构依赖以及探索新颖动作方面。
AI.method: 提出了一种神经符号视觉-语言-动作（NS-VLA）框架，采用在线强化学习。该框架包含一个符号编码器，用于嵌入视觉和语言特征并提取结构化原语；一个符号求解器，用于数据高效的动作序列生成；以及在线强化学习，通过广泛探索优化生成过程。
AI.result: 在机器人操作基准测试中，NS-VLA在一次性训练和数据扰动设置下均优于先前方法。此外，它还表现出卓越的零样本泛化能力、高数据效率和更广阔的探索空间。
AI.conclusion: NS-VLA框架通过结合神经符号方法和在线强化学习，成功地解决了VLA模型在机器人操作中的关键挑战，实现了更高效、更通用的学习和探索。

title: Beyond Short-Horizon: VQ-Memory for Robust Long-Horizon Manipulation in Non-Markovian Simulation Benchmarks
summary: The high cost of collecting real-robot data has made robotic simulation a scalable platform for both evaluation and data generation. Yet most existing benchmarks concentrate on simple manipulation tasks such as pick-and-place, failing to capture the non-Markovian characteristics of real-world tasks and the complexity of articulated object interactions. To address this limitation, we present RuleSafe, a new articulated manipulation benchmark built upon a scalable LLM-aided simulation framework. RuleSafe features safes with diverse unlocking mechanisms, such as key locks, password locks, and logic locks, which require different multi-stage reasoning and manipulation strategies. These LLM-generated rules produce non-Markovian and long-horizon tasks that require temporal modeling and memory-based reasoning. We further propose VQ-Memory, a compact and structured temporal representation that uses vector-quantized variational autoencoders (VQ-VAEs) to encode past proprioceptive states into discrete latent tokens. This representation filters low-level noise while preserving high-level task-phase context, providing lightweight yet robust temporal cues that are compatible with existing Vision-Language-Action models (VLA). Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art VLA models and diffusion policies show that VQ-Memory consistently improves long-horizon planning, enhances generalization to unseen configurations, and enables more efficient manipulation with reduced computational cost. Project page: vqmemory.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出了 RuleSafe，一个基于 LLM 辅助模拟框架的关节操作基准，用于解决现有机器人模拟器在处理非马尔可夫和复杂关节交互任务上的不足。同时，文章还提出了 VQ-Memory，一种利用 VQ-VAE 编码历史状态以提供鲁棒时序信息的表示方法，并证明其在提升 VLA 模型和扩散策略的长时域规划、泛化能力和效率方面表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人模拟器在处理简单操作任务时效果尚可，但难以捕捉真实世界任务的非马尔可夫特性以及复杂关节物体的交互。这限制了模拟器在数据生成和评估方面的扩展性。
AI.method: 提出了 RuleSafe 基准，该基准包含多种解锁机制的安全锁，需要多阶段推理和操作策略。通过 LLM 生成这些机制，创造了具有非马尔可夫性和长时域特性的任务。此外，提出了 VQ-Memory，一种使用 VQ-VAE 将历史本体感觉状态编码为离散潜标记的时序表示方法，旨在过滤噪声并保留高层任务阶段的上下文。
AI.result: 在先进的 VLA 模型和扩散策略上进行的广泛实验表明，VQ-Memory 能够持续改进长时域规划能力，增强对未见过配置的泛化能力，并以降低的计算成本实现更高效的操作。
AI.conclusion: RuleSafe 和 VQ-Memory 共同解决现有机器人模拟在复杂任务处理上的局限性。VQ-Memory 作为一种紧凑而结构化的时序表示，为 Vision-Language-Action 模型提供了轻量级但强大的时序线索，显著提升了机器人的规划、泛化和操作效率。

title: TubeMLLM: A Foundation Model for Topology Knowledge Exploration in Vessel-like Anatomy
comment: 18 pages, 12 figures, extended version of the submission to MICCAI 2026
summary: Modeling medical vessel-like anatomy is challenging due to its intricate topology and sensitivity to dataset shifts. Consequently, task-specific models often suffer from topological inconsistencies, including artificial disconnections and spurious merges. Motivated by the promise of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for zero-shot generalization, we propose TubeMLLM, a unified foundation model that couples structured understanding with controllable generation for medical vessel-like anatomy. By integrating topological priors through explicit natural language prompting and aligning them with visual representations in a shared-attention architecture, TubeMLLM significantly enhances topology-aware perception. Furthermore, we construct TubeMData, a pionner multimodal benchmark comprising comprehensive topology-centric tasks, and introduce an adaptive loss weighting strategy to emphasize topology-critical regions during training. Extensive experiments on fifteen diverse datasets demonstrate our superiority. Quantitatively, TubeMLLM achieves state-of-the-art out-of-distribution performance, substantially reducing global topological discrepancies on color fundus photography (decreasing the $β_{0}$ number error from 37.42 to 8.58 compared to baselines). Notably, TubeMLLM exhibits exceptional zero-shot cross-modality transferring ability on unseen X-ray angiography, achieving a Dice score of 67.50% while significantly reducing the $β_{0}$ error to 1.21. TubeMLLM also maintains robustness against degradations such as blur, noise, and low resolution. Furthermore, in topology-aware understanding tasks, the model achieves 97.38% accuracy in evaluating mask topological quality, significantly outperforming standard vision-language baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TubeMLLM的统一基础模型，用于医学血管类解剖结构建模，通过多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）实现零样本泛化，并引入了TubeMData基准和自适应损失加权策略，显著提高了拓扑一致性，并在多项任务和数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 医学血管类解剖结构的复杂拓扑结构和对数据集变化的敏感性导致现有模型常出现拓扑不一致（如断开或错误合并），因此需要一种能够实现零样本泛化并更好处理拓扑结构的基础模型。
AI.method: 提出TubeMLLM，一个结合结构化理解和可控生成的基础模型。通过自然语言提示整合拓扑先验，并在共享注意力架构中与视觉表示对齐。构建了TubeMData多模态基准，并采用了自适应损失加权策略。
AI.result: TubeMLLM在十五个多样化数据集上取得了最先进的离群分布（out-of-distribution）性能，显著降低了全局拓扑差异。在X射线血管造影上实现了67.50%的Dice分数和1.21的$β_{0}$误差。在拓扑理解任务上，模型在评估掩膜拓扑质量方面达到97.38%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: TubeMLLM通过整合拓扑先验和利用MLLMs的能力，成功解决了医学血管类解剖结构建模中的拓扑不一致问题，并在感知和理解任务上展现了卓越的零样本泛化和跨模态迁移能力，对医学影像分析具有重要意义。

title: CREATE: Testing LLMs for Associative Creativity
summary: A key component of creativity is associative reasoning: the ability to draw novel yet meaningful connections between concepts. We introduce CREATE, a benchmark designed to evaluate models' capacity for creative associative reasoning. CREATE requires models to generate sets of paths connecting concepts in a model's parametric knowledge. Paths should have high specificity (distinctiveness and closeness of the concept connection) and high diversity (dissimilarity from other paths), and models are scored more highly if they produce a larger set of strong, diverse paths. This task shares demands of real creativity tasks like hypothesis generation, including an extremely large search space, but enables collection of a sizable benchmark with objective answer grading. Evaluation of frontier models shows that the strongest models achieve higher creative utility than others, with the high multiplicity of answers and complexity of the search making benchmark saturation difficult to achieve. Furthermore, our results illustrate that thinking models are not always more effective on our task, even with high token budgets. Recent approaches for creative prompting give some but limited additional improvement. CREATE provides a sandbox for developing new methods to improve models' capacity for associative creativity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CREATE基准测试，用于评估模型在创造性联想推理方面的能力，该能力是创造力的关键组成部分。CREATE要求模型生成连接概念路径的集合，这些路径需要具有高特异性和高多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有的模型在评估创造性联想推理能力方面存在不足，需要一个专门的基准测试来衡量模型生成新颖且有意义概念连接的能力。
AI.method: CREATE基准测试通过要求模型生成具有高特异性（概念连接的独特性和紧密性）和高多样性（与其他路径的不相似性）的连接概念路径集合来评估模型的创造性联想推理能力。模型的得分取决于其生成的强且多样化的路径集合的大小。
AI.result: 评估显示，最先进的模型在该任务上表现出更高的创造性效用。然而，答案的多样性和搜索空间的复杂性使得基准测试的饱和度难以达到。此外，研究还发现，即使在高token预算下，思维模型（thinking models）在该任务上的表现也并非总是更优，而近期用于创造性提示的方法也仅带来了有限的改进。
AI.conclusion: CREATE基准测试为开发提高模型联想创造力的新方法提供了一个平台。该基准测试能够客观地评估模型在生成新颖且有意义的联想方面的能力，并揭示了当前模型在该领域仍然存在的挑战。

title: AutoAgent: Evolving Cognition and Elastic Memory Orchestration for Adaptive Agents
summary: Autonomous agent frameworks still struggle to reconcile long-term experiential learning with real-time, context-sensitive decision-making. In practice, this gap appears as static cognition, rigid workflow dependence, and inefficient context usage, which jointly limit adaptability in open-ended and non-stationary environments. To address these limitations, we present AutoAgent, a self-evolving multi-agent framework built on three tightly coupled components: evolving cognition, on-the-fly contextual decision-making, and elastic memory orchestration. At the core of AutoAgent, each agent maintains structured prompt-level cognition over tools, self-capabilities, peer expertise, and task knowledge. During execution, this cognition is combined with live task context to select actions from a unified space that includes tool calls, LLM-based generation, and inter-agent requests. To support efficient long-horizon reasoning, an Elastic Memory Orchestrator dynamically organizes interaction history by preserving raw records, compressing redundant trajectories, and constructing reusable episodic abstractions, thereby reducing token overhead while retaining decision-critical evidence. These components are integrated through a closed-loop cognitive evolution process that aligns intended actions with observed outcomes to continuously update cognition and expand reusable skills, without external retraining. Empirical results across retrieval-augmented reasoning, tool-augmented agent benchmarks, and embodied task environments show that AutoAgent consistently improves task success, tool-use efficiency, and collaborative robustness over static and memory-augmented baselines. Overall, AutoAgent provides a unified and practical foundation for adaptive autonomous agents that must learn from experience while making reliable context-aware decisions in dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: AutoAgent是一个自适应的自主代理框架，通过不断演化的认知、实时的情境决策和弹性的记忆管理，解决了现有框架在长期经验学习和实时决策之间的脱节问题，提高了在动态环境中的适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有的自主代理框架在整合长期经验学习和实时情境决策方面存在不足，导致认知僵化、工作流程固定和情境利用效率低下，限制了它们在开放和非稳定环境中的适应性。
AI.method: AutoAgent包含三个核心组件：1. 演化认知：每个代理维护结构化的工具、自我能力、同伴专业知识和任务知识的提示级认知。2. 即时情境决策：将认知与实时任务情境结合，从工具调用、LLM生成和代理间请求的统一空间中选择动作。3. 弹性记忆编排：动态组织交互历史，保留原始记录、压缩冗余轨迹并构建可重用的情景抽象，以减少token开销并保留关键证据。这些组件通过闭环认知演化过程整合，使代理能够根据观察到的结果更新认知和扩展技能，无需外部重新训练。
AI.result: 在检索增强推理、工具增强代理基准和具身任务环境的实证研究表明，AutoAgent在任务成功率、工具使用效率和协作鲁棒性方面持续优于静态和内存增强的基线。
AI.conclusion: AutoAgent提供了一个统一且实用的基础，用于开发能够从经验中学习并在动态环境中做出可靠的情境感知决策的自适应自主代理。

title: X-GS: An Extensible Open Framework Unifying 3DGS Architectures with Downstream Multimodal Models
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a powerful technique for novel view synthesis, subsequently extending into numerous spatial AI applications. However, most existing 3DGS methods are isolated, focusing on specific domains such as online SLAM, semantic enrichment, or 3DGS for unposed images. In this paper, we introduce X-GS, an extensible open framework that unifies a broad range of techniques to enable real-time 3DGS-based online SLAM enriched with semantics, bridging the gap to downstream multimodal models. At the core of X-GS is a highly efficient pipeline called X-GS-Perceiver, capable of taking unposed RGB (or optionally RGB-D) video streams as input to co-optimize geometry and poses, and distill high-dimensional semantic features from vision foundation models into the 3D Gaussians.
