We achieve real-time performance through a novel online Vector Quantization (VQ) module, a GPU-accelerated grid-sampling scheme, and a highly parallelized pipeline design. The semantic 3D Gaussians can then be utilized by vision-language models within the X-GS-Thinker component, enabling downstream tasks such as object detection, zero-shot caption generation, and potentially embodied tasks. Experimental results on real-world datasets showcase the efficacy, efficiency, and newly unlocked multimodal capabilities of the X-GS framework.

AI.tldr: X-GS 是一个可扩展的开源框架，它将 3D 高斯溅射（3DGS）技术与实时在线 SLAM、语义丰富和多模态下游应用相结合，能够处理未加姿态的 RGB（或 RGB-D）视频流，并从视觉基础模型中提取语义特征。
AI.motivation: 现有的 3DGS 方法通常是孤立的，专注于特定领域。研究者希望创建一个统一的框架，将 3DGS 扩展到在线 SLAM、语义丰富和多模态下游任务，弥合现有方法的局限性。
AI.method: X-GS 框架的核心是 X-GS-Perceiver，一个高效的流水线，能够接收未加姿态的 RGB（或 RGB-D）视频流，联合优化几何和位姿，并将视觉基础模型的高维语义特征蒸馏到 3D 高斯中。实时性能通过在线矢量量化 (VQ) 模块、GPU 加速的网格采样方案和高度并行化的流水线设计实现。X-GS-Thinker 组件则支持将语义 3D 高斯用于下游的视觉-语言模型任务。
AI.result: X-GS 框架在真实世界数据集上的实验表明，它在效率、功能性和新解锁的多模态能力方面都表现出色。
AI.conclusion: X-GS 提供了一个通用、高效且可扩展的框架，能够实时实现基于 3DGS 的在线 SLAM，并集成语义信息，为多模态下游应用（如物体检测、零样本字幕生成等）提供了强大的基础。

title: On the Cost of Evolving Task Specialization in Multi-Robot Systems
comment: Accepted for publication in the proceeding of ANTS 2026 - 15th International Conference on Swarm Intelligence
summary: Task specialization can lead to simpler robot behaviors and higher efficiency in multi-robot systems. Previous works have shown the emergence of task specialization during evolutionary optimization, focusing on feasibility rather than costs. In this study, we take first steps toward a cost-benefit analysis of task specialization in robot swarms using a foraging scenario. We evolve artificial neural networks as generalist behaviors for the entire task and as task-specialist behaviors for subtasks within a limited evaluation budget. We show that generalist behaviors can be successfully optimized while the evolved task-specialist controllers fail to cooperate efficiently, resulting in worse performance than the generalists. Consequently, task specialization does not necessarily improve efficiency when optimization budget is limited.

AI.tldr: 在有限的优化预算下，机器人集群进行任务专业化不一定能提高效率，甚至可能导致比通用型行为更差的性能。
AI.motivation: 探索机器人集群任务专业化的成本效益，尤其是在进化优化过程中，以及在有限的评估预算下其对效率的影响。
AI.method: 通过进化算法，分别优化作为通用行为的神经网络和作为任务专业化行为的神经网络，并在一个机器人寻食场景中进行评估。
AI.result: 通用型行为在有限预算下能够成功优化并取得较好性能，而任务专业化行为的控制器在协同合作方面效率低下，整体性能不如通用型行为。
AI.conclusion: 在优化预算有限的情况下，任务专业化不一定能带来效率的提升，反而可能阻碍高效的协同工作。

title: World2Mind: Cognition Toolkit for Allocentric Spatial Reasoning in Foundation Models
summary: Achieving robust spatial reasoning remains a fundamental challenge for current Multimodal Foundation Models (MFMs). Existing methods either overfit statistical shortcuts via 3D grounding data or remain confined to 2D visual perception, limiting both spatial reasoning accuracy and generalization in unseen scenarios. Inspired by the spatial cognitive mapping mechanisms of biological intelligence, we propose World2Mind, a training-free spatial intelligence toolkit. At its core, World2Mind leverages 3D reconstruction and instance segmentation models to construct structured spatial cognitive maps, empowering MFMs to proactively acquire targeted spatial knowledge regarding interested landmarks and routes of interest. To provide robust geometric-topological priors, World2Mind synthesizes an Allocentric-Spatial Tree (AST) that uses elliptical parameters to model the top-down layout of landmarks accurately. To mitigate the inherent inaccuracies of 3D reconstruction, we introduce a three-stage reasoning chain comprising tool invocation assessment, modality-decoupled cue collection, and geometry-semantics interwoven reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that World2Mind boosts the performance of frontier models, such as GPT-5.2, by 5%~18%. Astonishingly, relying solely on the AST-structured text, purely text-only foundation models can perform complex 3D spatial reasoning, achieving performance approaching that of advanced multimodal models.

AI.tldr: World2Mind 是一个无需训练的工具包，它利用 3D 重建和实例分割构建空间认知图，并引入了用于准确表示地标布局的分配中心空间树 (AST)，从而提高了多模态基础模型 (MFM) 的空间推理能力，甚至使纯文本模型也能执行复杂的 3D 空间推理。
AI.motivation: 当前的 MFM 在空间推理方面存在挑战，要么过度拟合 3D 标注数据，要么仅限于 2D 视觉感知，这限制了其在未见场景下的准确性和泛化能力。受到生物空间认知映射机制的启发，研究者们希望开发一种新的方法来克服这些局限性。
AI.method: World2Mind 通过 3D 重建和实例分割构建结构化的空间认知图。它利用分配中心空间树 (AST) 来提供稳健的几何-拓扑先验，该树使用椭圆参数来精确建模地标的自顶向下布局。为了处理 3D 重建的误差，引入了一个包含工具调用评估、模态解耦线索收集以及几何-语义交织推理的三阶段推理链。
AI.result: World2Mind 将 GPT-5.2 等前沿模型的性能提高了 5%-18%。令人惊讶的是，仅凭 AST 结构化的文本，纯文本模型就能执行复杂的 3D 空间推理，其性能接近先进的多模态模型。
AI.conclusion: World2Mind 是一种有效的方法，可以增强 MFM 的空间推理能力，甚至使纯文本模型也能实现先进的 3D 空间推理。它通过模拟生物空间认知映射机制，并引入 AST 等结构化表示，解决了现有方法的局限性。

title: Distributed Convolutional Neural Networks for Object Recognition
summary: This paper proposes a novel loss function for training a distributed convolutional neural network (DisCNN) to recognize only a specific positive class. By mapping positive samples to a compact set in high-dimensional space and negative samples to Origin, the DisCNN extracts only the features of the positive class. An experiment is given to prove this. Thus, the features of the positive class are disentangled from those of the negative classes. The model has a lightweight architecture because only a few positive-class features need to be extracted. The model demonstrates excellent generalization on the test data and remains effective even for unseen classes. Finally, using DisCNN, object detection of positive samples embedded in a large and complex background is straightforward.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的损失函数，用于训练一个分布式卷积神经网络（DisCNN），使其能够只识别特定的正类。通过将正样本映射到高维空间的紧凑集合，并将负样本映射到原点，DisCNN能够提取正类的特征，从而将正类特征与负类特征解耦。
AI.motivation: 为了实现只识别特定正类的需求，并从负类特征中解耦出正类特征，从而构建一个轻量化且具有良好泛化能力的模型。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的损失函数，将正样本映射到高维空间的紧凑集合，负样本映射到原点。训练分布式卷积神经网络（DisCNN）来提取正类的特征。
AI.result: 实验证明了该方法的有效性。DisCNN提取了正类的特征，实现了特征解耦。模型架构轻量化，提取的正类特征少。模型在测试数据上表现出优异的泛化能力，并且对未见过的类别也有效。此外，使用DisCNN可以轻松实现正样本在复杂背景下的目标检测。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的新颖损失函数和DisCNN模型能够有效地学习特定正类的特征，实现特征解耦，构建轻量化模型，并展现出良好的泛化能力，尤其在复杂背景下的目标检测方面表现出色。

title: UniField: A Unified Field-Aware MRI Enhancement Framework
summary: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) field-strength enhancement holds immense value for both clinical diagnostics and advanced research. However, existing methods typically focus on isolated enhancement tasks, such as specific 64mT-to-3T or 3T-to-7T transitions using limited subject cohorts, thereby failing to exploit the shared degradation patterns inherent across different field strengths and severely restricting model generalization. To address this challenge, we propose \methodname, a unified framework integrating multiple modalities and enhancement tasks to mutually promote representation learning by exploiting these shared degradation characteristics. Specifically, our main contributions are threefold. Firstly, to overcome MRI data scarcity and capture continuous anatomical structures, \methodname departs from conventional methods that treat 3D MRI volumes as independent 2D slices. Instead, we directly exploit comprehensive 3D volumetric information by leveraging pre-trained 3D foundation models, thereby embedding generalized and robust structural representations to significantly boost enhancement performance. In addition, to mitigate the spectral bias of mainstream flow-matching models that often over-smooth high-frequency details, we explicitly incorporate the physical mechanisms of magnetic fields to introduce a Field-Aware Spectral Rectification Mechanism (FASRM), tailoring customized spectral corrections to distinct field strengths. Finally, to resolve the fundamental data bottleneck, we organize and publicly release a comprehensive paired multi-field MRI dataset, which is an order of magnitude larger than existing datasets. Extensive experiments demonstrate our method's superiority over state-of-the-art approaches, achieving an average improvement of approximately 1.81 dB in PSNR and 9.47\% in SSIM. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为\methodname的统一框架，利用预训练的3D基础模型和场感知光谱校正机制，整合多种模态和增强任务，解决了MRI场强增强中数据稀疏、模型泛化性差以及高频细节丢失的问题，并发布了一个大规模的多场MRI数据集，实验证明该方法优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI场强增强方法通常只关注特定场强之间的过渡，使用的受试者数量有限，未能充分利用不同场强之间共享的退化模式，导致模型泛化能力受限。
AI.method:
1. 提出\methodname统一框架，整合多模态和多增强任务，利用共享退化特性促进表示学习。
2. 采用预训练的3D基础模型直接利用3D体积信息，而非将3D MRI切片视为独立的2D切片。
3. 引入场感知光谱校正机制（FASRM），结合磁场物理机制，为不同场强定制光谱校正，缓解主流流匹配模型的光谱偏差。
4. 组织并公开发布了一个大规模的多场MRI配对数据集。
AI.result: 在PSNR方面平均提高了约1.81 dB，在SSIM方面提高了9.47%，优于最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: \methodname通过利用3D基础模型和场感知光谱校正机制，有效地解决了MRI场强增强中的关键挑战，并取得了显著的性能提升。新发布的大规模数据集也将推动该领域的研究进展。

title: EXPLORE-Bench: Egocentric Scene Prediction with Long-Horizon Reasoning
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly considered as a foundation for embodied agents, yet it remains unclear whether they can reliably reason about the long-term physical consequences of actions from an egocentric viewpoint. We study this gap through a new task, Egocentric Scene Prediction with LOng-horizon REasoning: given an initial-scene image and a sequence of atomic action descriptions, a model is asked to predict the final scene after all actions are executed. To enable systematic evaluation, we introduce EXPLORE-Bench, a benchmark curated from real first-person videos spanning diverse scenarios. Each instance pairs long action sequences with structured final-scene annotations, including object categories, visual attributes, and inter-object relations, which supports fine-grained, quantitative assessment. Experiments on a range of proprietary and open-source MLLMs reveal a significant performance gap to humans, indicating that long-horizon egocentric reasoning remains a major challenge. We further analyze test-time scaling via stepwise reasoning and show that decomposing long action sequences can improve performance to some extent, while incurring non-trivial computational overhead. Overall, EXPLORE-Bench provides a principled testbed for measuring and advancing long-horizon reasoning for egocentric embodied perception.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种新的 egocentric 场景预测任务和基准 EXPLORE-Bench，用于评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在长时程物理推理方面的能力。实验表明，MLLMs 在此任务上与人类存在显著差距，表明长时程 egocentric 推理仍具挑战性。分步推理可部分缓解此问题，但会增加计算开销。
AI.motivation: 当前 MLLMs 被视为具身智能体（embodied agents）的基础，但其是否能可靠地从 egocentric 视角推理动作的长期物理后果尚不清楚，这促使了本研究。
AI.method: 提出 Egocentric Scene Prediction with LOng-horizon REasoning (ESPLORE) 任务，并构建 EXPLORE-Bench 数据集，该数据集包含从第一人称视频中提取的，具有长动作序列和结构化最终场景标注（包括对象类别、视觉属性和对象间关系）的实例。对多种 MLLMs 进行实验评估，并分析了分步推理（stepwise reasoning）的测试时间缩放。
AI.result: 在 EXPLORE-Bench 上，MLLMs 的表现与人类存在显著的性能差距，表明长时程 egocentric 推理是 MLLMs 面临的一大挑战。通过分步推理，可以一定程度上提升性能，但同时也会带来可观的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: EXPLORE-Bench 提供了一个原则性的测试平台，用于衡量和推进 egocentric 具身感知的长时程推理能力。当前 MLLMs 在处理长时程 egocentric 推理方面仍需大幅改进。

title: Trajectory Optimization for Self-Wrap-Aware Cable-Towed Planar Object Manipulation under Implicit Tension Constraints
summary: Cable/rope elements are pervasive in deformable-object manipulation, often serving as a deformable force-transmission medium whose routing and contact determine how wrenches are delivered. In cable-towed manipulation, transmission is unilateral and hybrid: the tether can pull only when taut and becomes force-free when slack; in practice, the tether may also contact the object boundary and self-wrap around edges, which is not merely collision avoidance but a change of the wrench transmission channel by shifting the effective application point and moment arm, thereby coupling routing geometry with rigid-body motion and tensioning. We formulate self-wrap towing as a routing-aware, tensioning-implicit trajectory optimization (TITO) problem that couples (i) a tensioning-implicit taut/slack constraint and (ii) routing-conditioned transmission maps for effective length and wrench, and we build a relaxation hierarchy from a strict mode-conditioned reference to three tractable relaxations: Full-Mode Relaxation (FMR), Binary-Mode Relaxation (BMR), and Implicit-Mode Relaxation (IMR). Across planar towing tasks, we find that making routing an explicit decision often yields conservative solutions that stay near switching boundaries, whereas IMR induces self-wrap through state evolution and exploits the redirected torque channel whenever turning requires it.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为TITO（路由感知、张力隐含轨迹优化）的新方法，用于解决电缆牵引操作中的自缠绕问题，该方法将张力状态和路由几何结合起来，以优化操作轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有的电缆牵引操作方法在处理电缆与物体边界接触并发生自缠绕时存在不足。自缠绕改变了力的传递方式，影响了操作效果，需要更精细的建模和优化。
AI.method: 将自缠绕牵引问题建模为路由感知、张力隐含轨迹优化（TITO）问题。该问题包含张力隐含的紧/松约束和基于路由的有效长度和力矩传递映射。研究人员构建了一个从严格模式条件参考到三种可处理松弛（FMR、BMR、IMR）的松弛层次结构。
AI.result: 在平面牵引任务中，显式考虑路由会得到保守解。而IMR通过状态演化诱导自缠绕，并在需要转向时利用重定向的力矩通道，实现了更优的操作。
AI.conclusion: IMR方法能够有效地处理电缆牵引中的自缠绕现象，并能动态地利用自缠绕带来的力矩通道，从而在操作中取得更好的效果，尤其是在需要转向的情况下。

title: Quantifying the Necessity of Chain of Thought through Opaque Serial Depth
summary: Large language models (LLMs) tend to externalize their reasoning in their chain of thought, making the chain of thought a good target for monitoring. This is partially an inherent feature of the Transformer architecture: sufficiently long serial cognition must pass through the chain of thought (Korbak et al., 2025). We formalize this argument through the notion of opaque serial depth, given by the length of the longest computation that can be done without the use of interpretable intermediate steps like chain of thought. Given this formalization, we compute numeric upper bounds on the opaque serial depth of Gemma 3 models, as well as asymptotic results for additional architectures beyond standard LLMs. We also open-source an automated method that can calculate upper bounds on the opaque serial depth of arbitrary neural networks, and use it to demonstrate that Mixture-of-Experts models likely have lower depth than dense models. Overall, our results suggest that opaque serial depth is a useful tool for understanding the potential for models to do significant reasoning that is not externalized.

AI.tldr: 该论文引入了“不透明串行深度”的概念，用于量化模型在没有可解释中间步骤（如思维链）的情况下进行串行计算的长度。研究人员计算了 Gemma 3 模型的不透明串行深度的数值上限，并为其他架构提供了渐进式结果。他们还开源了一个自动计算不透明串行深度上限的方法，并表明混合专家模型可能比密集模型具有更低的不透明串行深度。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）倾向于将其推理过程外化为思维链，这使得思维链成为监控模型的良好目标。作者认为 Transformer 架构的特性使得足够长的串行认知必须通过思维链。
AI.method: 作者通过“不透明串行深度”的概念形式化了其论点，该概念定义为在不使用可解释中间步骤（如思维链）的情况下可以完成的最长计算的长度。他们计算了 Gemma 3 模型的不透明串行深度的数值上限，并为其他架构提供了渐进式结果。此外，他们开源了一个自动计算任意神经网络不透明串行深度上限的方法。
AI.result: 研究计算了 Gemma 3 模型的不透明串行深度的数值上限，并为除标准 LLM 之外的其他架构提供了渐进式结果。他们开源的自动化方法表明，混合专家模型（Mixture-of-Experts models）可能比密集模型具有更低的不透明串行深度。
AI.conclusion: 不透明串行深度是一个有用的工具，可以理解模型进行未外化的大量推理的潜力。研究结果表明，不透明串行深度可以作为衡量模型可解释性的一种方式，并为模型架构的选择提供指导。

title: ReTac-ACT: A State-Gated Vision-Tactile Fusion Transformer for Precision Assembly
summary: Precision assembly requires sub-millimeter corrections in contact-rich "last-millimeter" regions where visual feedback fails due to occlusion from the end-effector and workpiece. We present ReTac-ACT (Reconstruction-enhanced Tactile ACT), a vision-tactile imitation learning policy that addresses this challenge through three synergistic mechanisms: (i) bidirectional cross-attention enabling reciprocal visuo-tactile feature enhancement before fusion, (ii) a proprioception-conditioned gating network that dynamically elevates tactile reliance when visual occlusion occurs, and (iii) a tactile reconstruction objective enforcing learning of manipulation-relevant contact information rather than generic visual textures. Evaluated on the standardized NIST Assembly Task Board M1 benchmark, ReTac-ACT achieves 90% peg-in-hole success, substantially outperforming vision-only and generalist baseline methods, and maintains 80% success at industrial-grade 0.1mm clearance. Ablation studies validate that each architectural component is indispensable. The ReTac-ACT codebase and a vision-tactile demonstration dataset covering various clearance levels with both visual and tactile features will be released to support reproducible research.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ReTac-ACT的视觉-触觉模仿学习策略，通过交叉注意力、触觉依赖门控和触觉重构来解决精度组装中的“最后毫米”问题，在NIST组装任务板上取得了90%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 在精度组装过程中，由于末端执行器和工件的遮挡，视觉反馈在接触丰富的“最后毫米”区域失效，导致亚毫米级校正困难。
AI.method: ReTac-ACT策略包含三个机制：(i) 双向交叉注意力，用于融合前的视觉-触觉特征增强；(ii) 本体感觉条件门控网络，在视觉遮挡时动态提高触觉依赖性；(iii) 触觉重构目标，强制学习与操作相关的触觉信息而非通用视觉纹理。
AI.result: 在NIST组装任务板M1基准测试中，ReTac-ACT实现了90%的Peg-in-hole成功率，显著优于仅视觉和通用基线方法。在0.1mm的工业级间隙下，成功率仍保持在80%。消融实验证明了每个组件的必要性。
AI.conclusion: ReTac-ACT是一种有效的解决精度组装中视觉遮挡问题的视觉-触觉模仿学习策略，其提出的创新机制在标准基准测试中表现出色，并将在代码和数据集发布后支持未来研究。

title: HelixTrack: Event-Based Tracking and RPM Estimation of Propeller-like Objects
summary: Safety-critical perception for unmanned aerial vehicles and rotating machinery requires microsecond-latency tracking of fast, periodic motion under egomotion and strong distractors. Frame-based and event-based trackers drift or break on propellers because periodic signatures violate their smooth-motion assumptions. We tackle this gap with HelixTrack, a fully event-driven method that jointly tracks propeller-like objects and estimates their rotations per minute (RPM). Incoming events are back-warped from the image plane into the rotor plane via a homography estimated on the fly. A Kalman Filter maintains instantaneous estimates of phase. Batched iterative updates refine the object pose by coupling phase residuals to geometry. To our knowledge, no public dataset targets joint tracking and RPM estimation of propeller-like objects. We therefore introduce the Timestamped Quadcopter with Egomotion (TQE) dataset with 13 high-resolution event sequences, containing 52 rotating objects in total, captured at distances of 2 m / 4 m, with increasing egomotion and microsecond RPM ground truth. On TQE, HelixTrack processes full-rate events (approx. 11.8x real time) faster than real time and microsecond latency. It consistently outperforms per-event and aggregation-based baselines adapted for RPM estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HelixTrack的事件驱动方法，用于在复杂场景下（如无人机和旋转机械）精确跟踪快速、周期性运动的螺旋桨状物体，并同时估计其转速（RPM）。
AI.motivation: 现有基于帧和事件的跟踪器在处理周期性运动（如螺旋桨）时，由于其平滑运动假设会被违反，容易出现漂移或失效。在安全关键应用中，对这类物体的微秒级延迟跟踪和RPM估计需求迫切。
AI.method: HelixTrack是一种完全事件驱动的方法。它通过实时估计的同源变换将事件从图像平面反向映射到转子平面。利用卡尔曼滤波器维持瞬时相位估计，并通过批量迭代更新来耦合相位残差和几何信息，从而优化物体姿态。该方法还介绍了Timestamped Quadcopter with Egomotion (TQE)数据集，包含13个高分辨率事件序列，共52个旋转物体，具备真实世界中的复杂运动和微秒级RPM真值。
AI.result: HelixTrack能够以约11.8倍的实时速率处理全速率事件，实现微秒级延迟。在TQE数据集上，HelixTrack的性能一致优于为RPM估计改编的基于事件或聚合的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HelixTrack成功解决了现有跟踪器在处理周期性运动物体时的局限性，并在复杂动态环境下实现了高效、精确的物体跟踪和RPM估计，为安全关键的感知任务提供了新的解决方案。

title: Think Before You Lie: How Reasoning Improves Honesty
summary: While existing evaluations of large language models (LLMs) measure deception rates, the underlying conditions that give rise to deceptive behavior are poorly understood. We investigate this question using a novel dataset of realistic moral trade-offs where honesty incurs variable costs. Contrary to humans, who tend to become less honest given time to deliberate (Capraro, 2017; Capraro et al., 2019), we find that reasoning consistently increases honesty across scales and for several LLM families. This effect is not only a function of the reasoning content, as reasoning traces are often poor predictors of final behaviors. Rather, we show that the underlying geometry of the representational space itself contributes to the effect. Namely, we observe that deceptive regions within this space are metastable: deceptive answers are more easily destabilized by input paraphrasing, output resampling, and activation noise than honest ones. We interpret the effect of reasoning in this vein: generating deliberative tokens as part of moral reasoning entails the traversal of a biased representational space, ultimately nudging the model toward its more stable, honest defaults.

AI.tldr: 本研究发现，与人类在深思熟虑后变得不那么诚实时不同，大型语言模型（LLMs）在推理后会变得更诚实。研究表明，这种现象并非源于推理的内容本身，而是由于模型内部表示空间中，欺骗性区域比诚实性区域更不稳定。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型（LLMs）评估主要关注欺骗率，但对导致欺骗行为的根本原因缺乏了解。
AI.method: 研究者构建了一个包含现实道德权衡且诚实性成本可变的全新数据集。通过分析LLMs在处理这些情境时的行为，并结合对模型内部表示空间的几何结构分析，研究者探究了推理过程对LLMs诚实性的影响。
AI.result: 与人类不同，LLMs在经过推理后，无论模型规模和模型家族如何，其诚实度均得到提升。这种提升并非仅仅是推理内容所致，因为推理过程（reasoning traces）往往不能很好地预测最终行为。研究者发现，模型表示空间中的欺骗性区域是不稳定的（metastable），更容易受到输入改写、输出重采样和激活噪声的影响，而诚实性区域则相对稳定。
AI.conclusion: 推理过程通过引导模型穿越一个有偏差的表示空间，能够将LLMs推向其更稳定的、默认的诚实状态。研究者认为，表示空间的内在几何结构（即欺骗性区域的不稳定性）是LLMs在推理后变得更诚实的关键因素。

title: Influencing LLM Multi-Agent Dialogue via Policy-Parameterized Prompts
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as a new paradigm for multi-agent systems. However, existing research on the behaviour of LLM-based multi-agents relies on ad hoc prompts and lacks a principled policy perspective. Different from reinforcement learning, we investigate whether prompt-as-action can be parameterized so as to construct a lightweight policy which consists of a sequence of state-action pairs to influence conversational behaviours without training. Our framework regards prompts as actions executed by LLMs, and dynamically constructs prompts through five components based on the current state of the agent. To test the effectiveness of parameterized control, we evaluated the dialogue flow based on five indicators: responsiveness, rebuttal, evidence usage, non-repetition, and stance shift. We conduct experiments using different LLM-driven agents in two discussion scenarios related to the general public and show that prompt parameterization can influence the dialogue dynamics. This result shows that policy-parameterised prompts offer a simple and effective mechanism to influence the dialogue process, which will help the research of multi-agent systems in the direction of social simulation.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种将提示视为动作、通过参数化来影响大型语言模型（LLM）多智能体系统对话行为的新方法，无需训练，并证明了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有关于基于 LLM 的多智能体系统的研究依赖于临时的提示，缺乏原则性的策略视角。研究动机是探索一种轻量级的策略，能够通过参数化提示来影响对话行为，而无需进行强化学习式的训练。
AI.method: 将提示视为 LLM 代理执行的动作，并基于代理的当前状态，通过五个组件动态地构建提示。通过五个指标（响应性、反驳、证据使用、不重复、立场转变）评估对话流程，并在两个讨论场景中进行实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，参数化提示能够有效影响 LLM 驱动的代理之间的对话动态。具体来说，参数化提示可以影响对话的响应性、反驳、证据使用、不重复性以及立场转变。
AI.conclusion: 策略参数化提示为影响对话过程提供了一种简单有效的机制，这有助于将多智能体系统的研究推向社会模拟的方向。

title: LCA: Local Classifier Alignment for Continual Learning
summary: A fundamental requirement for intelligent systems is the ability to learn continuously under changing environments. However, models trained in this regime often suffer from catastrophic forgetting. Leveraging pre-trained models has recently emerged as a promising solution, since their generalized feature extractors enable faster and more robust adaptation. While some earlier works mitigate forgetting by fine-tuning only on the first task, this approach quickly deteriorates as the number of tasks grows and the data distributions diverge. More recent research instead seeks to consolidate task knowledge into a unified backbone, or adapting the backbone as new tasks arrive. However, such approaches may create a (potential) \textit{mismatch} between task-specific classifiers and the adapted backbone. To address this issue, we propose a novel \textit{Local Classifier Alignment} (LCA) loss to better align the classifier with backbone. Theoretically, we show that this LCA loss can enable the classifier to not only generalize well for all observed tasks, but also improve robustness. Furthermore, we develop a complete solution for continual learning, following the model merging approach and using LCA. Extensive experiments on several standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method often achieves leading performance, sometimes surpasses the state-of-the-art methods with a large margin.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“局部分类器对齐”（LCA）的新型损失函数，旨在解决持续学习中模型灾难性遗忘的问题，并通过模型合并方法实现了一个完整的持续学习解决方案，在多个基准测试中取得了领先的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法在面对不断变化的环境时，模型容易发生灾难性遗忘。虽然利用预训练模型可以缓解这个问题，但随着任务数量增加和数据分布发散，单纯的微调效果会迅速下降。而将任务知识整合到统一骨干网络或动态调整骨干网络的方法，可能会导致任务特定分类器与骨干网络之间出现潜在的不匹配。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为“局部分类器对齐”（LCA）的损失函数，以更好地对齐分类器和骨干网络。在此基础上，结合模型合并方法，开发了一个完整的持续学习解决方案。
AI.result: 理论上证明了LCA损失能够使分类器不仅在所有已观察到的任务上表现良好，还能提高鲁棒性。实验结果表明，该方法在多个标准基准测试中取得了领先的性能，有时甚至显著超越了现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 局部分类器对齐（LCA）损失是一种有效的方法，可以解决持续学习中分类器与骨干网络不匹配的问题，从而提升模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性。结合模型合并方法，该方案在持续学习任务中表现出色。

title: BridgeDiff: Bridging Human Observations and Flat-Garment Synthesis for Virtual Try-Off
summary: Virtual try-off (VTOFF) aims to recover canonical flat-garment representations from images of dressed persons for standardized display and downstream virtual try-on. Prior methods often treat VTOFF as direct image translation driven by local masks or text-only prompts, overlooking the gap between on-body appearances and flat layouts. This gap frequently leads to inconsistent completion in unobserved regions and unstable garment structure. We propose BridgeDiff, a diffusion-based framework that explicitly bridges human-centric observations and flat-garment synthesis through two complementary components. First, the Garment Condition Bridge Module (GCBM) builds a garment-cue representation that captures global appearance and semantic identity, enabling robust inference of continuous details under partial visibility. Second, the Flat Structure Constraint Module (FSCM) injects explicit flat-garment structural priors via Flat-Constraint Attention (FC-Attention) at selected denoising stages, improving structural stability beyond text-only conditioning. Extensive experiments on standard VTOFF benchmarks show that BridgeDiff achieves state-of-the-art performance, producing higher-quality flat-garment reconstructions while preserving fine-grained appearance and structural integrity.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为BridgeDiff的基于扩散的框架，通过GCBM和FSCM两个模块，显式地连接人体观察和平面服装合成，以解决现有VTOFF方法在处理未观测区域和服装结构稳定性方面存在的不足，并在标准VTOFF基准上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VTOFF方法常将问题视为直接图像翻译，忽略了人体穿着外观与平面布局之间的差异，导致在未观测区域的修复不一致以及服装结构不稳定。
AI.method: 提出BridgeDiff框架，包含两个互补组件：1. 服装条件桥接模块 (GCBM)，构建捕捉全局外观和语义身份的服装线索表示，以增强对部分可见区域的连续细节推断能力。2. 平面结构约束模块 (FSCM)，通过Flat-Constraint Attention (FC-Attention)在特定去噪阶段注入显式的平面服装结构先验，以提高结构稳定性。
AI.result: 在标准VTOFF基准上的大量实验表明，BridgeDiff实现了最先进的性能，产生了更高质量的平面服装重建，同时保留了细粒度的外观和结构完整性。
AI.conclusion: BridgeDiff通过显式地连接人体观察和平面服装合成，并引入服装条件和结构先验，有效解决了现有VTOFF方法的局限性，能够生成高质量且结构稳定的平面服装表示。

title: SCDP: Learning Humanoid Locomotion from Partial Observations via Mixed-Observation Distillation
summary: Distilling humanoid locomotion control from offline datasets into deployable policies remains a challenge, as existing methods rely on privileged full-body states that require complex and often unreliable state estimation. We present Sensor-Conditioned Diffusion Policies (SCDP) that enables humanoid locomotion using only onboard sensors, eliminating the need for explicit state estimation. SCDP decouples sensing from supervision through mixed-observation training: diffusion model conditions on sensor histories while being supervised to predict privileged future state-action trajectories, enforcing the model to infer the motion dynamics under partial observability. We further develop restricted denoising, context distribution alignment, and context-aware attention masking to encourage implicit state estimation within the model and to prevent train-deploy mismatch. We validate SCDP on velocity-commanded locomotion and motion reference tracking tasks. In simulation, SCDP achieves near-perfect success on velocity control (99-100%) and 93% tracking success in AMASS test set, performing comparable to privileged baselines while using only onboard sensors. Finally, we deploy the trained policy on a real G1 humanoid at 50 Hz, demonstrating robust real robot locomotion without external sensing or state estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 SCDP 的方法，允许人形机器人仅使用车载传感器进行运动控制，无需依赖复杂的外部状态估计。通过混合观测训练，SCDP 能够从传感器历史推断运动动力学，并在真实机器人上成功实现了稳定的运动。
AI.motivation: 现有的人形机器人运动控制方法通常需要依赖特权的全身状态信息，而这些信息需要复杂的、有时不可靠的状态估计，这限制了其在实际部署中的应用。研究动机是开发一种仅使用车载传感器就能实现高效鲁棒的人形机器人运动控制的方法。
AI.method: SCDP 采用了一种混合观测训练策略，将传感器信息与特权信息相结合。扩散模型以传感器历史作为条件，并被监督以预测特权状态-动作轨迹。为了解决训练-部署不匹配问题，还开发了限制去噪、上下文分布对齐和上下文感知注意力掩码等技术。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中，SCDP 在速度控制任务上取得了近乎完美的成功率（99-100%），在 AMASS 数据集上的运动跟踪任务上也达到了 93% 的成功率，性能与依赖特权信息的基线方法相当。此外，在真实 G1 人形机器人上以 50 Hz 的频率成功部署了训练好的策略，实现了无需外部传感或状态估计的稳定机器人运动。
AI.conclusion: SCDP 成功地将人形机器人运动控制从离线数据集提取到可部署策略，并且能够仅依靠车载传感器进行运动，消除了对复杂状态估计的依赖。该方法在模拟和真实机器人部署中均表现出优异的性能，证明了其在实际人形机器人应用中的潜力。

title: A Generalized Voronoi Graph based Coverage Control Approach for Non-Convex Environment
summary: To address the challenge of efficient coverage by multi-robot systems in non-convex regions with multiple obstacles, this paper proposes a coverage control method based on the Generalized Voronoi Graph (GVG), which has two phases: Load-Balancing Algorithm phase and Collaborative Coverage phase. In Load-Balancing Algorithm phase, the non-convex region is partitioned into multiple sub-regions based on GVG. Besides, a weighted load-balancing algorithm is developed, which considers the quality differences among sub-regions. By iteratively optimizing the robot allocation ratio, the number of robots in each sub-region is matched with the sub-region quality to achieve load balance. In Collaborative Coverage phase, each robot is controlled by a new controller to effectively coverage the region. The convergence of the method is proved and its performance is evaluated through simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于广义Voronoi图（GVG）的多机器人非凸区域覆盖控制方法，包含负载均衡和协同覆盖两个阶段，通过优化机器人分配以匹配区域质量，并证明了方法的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 解决多机器人系统在非凸区域和多障碍物环境下进行高效覆盖的挑战。
AI.method: 1. 负载均衡阶段：利用GVG划分非凸区域，并设计带权重的负载均衡算法，考虑子区域的质量差异，通过迭代优化机器人分配比例来实现负载均衡。2. 协同覆盖阶段：设计新的控制器，使每个机器人有效地覆盖其分配的区域。
AI.result: 通过仿真评估了该方法的性能，并证明了其收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够实现多机器人系统在非凸区域的有效覆盖，并通过负载均衡策略优化了资源分配。

title: MedMASLab: A Unified Orchestration Framework for Benchmarking Multimodal Medical Multi-Agent Systems
summary: While Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) show potential for complex clinical decision support, the field remains hindered by architectural fragmentation and the lack of standardized multimodal integration. Current medical MAS research suffers from non-uniform data ingestion pipelines, inconsistent visual-reasoning evaluation, and a lack of cross-specialty benchmarking. To address these challenges, we present MedMASLab, a unified framework and benchmarking platform for multimodal medical multi-agent systems. MedMASLab introduces: (1) A standardized multimodal agent communication protocol that enables seamless integration of 11 heterogeneous MAS architectures across 24 medical modalities. (2) An automated clinical reasoning evaluator, a zero-shot semantic evaluation paradigm that overcomes the limitations of lexical string-matching by leveraging large vision-language models to verify diagnostic logic and visual grounding. (3) The most extensive benchmark to date, spanning 11 organ systems and 473 diseases, standardizing data from 11 clinical benchmarks. Our systematic evaluation reveals a critical domain-specific performance gap: while MAS improves reasoning depth, current architectures exhibit significant fragility when transitioning between specialized medical sub-domains. We provide a rigorous ablation of interaction mechanisms and cost-performance trade-offs, establishing a new technical baseline for future autonomous clinical systems. The source code and data is publicly available at: https://github.com/NUS-Project/MedMASLab/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了 MedMASLab，一个统一的框架和基准平台，用于解决多模态医疗多智能体系统（MAS）在架构碎片化、多模态集成不足以及缺乏标准化评估方面的问题。该平台包含标准的通信协议、自动化的临床推理评估器以及一个广泛的医学基准测试集。
AI.motivation: 现有的医疗 MAS 研究面临架构碎片化、多模态数据集成困难、评估方法不一致以及缺乏跨专业基准测试等挑战，阻碍了其在复杂临床决策支持中的应用。
AI.method: MedMASLab 包含三个主要组成部分：(1) 标准化的多模态智能体通信协议，支持 11 种异构 MAS 架构和 24 种医疗模态的集成；(2) 自动化的临床推理评估器，采用零样本语义评估范式，利用大型视觉-语言模型验证诊断逻辑和视觉基础；(3) 一个覆盖 11 个器官系统和 473 种疾病的广泛基准测试集，整合了 11 个临床基准的数据。
AI.result: 系统性评估表明，MAS 能够提升推理深度，但在跨领域专业子域转换时表现出显著的脆弱性。研究提供了交互机制和成本-性能权衡的严格消融分析，确立了未来自主临床系统的新技术基线。
AI.conclusion: MedMASLab 提供了一个统一的平台和标准化的评估方法，为开发更可靠、更通用的医疗多智能体系统奠定了基础，并指出了当前 MAS 在跨领域泛化能力上的不足。

title: PathMem: Toward Cognition-Aligned Memory Transformation for Pathology MLLMs
summary: Computational pathology demands both visual pattern recognition and dynamic integration of structured domain knowledge, including taxonomy, grading criteria, and clinical evidence. In practice, diagnostic reasoning requires linking morphological evidence with formal diagnostic and grading criteria. Although multimodal large language models (MLLMs) demonstrate strong vision language reasoning capabilities, they lack explicit mechanisms for structured knowledge integration and interpretable memory control. As a result, existing models struggle to consistently incorporate pathology-specific diagnostic standards during reasoning. Inspired by the hierarchical memory process of human pathologists, we propose PathMem, a memory-centric multimodal framework for pathology MLLMs. PathMem organizes structured pathology knowledge as a long-term memory (LTM) and introduces a Memory Transformer that models the dynamic transition from LTM to working memory (WM) through multimodal memory activation and context-aware knowledge grounding, enabling context-aware memory refinement for downstream reasoning. PathMem achieves SOTA performance across benchmarks, improving WSI-Bench report generation (12.8% WSI-Precision, 10.1% WSI-Relevance) and open-ended diagnosis by 9.7% and 8.9% over prior WSI-based models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 PathMem 的内存中心化多模态框架，用于处理病理学中的大语言模型。该框架通过结构化知识的长时记忆（LTM）和工作记忆（WM）的动态转换，提高了在病理报告生成和开放式诊断任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在病理学诊断中难以整合结构化领域知识（如分类、分级标准和临床证据），导致无法一致地遵循病理学诊断标准。
AI.method: PathMem 框架将病理学知识组织为长时记忆（LTM），并引入了内存 Transformer 模型，通过多模态记忆激活和上下文感知的知识关联，模拟 LTM 到工作记忆（WM）的动态转换，实现上下文感知的记忆细化。
AI.result: PathMem 在 WSI-Bench 报告生成任务上，WSI-Precision 提高了 12.8%，WSI-Relevance 提高了 10.1%。在开放式诊断任务上，性能提升了 9.7% 和 8.9%，优于之前的 WSI（全切片成像）模型。
AI.conclusion: PathMem 框架通过模仿人类病理学家的分层记忆过程，有效地将结构化知识整合到多模态大语言模型中，显著提高了在病理学报告生成和诊断任务上的准确性和相关性。

title: RAE-NWM: Navigation World Model in Dense Visual Representation Space
summary: Visual navigation requires agents to reach goals in complex environments through perception and planning. World models address this task by simulating action-conditioned state transitions to predict future observations. Current navigation world models typically learn state evolution under actions within the compressed latent space of a Variational Autoencoder, where spatial compression often discards fine-grained structural information and hinders precise control. To better understand the propagation characteristics of different representations, we conduct a linear dynamics probe and observe that dense DINOv2 features exhibit stronger linear predictability for action-conditioned transitions. Motivated by this observation, we propose the Representation Autoencoder-based Navigation World Model (RAE-NWM), which models navigation dynamics in a dense visual representation space. We employ a Conditional Diffusion Transformer with Decoupled Diffusion Transformer head (CDiT-DH) to model continuous transitions, and introduce a separate time-driven gating module for dynamics conditioning to regulate action injection strength during generation. Extensive evaluations show that modeling sequential rollouts in this space improves structural stability and action accuracy, benefiting downstream planning and navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于表示自编码器的导航世界模型（RAE-NWM），通过在稠密的视觉表示空间中建模状态转移，来解决现有导航世界模型因压缩导致精度下降的问题。该模型使用条件扩散Transformer（CDiT-DH）来建模连续状态转移，并引入时间驱动的门控模块来调节动作注入强度，实验证明该方法能提升结构稳定性和动作精度。
AI.motivation: 现有的导航世界模型通常在变分自编码器的压缩潜在空间中学习状态演化，这种空间压缩会丢失精细的结构信息，影响精确控制。研究者观察到稠密的DINOv2特征在动作条件转移方面具有更强的线性可预测性，这启发了他们提出在稠密视觉表示空间中建模导航动态的模型。
AI.method: 提出表示自编码器导航世界模型（RAE-NWM），在稠密的视觉表示空间中建模导航动力学。使用条件扩散Transformer（CDiT-DH）建模连续转移，并引入独立的时间驱动门控模块进行动力学条件约束，以调节生成过程中动作注入的强度。
AI.result: 在稠密视觉表示空间中建模顺序回放，显著提高了结构稳定性和动作精度，从而有利于下游的规划和导航任务。
AI.conclusion: 通过在稠密的视觉表示空间中建模导航世界模型，可以克服因压缩导致的精度问题，提升导航性能。RAE-NWM及其提出的CDiT-DH和门控机制在提高结构稳定性和动作精度方面表现出色。

title: When Detectors Forget Forensics: Blocking Semantic Shortcuts for Generalizable AI-Generated Image Detection
summary: AI-generated image detection has become increasingly important with the rapid advancement of generative AI. However, detectors built on Vision Foundation Models (VFMs, \emph{e.g.}, CLIP) often struggle to generalize to images created using unseen generation pipelines. We identify, for the first time, a key failure mechanism, termed \emph{semantic fallback}, where VFM-based detectors rely on dominant pre-trained semantic priors (such as identity) rather than forgery-specific traces under distribution shifts. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{Geometric Semantic Decoupling (GSD)}, a parameter-free module that explicitly removes semantic components from learned representations by leveraging a frozen VFM as a semantic guide with a trainable VFM as an artifact detector. GSD estimates semantic directions from batch-wise statistics and projects them out via a geometric constraint, forcing the artifact detector to rely on semantic-invariant forensic evidence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, achieving 94.4\% video-level AUC (+\textbf{1.2\%}) in cross-dataset evaluation, improving robustness to unseen manipulations (+\textbf{3.0\%} on DF40), and generalizing beyond faces to the detection of synthetic images of general scenes, including UniversalFakeDetect (+\textbf{0.9\%}) and GenImage (+\textbf{1.7\%}).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 GSD（Geometric Semantic Decoupling）的新方法，用于检测 AI 生成的图像，该方法通过解耦语义信息和伪影特征来提高检测器的泛化能力，尤其是在面对未知的生成技术时。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于视觉基础模型（VFM）的 AI 生成图像检测器在面对来自未知生成流程的图像时泛化能力差。研究发现，这是因为这些检测器过于依赖 VFM 预训练的语义先验（如身份信息），而不是伪影本身的特征。这种现象被称为“语义回退”。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为 Geometric Semantic Decoupling (GSD) 的参数无关模块。该模块使用一个冻结的 VFM 作为语义引导，一个可训练的 VFM 作为伪影检测器。GSD 通过批量统计信息估计语义方向，并利用几何约束将其从表示中投影出去，迫使伪影检测器依赖于与语义无关的取证证据。
AI.result: GSD 在交叉数据集评估中取得了 94.4% 的视频级 AUC（+1.2%），在面对未知操纵时提高了 3.0% 的鲁棒性。此外，该方法还能有效检测非人脸的通用场景合成图像，在 UniversalFakeDetect 和 GenImage 数据集上分别提高了 0.9% 和 1.7%。
AI.conclusion: GSD 方法能够有效解决现有 VFM 检测器在面对分布外数据时的泛化能力问题，通过显式地移除语义信息，使得检测器能够专注于更可靠的伪影特征，从而实现更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Towards Terrain-Aware Safe Locomotion for Quadrupedal Robots Using Proprioceptive Sensing
summary: Achieving safe quadrupedal locomotion in real-world environments has attracted much attention in recent years. When walking over uneven terrain, achieving reliable estimation and realising safety-critical control based on the obtained information is still an open question. To address this challenge, especially for low-cost robots equipped solely with proprioceptive sensors (e.g., IMUs, joint encoders, and contact force sensors), this work first presents an estimation framework that generates a 2.5-D terrain map and extracts support plane parameters, which are then integrated into contact and state estimation. Then, we integrate this estimation framework into a safety-critical control pipeline by formulating control barrier functions that provide rigorous safety guarantees. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed terrain estimation method provides smooth terrain representations. Moreover, the coupled estimation framework of terrain, state, and contact reduces the mean absolute error of base position estimation by 64.8%, decreases the estimation variance by 47.2%, and improves the robustness of contact estimation compared to a decoupled framework. The terrain-informed CBFs integrate historical terrain information and current proprioceptive measurements to ensure global safety by keeping the robot out of hazardous areas and local safety by preventing body-terrain collision, relying solely on proprioceptive sensing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合2.5D地形图估计和控制障碍函数的框架，用于在复杂地形上实现四足机器人的安全自主运动，仅依赖本体感觉传感器。
AI.motivation: 在现实世界的不平坦地形上实现四足机器人的可靠状态估计和安全控制，特别是对于仅配备本体感觉传感器的低成本机器人，是一个未解决的挑战。
AI.method: 研究首先提出了一个地形估计框架，生成2.5D地形图并提取支撑平面参数，然后将其整合到接触和状态估计中。接着，将该估计框架整合到一个安全关键控制流程中，通过制定控制障碍函数来提供严格的安全保证。
AI.result: 提出的地形估计方法能够生成平滑的地形表示。耦合的地形、状态和接触估计框架将基座位置估计的平均绝对误差降低了64.8%，估计方差降低了47.2%，并提高了接触估计的鲁棒性。地形感知的控制障碍函数能够确保全局安全（避开危险区域）和局部安全（防止身体与地形碰撞）。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功地开发了一种仅依赖本体感觉传感器、能够估计地形并集成到安全关键控制中的框架，为低成本四足机器人在复杂地形上的安全自主运动提供了解决方案。

title: Towards Instance Segmentation with Polygon Detection Transformers
summary: One of the bottlenecks for instance segmentation today lies in the conflicting requirements of high-resolution inputs and lightweight, real-time inference. To address this bottleneck, we present a Polygon Detection Transformer (Poly-DETR) to reformulate instance segmentation as sparse vertex regression via Polar Representation, thereby eliminating the reliance on dense pixel-wise mask prediction. Considering the box-to-polygon reference shift in Detection Transformers, we propose Polar Deformable Attention and Position-Aware Training Scheme to dynamically update supervision and focus attention on boundary cues. Compared with state-of-the-art polar-based methods, Poly-DETR achieves a 4.7 mAP improvement on MS COCO test-dev. Moreover, we construct a parallel mask-based counterpart to support a systematic comparison between polar and mask representations. Experimental results show that Poly-DETR is more lightweight in high-resolution scenarios, reducing memory consumption by almost half on Cityscapes dataset. Notably, on PanNuke (cell segmentation) and SpaceNet (building footprints) datasets, Poly-DETR surpasses its mask-based counterpart on all metrics, which validates its advantage on regular-shaped instances in domain-specific settings.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Poly-DETR的实例分割新方法，通过稀疏顶点回归和极坐标表示来解决高分辨率输入和实时推理之间的冲突，无需密集像素预测。该方法在MS COCO上取得了显著的性能提升，并在Cityscapes、PanNuke和SpaceNet数据集上证明了其在内存效率和特定领域（如规则形状实例）上的优势。
AI.motivation: 当前实例分割面临高分辨率输入和轻量级实时推理之间的矛盾。现有的方法依赖于密集的像素级掩码预测，这在计算上可能很昂贵。
AI.method: 将实例分割重构为稀疏顶点回归问题，利用极坐标表示。引入了Polar Deformable Attention和Position-Aware Training Scheme来动态更新监督并关注边界线索。与现有的Detection Transformers中的box-to-polygon参考转移问题进行了比较。
AI.result: Poly-DETR在MS COCO test-dev上取得了4.7 mAP的提升。在Cityscapes数据集上，与基于掩码的方法相比，内存消耗减少了近一半。在PanNuke和SpaceNet数据集上，Poly-DETR在所有指标上都优于其基于掩码的对应物，尤其是在规则形状的实例分割方面。
AI.conclusion: Poly-DETR通过极坐标表示和稀疏顶点回归，有效地解决了实例分割中的高分辨率输入和实时推理的瓶颈。该方法在内存效率和准确性方面表现出色，尤其是在处理规则形状的实例和特定领域的数据集时，证明了其相较于基于像素掩码方法的优势。

title: DRIFT: Dual-Representation Inter-Fusion Transformer for Automated Driving Perception with 4D Radar Point Clouds
summary: 4D radars, which provide 3D point cloud data along with Doppler velocity, are attractive components of modern automated driving systems due to their low cost and robustness under adverse weather conditions. However, they provide a significantly lower point cloud density than LiDAR sensors. This makes it important to exploit not only local but also global contextual scene information. This paper proposes DRIFT, a model that effectively captures and fuses both local and global contexts through a dual-path architecture. The model incorporates a point path to aggregate fine-grained local features and a pillar path to encode coarse-grained global features. These two parallel paths are intertwined via novel feature-sharing layers at multiple stages, enabling full utilization of both representations. DRIFT is evaluated on the widely used View-of-Delft (VoD) dataset and a proprietary internal dataset. It outperforms the baselines on the tasks of object detection and/or free road estimation. For example, DRIFT achieves a mean average precision (mAP) of 52.6\% (compared to, say, 45.4\% of CenterPoint) on the VoD dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DRIFT的双路径模型，用于利用4D雷达数据进行自动驾驶场景理解。DRIFT通过并行处理点云和柱状特征，并引入特征共享层，有效融合局部和全局上下文信息，从而提升了物体检测和道路区域估计的性能。
AI.motivation: 4D雷达在自动驾驶中具有成本低、鲁棒性强的优点，但其点云密度较低，需要有效利用局部和全局场景信息来弥补这一不足。
AI.method: DRIFT采用双路径架构：点路径聚合精细局部特征，柱路径编码粗粒度全局特征。两个路径通过多阶段的特征共享层交织，实现对两种表示的充分利用。
AI.result: 在View-of-Delft (VoD) 数据集和内部数据集上，DRIFT在物体检测和/或自由道路估计任务上优于基线模型。例如，在VoD数据集上，DRIFT的平均精度均值 (mAP) 达到了52.6%，高于CenterPoint的45.4%。
AI.conclusion: DRIFT模型能够有效融合4D雷达数据的局部和全局上下文信息，显著提升了自动驾驶场景理解任务的性能。

title: The Confidence Gate Theorem: When Should Ranked Decision Systems Abstain?
summary: Ranked decision systems -- recommenders, ad auctions, clinical triage queues -- must decide when to intervene in ranked outputs and when to abstain. We study when confidence-based abstention monotonically improves decision quality, and when it fails. The formal conditions are simple: rank-alignment and no inversion zones. The substantive contribution is identifying why these conditions hold or fail: the distinction between structural uncertainty (missing data, e.g., cold-start) and contextual uncertainty (missing context, e.g., temporal drift). Empirically, we validate this distinction across three domains: collaborative filtering (MovieLens, 3 distribution shifts), e-commerce intent detection (RetailRocket, Criteo, Yoochoose), and clinical pathway triage (MIMIC-IV). Structural uncertainty produces near-monotonic abstention gains in all domains; structurally grounded confidence signals (observation counts) fail under contextual drift, producing as many monotonicity violations as random abstention on our MovieLens temporal split. Context-aware alternatives -- ensemble disagreement and recency features -- substantially narrow the gap (reducing violations from 3 to 1--2) but do not fully restore monotonicity, suggesting that contextual uncertainty poses qualitatively different challenges. Exception labels defined from residuals degrade substantially under distribution shift (AUC drops from 0.71 to 0.61--0.62 across three splits), providing a clean negative result against the common practice of exception-based intervention. The results provide a practical deployment diagnostic: check C1 and C2 on held-out data before deploying a confidence gate, and match the confidence signal to the dominant uncertainty type.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了在排序决策系统中何时应基于置信度选择性干预（而不是随机选择）的正式条件，并区分了结构性不确定性（如冷启动）和情境性不确定性（如时间漂移）。研究发现，结构性不确定性通常能提高决策质量，而情境性不确定性则会导致基于置信度的干预失效。
AI.motivation: 排序决策系统（如推荐系统、广告竞价、临床分诊）需要在何时干预输出结果、何时放弃之间做出选择。研究旨在确定基于置信度的选择性干预何时能单调地提高决策质量，何时会失败。
AI.method: 研究提出了“秩对齐”和“无反转区域”两个形式化条件，并通过区分结构性不确定性（数据缺失）和情境性不确定性（上下文缺失）来解释这些条件为何成立或失败。在三个领域（协同过滤、电商意图检测、临床路径分诊）进行了实证验证，并使用了不同置信度信号（观察计数、集成不一致性、时新特征）以及异常标签。
AI.result: 结构性不确定性几乎在所有领域都能带来单调的干预增益；基于结构性置信度信号（如观察计数）在情境漂移下会失效，导致干预失败。情境感知的方法（集成不一致性和时新特征）能显著缩小干预失败的差距，但不能完全恢复单调性。异常标签在分布变化下性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 研究为实际部署提供了诊断方法：在部署置信度门控前，应在独立数据上检查秩对齐（C1）和无反转区域（C2）条件，并根据主导的不确定性类型选择合适的置信度信号。情境性不确定性对基于置信度的干预提出了更具挑战性的问题。

title: Multi-model approach for autonomous driving: A comprehensive study on traffic sign-, vehicle- and lane detection and behavioral cloning
summary: Deep learning and computer vision techniques have become increasingly important in the development of self-driving cars. These techniques play a crucial role in enabling self-driving cars to perceive and understand their surroundings, allowing them to safely navigate and make decisions in real-time. Using Neural Networks self-driving cars can accurately identify and classify objects such as pedestrians, other vehicles, and traffic signals. Using deep learning and analyzing data from sensors such as cameras and radar, self-driving cars can predict the likely movement of other objects and plan their own actions accordingly. In this study, a novel approach to enhance the performance of selfdriving cars by using pre-trained and custom-made neural networks for key tasks, including traffic sign classification, vehicle detection, lane detection, and behavioral cloning is provided. The methodology integrates several innovative techniques, such as geometric and color transformations for data augmentation, image normalization, and transfer learning for feature extraction. These techniques are applied to diverse datasets,including the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark (GTSRB), road and lane segmentation datasets, vehicle detection datasets, and data collected using the Udacity selfdriving car simulator to evaluate the model efficacy. The primary objective of the work is to review the state-of-the-art in deep learning and computer vision for self-driving cars. The findings of the work are effective in solving various challenges related to self-driving cars like traffic sign classification, lane prediction, vehicle detection, and behavioral cloning, and provide valuable insights into improving the robustness and reliability of autonomous systems, paving the way for future research and deployment of safer and more efficient self-driving technologies.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种结合预训练和定制神经网络的创新方法，用于增强自动驾驶汽车在交通标志分类、车辆检测、车道检测和行为克隆等关键任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 为了提升自动驾驶汽车感知和理解周围环境的能力，从而实现安全导航和实时决策，需要更先进的深度学习和计算机视觉技术。
AI.method: 采用预训练和定制的神经网络，并结合几何和颜色变换进行数据增强、图像归一化以及迁移学习进行特征提取。研究使用了GTSRB、车道分割、车辆检测和Udacity模拟器等数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 所提出的方法在交通标志分类、车道预测、车辆检测和行为克隆等方面取得了有效成果，解决了自动驾驶汽车面临的各种挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该研究有效解决了自动驾驶汽车的关键技术挑战，为提高自主系统的鲁棒性和可靠性提供了宝贵的见解，并为未来更安全、更高效的自动驾驶技术的研究和部署奠定了基础。

title: Multimodal Graph Representation Learning with Dynamic Information Pathways
summary: Multimodal graphs, where nodes contain heterogeneous features such as images and text, are increasingly common in real-world applications. Effectively learning on such graphs requires both adaptive intra-modal message passing and efficient inter-modal aggregation. However, most existing approaches to multimodal graph learning are typically extended from conventional graph neural networks and rely on static structures or dense attention, which limit flexibility and expressive node embedding learning. In this paper, we propose a novel multimodal graph representation learning framework with Dynamic information Pathways (DiP). By introducing modality-specific pseudo nodes, DiP enables dynamic message routing within each modality via proximity-guided pseudo-node interactions and captures inter-modality dependence through efficient information pathways in a shared state space. This design achieves adaptive, expressive, and sparse message propagation across modalities with linear complexity. We conduct the link prediction and node classification tasks to evaluate performance and carry out full experimental analyses. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that DiP consistently outperforms baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为动态信息路径（DiP）的新型多模态图表示学习框架，通过引入模态特定的伪节点，实现了自适应、高效和稀疏的跨模态信息传播。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态图学习方法通常是基于传统图神经网络的扩展，依赖于静态结构或密集注意力，这限制了灵活性和节点嵌入的学习能力。
AI.method: DiP框架引入模态特定的伪节点，通过邻近引导的伪节点交互实现模态内的动态消息路由，并通过共享状态空间中的高效信息路径捕获模态间的依赖关系。
AI.result: 在链接预测和节点分类任务的广泛实验表明，DiP在多个基准测试中始终优于现有方法，实现了具有线性复杂度的自适应、表达性强的稀疏消息传播。
AI.conclusion: DiP框架通过其新颖的动态信息路径设计，有效地解决了多模态图学习中的挑战，并在实际任务中展现出优越的性能。

title: Robotic Scene Cloning:Advancing Zero-Shot Robotic Scene Adaptation in Manipulation via Visual Prompt Editing
summary: Modern robots can perform a wide range of simple tasks and adapt to diverse scenarios in the well-trained environment. However, deploying pre-trained robot models in real-world user scenarios remains challenging due to their limited zero-shot capabilities, often necessitating extensive on-site data collection. To address this issue, we propose Robotic Scene Cloning (RSC), a novel method designed for scene-specific adaptation by editing existing robot operation trajectories. RSC achieves accurate and scene-consistent sample generation by leveraging a visual prompting mechanism and a carefully tuned condition injection module. Not only transferring textures but also performing moderate shape adaptations in response to the visual prompts, RSC demonstrates reliable task performance across a variety of object types. Experiments across various simulated and real-world environments demonstrate that RSC significantly enhances policy generalization in target environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Robotic Scene Cloning (RSC) 的新方法，通过编辑现有的机器人操作轨迹，实现机器人模型在特定场景下的零样本适应，无需大量现场数据收集。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练机器人模型在真实用户场景中的零样本能力有限，部署困难，需要大量现场数据收集。
AI.method: RSC方法通过视觉提示机制和条件注入模块，编辑现有的机器人操作轨迹，生成准确且场景一致的样本，并能进行纹理转移和适度的形状适应。
AI.result: RSC能够根据视觉提示进行纹理和形状适应，在不同类型的物体上展现出可靠的任务性能。在模拟和真实世界环境中进行的大量实验表明，RSC显著提高了机器人在目标环境中的策略泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RSC是一种有效的场景特定适应方法，通过编辑操作轨迹，能够显著提升机器人模型的零样本泛化能力，降低了在真实世界用户场景中部署的门槛。

title: Let's Verify Math Questions Step by Step
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently achieved remarkable progress in mathematical reasoning. To enable such capabilities, many existing works distill strong reasoning models into long chains of thought or design algorithms to construct high-quality math QA data for training. However, these efforts primarily focus on generating correct reasoning paths and answers, while largely overlooking the validity of the questions themselves. In this work, we propose Math Question Verification (MathQ-Verify), a novel five-stage pipeline designed to rigorously filter ill-posed or under-specified math problems. MathQ-Verify first performs format-level validation to remove redundant instructions and ensure that each question is syntactically well-formed. It then formalizes each question, decomposes it into atomic conditions, and verifies them against mathematical definitions. Next, it detects logical contradictions among these conditions, followed by a goal-oriented completeness check to ensure the question provides sufficient information for solving. To evaluate this task, we use existing benchmarks along with an additional dataset we construct, containing 2,147 math questions with diverse error types, each manually double-validated. Experiments show that MathQ-Verify achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks, improving the F1 score by up to 25 percentage points over the direct verification baseline. It further attains approximately 90% precision and 63% recall through a lightweight model voting scheme. MathQ-Verify offers a scalable and accurate solution for curating reliable mathematical datasets, reducing label noise and avoiding unnecessary computation on invalid questions. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/scuuy/MathQ-Verify.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为MathQ-Verify的五阶段流水线，用于验证数学问题的有效性，过滤掉格式错误、信息不足或存在逻辑矛盾的问题，并在现有基准和新构建的数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型在数学推理方面取得了显著进展，但这些努力主要集中在生成正确的推理路径和答案，而忽略了问题本身的有效性。因此，需要一种方法来过滤掉不规范或定义不明确的数学问题。
AI.method: MathQ-Verify是一个五阶段的流水线：1. 格式级别验证（去除冗余指令，确保语法正确）。2. 问题形式化与原子条件分解（将问题转化为原子条件并与数学定义进行验证）。3. 逻辑矛盾检测。4. 面向目标的完备性检查（确保问题提供的信息足够）。
AI.result: MathQ-Verify在多个基准上取得了最先进的性能，F1分数比直接验证基线提高了25个百分点。通过轻量级模型投票方案，实现了约90%的精确率和63%的召回率。
AI.conclusion: MathQ-Verify为整理可靠的数学数据集提供了一个可扩展且准确的解决方案，能够减少标签噪声并避免在无效问题上进行不必要的计算。

title: Let's Reward Step-by-Step: Step-Aware Contrastive Alignment for Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments
summary: Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE) requires agents to learn complex reasoning from long-horizon human interactions. While Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have driven recent progress, current training paradigms struggle to balance generalization capability, error recovery and training stability. Specifically, (i) policies derived from SFT suffer from compounding errors, struggling to recover from out-of-distribution states, and (ii) Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) methods e.g. GRPO are bottlenecked by sparse outcome rewards. Their binary feedback fails to assign credit to individual steps, leading to gradient signal collapse in failure dominant batches. To address these challenges, we introduce Step-Aware Contrastive Alignment (SACA), a framework designed to extract dense supervision from imperfect trajectories. At its core, the Perception-Grounded Step-Aware auditor evaluates progress step-by-step, disentangling failed trajectories into valid prefixes and exact divergence points. Leveraging these signals, Scenario-Conditioned Group Construction mechanism dynamically routes batches to specialized resampling and optimization strategies. Extensive experiments on VLN-CE benchmarks demonstrate that SACA achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SACA的新框架，用于在连续环境中进行视觉语言导航，以克服现有SFT和RFT方法的局限性， SACA通过感知基础的步进审计和场景条件分组构建来提取轨迹中的密集监督信号，从而提高泛化能力、错误恢复和训练稳定性，并在VLN-CE基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有用于视觉语言导航（VLN-CE）的多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在泛化能力、错误恢复和训练稳定性方面存在不足。SFT方法容易出现累积错误，而RFT方法由于稀疏的奖励信号而受到阻碍，难以进行有效的信用分配。
AI.method: SACA框架包含两个核心组件：1. 感知基础的步进审计（Perception-Grounded Step-Aware auditor），用于逐步评估代理的进展，并将失败的轨迹分解为有效的子轨迹和精确的分歧点。2. 场景条件分组构建（Scenario-Conditioned Group Construction）机制，根据这些信号动态地为不同的批次路由专门的重采样和优化策略。
AI.result: 在VLN-CE基准测试中的广泛实验表明，SACA取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: SACA框架通过从不完美的轨迹中提取密集监督信号，能够有效解决当前VLN-CE训练范式中的挑战，显著提升了模型的泛化能力、错误恢复能力和训练稳定性，并取得了SOTA性能。

title: DenoiseSplat: Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting for Noisy 3D Scene Reconstruction
summary: 3D scene reconstruction and novel-view synthesis are fundamental for VR, robotics, and content creation. However, most NeRF and 3D Gaussian Splatting pipelines assume clean inputs and degrade under real noise and artifacts. We therefore propose DenoiseSplat, a feed-forward 3D Gaussian splatting method for noisy multi-view images. We build a large-scale, scene-consistent noisy--clean benchmark on RE10K by injecting Gaussian, Poisson, speckle, and salt-and-pepper noise with controlled intensities. With a lightweight MVSplat-style feed-forward backbone, we train end-to-end using only clean 2D renderings as supervision and no 3D ground truth. On noisy RE10K, DenoiseSplat outperforms vanilla MVSplat and a strong two-stage baseline (IDF + MVSplat) in PSNR/SSIM and LPIPS across noise types and levels.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DenoiseSplat的即时3D高斯泼溅方法，用于处理带有噪声的多视角图像，并在噪声图像基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的NeRF和3D高斯泼溅方法通常假设输入图像干净，在存在噪声和伪影的真实世界场景中性能会下降。因此，需要一种能够处理噪声输入的3D重建和新视角合成方法。
AI.method: DenoiseSplat采用一种轻量级的MVSplat风格的即时（feed-forward）骨干网络。它通过在RE10K数据集上注入各种类型的噪声（高斯、泊松、斑点、椒盐噪声）并控制噪声强度，构建了一个大规模、场景一致的噪声-干净数据集。模型端到端训练，仅使用干净的2D渲染作为监督，无需3D地面真实数据。
AI.result: 在噪声RE10K数据集上，DenoiseSplat在PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS指标上均优于原始的MVSplat方法以及一种强大的两阶段基线方法（IDF + MVSplat），且在各种噪声类型和强度下都表现出色。
AI.conclusion: DenoiseSplat是一种有效的即时3D高斯泼溅方法，能够鲁棒地处理带噪声的多视角图像，并在3D场景重建和新视角合成方面取得了先进的性能。

title: ForgeDreamer: Industrial Text-to-3D Generation with Multi-Expert LoRA and Cross-View Hypergraph
summary: Current text-to-3D generation methods excel in natural scenes but struggle with industrial applications due to two critical limitations: domain adaptation challenges where conventional LoRA fusion causes knowledge interference across categories, and geometric reasoning deficiencies where pairwise consistency constraints fail to capture higher-order structural dependencies essential for precision manufacturing. We propose a novel framework named ForgeDreamer addressing both challenges through two key innovations. First, we introduce a Multi-Expert LoRA Ensemble mechanism that consolidates multiple category-specific LoRA models into a unified representation, achieving superior cross-category generalization while eliminating knowledge interference. Second, building on enhanced semantic understanding, we develop a Cross-View Hypergraph Geometric Enhancement approach that captures structural dependencies spanning multiple viewpoints simultaneously. These components work synergistically improved semantic understanding, enables more effective geometric reasoning, while hypergraph modeling ensures manufacturing-level consistency. Extensive experiments on a custom industrial dataset demonstrate superior semantic generalization and enhanced geometric fidelity compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Our code and data are provided in the supplementary material attached in the appendix for review purposes.

AI.tldr: ForgeDreamer是一个新颖的文本到3D生成框架，通过多专家LoRA集成和跨视图超图几何增强，解决了工业应用中领域适应和几何推理的不足，并在工业数据集上取得了更好的泛化性和几何保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到3D生成方法在工业应用方面存在局限性：领域适应性差（LoRA融合导致知识干扰）和几何推理能力不足（成对一致性约束无法捕捉高阶结构依赖）。
AI.method: 提出ForgeDreamer框架，包含两项创新：1. 多专家LoRA集成（Multi-Expert LoRA Ensemble）机制，融合多个类别LoRA模型，实现跨类别泛化并消除知识干扰；2. 跨视图超图几何增强（Cross-View Hypergraph Geometric Enhancement）方法，利用增强的语义理解捕捉多视角间的结构依赖。
AI.result: 在自定义工业数据集上的大量实验表明，ForgeDreamer在语义泛化性和几何保真度方面优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: ForgeDreamer通过多专家LoRA集成和跨视图超图几何增强，有效解决了文本到3D生成在工业应用中的领域适应和几何推理挑战，实现了更高的泛化性和精度。

title: Caterpillar-Inspired Spring-Based Compressive Continuum Robot for Bristle-based Exploration
summary: Exploration of confined spaces, such as pipelines and ducts, remains challenging for conventional rigid robots due to limited space, irregular geometry, and restricted access. Inspired by caterpillar locomotion and sensing, this paper presents a compact spring-based tendon-driven continuum robot that integrates with commercial robotic arms for confined-space inspection. The system combines a mechanically compliant continuum body with a tendon actuation module, enabling coupled bending and axial length change, and uses a constant-curvature kinematic model for positional control. Experiments show a mean position error of 4.32 mm under the proposed model and control pipeline. To extend the system from motion to inspection, we integrate an artificial bristle contact sensor and demonstrate surface perception and confined-space exploration through contact interactions. This compact and compliant design offers a cost-effective upgrade for commercial robots and promises effective exploration in challenging environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于弹簧和肌腱驱动的连续体机器人，集成了商用机械臂，用于在狭窄空间（如管道和管道）进行检查，实现了耦合弯曲和轴向伸缩，并通过接触传感器实现了表面感知。
AI.motivation: 传统刚性机器人在狭窄空间（如管道和管道）的探索受到空间限制、几何形状不规则和访问受限等因素的挑战。
AI.method: 该系统结合了机械柔顺的连续体本体和肌腱驱动模块，实现了弯曲和轴向长度变化的耦合。采用恒定曲率运动学模型进行位置控制。集成了人工刷式接触传感器以实现表面感知。
AI.result: 在所提出的模型和控制流程下，实验显示平均位置误差为 4.32 毫米。系统能够通过接触交互进行表面感知和狭窄空间探索。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的紧凑且柔顺的设计为商用机器人提供了一种经济高效的升级方案，有望在挑战性环境中实现有效的探索。

title: Implicit Geometry Representations for Vision-and-Language Navigation from Web Videos
comment: Extension of CVPR 2025 RoomTour3D with implicit geometric representations
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) has long been constrained by the limited diversity and scalability of simulator-curated datasets, which fail to capture the complexity of real-world environments. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a large-scale video-instruction framework derived from web-based room tour videos, enabling agents to learn from natural human walking demonstrations in diverse, realistic indoor settings. Unlike existing datasets, our framework integrates both open-ended description-enriched trajectories and action-enriched trajectories reconstructed in 3D, providing richer spatial and semantic supervision. A key extension in this work is the incorporation of implicit geometry representations, which extract spatial cues directly from RGB frames without requiring fragile 3D reconstruction. This approach substantially improves data utilization, alleviates reconstruction failures, and unlocks large portions of previously unusable video data. Comprehensive experiments across multiple VLN benchmarks (CVDN, SOON, R2R, and REVERIE) demonstrate that our method not only sets new state-of-the-art performance but also enables the development of robust zero-shot navigation agents. By bridging large-scale web videos with implicit spatial reasoning, this work advances embodied navigation towards more scalable, generalizable, and real-world applicable solutions.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种利用网络视频数据进行视觉语言导航（VLN）的新框架，通过整合富含描述和动作的轨迹以及隐式几何表示，提高了数据利用率和代理的泛化能力，并在多个基准测试中达到了新的最先进水平，实现了零样本导航。
AI.motivation: 现有的 VLN 数据集在多样性和可扩展性方面受到限制，无法捕捉真实世界的复杂性。研究动机是克服这一局限，利用大规模网络视频数据来改进 VLN。
AI.method: 研究提出了一种从网络视频中提取的视频-指令框架，用于训练 VLN 代理。该框架集成了描述增强的轨迹和 3D 重建的动作增强轨迹，并引入了隐式几何表示，直接从 RGB 帧中提取空间线索，无需脆弱的 3D 重建。
AI.result: 该方法在 CVDN、SOON、R2R 和 REVERIE 等多个 VLN 基准测试中设定了新的最先进性能。此外，它还实现了强大的零样本导航代理。
AI.conclusion: 通过将大规模网络视频与隐式空间推理相结合，该研究为可扩展、可泛化且适用于现实世界的具身导航解决方案铺平了道路，显著提高了数据利用率和代理的鲁棒性。

title: MuxGel: Simultaneous Dual-Modal Visuo-Tactile Sensing via Spatially Multiplexing and Deep Reconstruction
summary: High-fidelity visuo-tactile sensing is important for precise robotic manipulation. However, most vision-based tactile sensors face a fundamental trade-off: opaque coatings enable tactile sensing but block pre-contact vision. To address this, we propose MuxGel, a spatially multiplexed sensor that captures both external visual information and contact-induced tactile signals through a single camera. By using a checkerboard coating pattern, MuxGel interleaves tactile-sensitive regions with transparent windows for external vision. This design maintains standard form factors, allowing for plug-and-play integration into GelSight-style sensors by simply replacing the gel pad. To recover full-resolution vision and tactile signals from the multiplexed inputs, we develop a U-Net-based reconstruction framework. Leveraging a sim-to-real pipeline, our model effectively decouples and restores high-fidelity tactile and visual fields simultaneously. Experiments on unseen objects demonstrate the framework's generalization and accuracy. Furthermore, we demonstrate MuxGel's utility in grasping tasks, where dual-modality feedback facilitates both pre-contact alignment and post-contact interaction. Results show that MuxGel enhances the perceptual capabilities of existing vision-based tactile sensors while maintaining compatibility with their hardware stacks. Project webpage: https://zhixianhu.github.io/muxgel/.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为MuxGel的传感技术，通过在凝胶表面设计棋盘格图案，利用一个摄像头同时获取外部视觉信息和接触感应的触觉信号，解决了传统视觉触觉传感器在视觉和触觉感知上的权衡问题。通过U-Net模型重建高保真度的视觉和触觉信号，并在抓取任务中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于视觉的触觉传感器面临着不透明涂层阻碍预接触视觉感知的基本权衡问题，限制了精确的机器人操控。
AI.method: 设计了一种空间多路复用传感器MuxGel，在凝胶表面采用棋盘格涂层图案，将触觉敏感区域与透明窗口交错排列。利用U-Net架构的重建框架，从多路复用的输入中恢复全分辨率的视觉和触觉信号。采用仿真到现实（sim-to-real）的流程进行训练和验证。
AI.result: MuxGel能够同时恢复高保真的触觉和视觉场。实验证明该框架在未见过的物体上具有泛化能力和准确性。在抓取任务中，双模态反馈（视觉和触觉）能够同时辅助预接触对齐和后接触交互，提高了感知能力。
AI.conclusion: MuxGel有效地解决了现有视觉触觉传感器的局限性，通过硬件和软件的协同设计，实现了在不增加额外摄像头的情况下，同时获取高保真的视觉和触觉信息，并提升了机器人的操控性能。该传感器与现有的GelSight类传感器硬件兼容，易于集成。

title: Speeding Up the Learning of 3D Gaussians with Much Shorter Gaussian Lists
summary: 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) has become a vital tool for learning a radiance field from multiple posed images. Although 3DGS shows great advantages over NeRF in terms of rendering quality and efficiency, it remains a research challenge to further improve the efficiency of learning 3D Gaussians. To overcome this challenge, we propose novel training strategies and losses to shorten each Gaussian list used to render a pixel, which speeds up the splatting by involving fewer Gaussians along a ray. Specifically, we shrink the size of each Gaussian by resetting their scales regularly, encouraging smaller Gaussians to cover fewer nearby pixels, which shortens the Gaussian lists of pixels. Additionally, we introduce an entropy constraint on the alpha blending procedure to sharpen the weight distribution of Gaussians along each ray, which drives dominant weights larger while making minor weights smaller. As a result, each Gaussian becomes more focused on the pixels where it is dominant, which reduces its impact on nearby pixels, leading to even shorter Gaussian lists. Eventually, we integrate our method into a rendering resolution scheduler which further improves efficiency through progressive resolution increase. We evaluate our method by comparing it with state-of-the-art methods on widely used benchmarks. Our results show significant advantages over others in efficiency without sacrificing rendering quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过缩减高斯球大小和锐化其权重分布来提高3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）训练效率的方法，同时保持渲染质量。此外，还引入了分辨率调度器来进一步加速训练。
AI.motivation: 尽管3DGS在渲染质量和效率方面优于NeRF，但其训练效率仍有待提高。作者希望通过优化高斯球列表的长度来缩短渲染时间。
AI.method:
1. 通过定期重置高斯球的尺度，使其变小，覆盖更少的像素，从而缩短每条射线的高斯球列表。
2. 引入α混合过程的熵约束，锐化沿射线的高斯球权重分布，使主导权重更大，次要权重更小。
3. 集成渲染分辨率调度器，通过逐步提高分辨率来进一步提高效率。
AI.result: 所提出的方法在效率上显著优于现有技术，且不牺牲渲染质量。高斯球变得更聚焦于其主导的像素，减少了对邻近像素的影响，缩短了高斯球列表。
AI.conclusion: 通过采用新的训练策略和损失函数（包括尺度重置和熵约束），可以有效地缩短3D高斯泼溅的训练时间，同时保持甚至提高渲染质量。结合分辨率调度器，进一步提升了整体训练效率。

title: CLoE: Expert Consistency Learning for Missing Modality Segmentation
summary: Multimodal medical image segmentation often faces missing modalities at inference, which induces disagreement among modality experts and makes fusion unstable, particularly on small foreground structures. We propose Consistency Learning of Experts (CLoE), a consistency-driven framework for missing-modality segmentation that preserves strong performance when all modalities are available. CLoE formulates robustness as decision-level expert consistency control and introduces a dual-branch Expert Consistency Learning objective. Modality Expert Consistency enforces global agreement among expert predictions to reduce case-wise drift under partial inputs, while Region Expert Consistency emphasizes agreement on clinically critical foreground regions to avoid background-dominated regularization. We further map consistency scores to modality reliability weights using a lightweight gating network, enabling reliability-aware feature recalibration before fusion. Extensive experiments on BraTS 2020 and MSD Prostate demonstrate that CLoE outperforms state-of-the-art methods in incomplete multimodal segmentation, while exhibiting strong cross-dataset generalization and improving robustness on clinically critical structures.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CLoE的连贯性学习框架，用于处理医学图像分割中多模态数据缺失的问题，通过专家预测的一致性控制和可靠性加权来提高分割性能，尤其是在包含小前景结构的情况下。
AI.motivation: 多模态医学图像分割在推理时常面临模态缺失的问题，这会导致不同模态的专家预测不一致，尤其是在处理小的前景结构时，融合变得不稳定。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于连贯性学习的框架CLoE，通过双分支的专家连贯性学习目标来增强鲁棒性。具体包括：1. 模态专家连贯性：强制专家预测在全局上达成一致，以减少部分输入下的病例漂移。2. 区域专家连贯性：强调在临床关键前景区域上达成一致，避免被背景主导的正则化。此外，还引入了一个轻量级门控网络，将连贯性分数映射到模态可靠性权重，以实现可靠性感知的特征再校准。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2020和MSD Prostate数据集上的广泛实验表明，CLoE在不完整多模态分割方面优于最先进的方法，同时展现出强大的跨数据集泛化能力，并提高了对临床关键结构的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CLoE通过引入决策层面的专家连贯性控制和可靠性加权，有效解决了多模态医学图像分割中模态缺失的问题，并在不完整输入下实现了强劲的分割性能，同时保持了全模态输入下的高水平表现。

title: Learning Convex Decomposition via Feature Fields
summary: This work proposes a new formulation to the long-standing problem of convex decomposition through learning feature fields, enabling the first feed-forward model for open-world convex decomposition. Our method produces high-quality decompositions of 3D shapes into a union of convex bodies, which are essential to accelerate collision detection in physical simulation, amongst many other applications. The key insight is to adopt a feature learning approach and learn a continuous feature field that can later be clustered to yield a good convex decomposition via our self-supervised, purely-geometric objective derived from the classical definition of convexity. Our formulation can be used for single shape optimization, but more importantly, feature prediction unlocks scalable, self-supervised learning on large datasets resulting in the first learned open-world model for convex decomposition. Experiments show that our decompositions are higher-quality than alternatives and generalize across open-world objects as well as across representations to meshes, CAD models, and even Gaussian splats. https://research.nvidia.com/labs/sil/projects/learning-convex-decomp/

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于特征场学习的连续特征场方法，用于三维形状的凸分解，实现了首个用于开放世界凸分解的前馈模型，并能生成高质量的分解结果，且在不同表示上具有良好的泛化性。
AI.motivation: 现有凸分解方法在开放世界场景下存在局限性，而高质量的凸分解对于加速物理模拟中的碰撞检测等应用至关重要。因此，需要一种可扩展、自监督且能处理开放世界问题的凸分解方法。
AI.method: 采用特征学习方法，学习一个连续的特征场。通过自监督的、纯几何的目标函数（源于凸性定义）对该特征场进行聚类，从而得到凸分解。该方法可用于单形状优化，并支持大规模数据集上的自监督学习。
AI.result: 提出的方法能够生成高质量的凸分解，优于现有方法。该方法在开放世界对象以及网格、CAD 模型、高斯溅射等不同表示上都表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于特征场学习的连续特征场方法是实现开放世界凸分解的有效途径，能够生成高质量且泛化性强的凸分解，为物理模拟等下游应用提供了新的解决方案。

title: TIMID: Time-Dependent Mistake Detection in Videos of Robot Executions
summary: As robotic systems execute increasingly difficult task sequences, so does the number of ways in which they can fail. Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) frameworks typically focus on singular, low-level kinematic or action failures, struggling to identify more complex temporal or spatial task violations, because they do not necessarily manifest as low-level execution errors. To address this problem, the main contribution of this paper is a new VAD-inspired architecture, TIMID, which is able to detect robot time-dependent mistakes when executing high-level tasks. Our architecture receives as inputs a video and prompts of the task and the potential mistake, and returns a frame-level prediction in the video of whether the mistake is present or not. By adopting a VAD formulation, the model can be trained with weak supervision, requiring only a single label per video. Additionally, to alleviate the problem of data scarcity of incorrect executions, we introduce a multi-robot simulation dataset with controlled temporal errors and real executions for zero-shot sim-to-real evaluation. Our experiments demonstrate that out-of-the-box VLMs lack the explicit temporal reasoning required for this task, whereas our framework successfully detects different types of temporal errors. Project: https://ropertunizar.github.io/TIMID/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 TIMID 的新型视频异常检测 (VAD) 架构，用于检测机器人执行高层任务时的时间依赖性错误。该模型接受视频和任务提示作为输入，并提供帧级别的错误预测。TIMID 采用 VAD 的范式，可以使用单个视频标签进行弱监督训练，并引入了一个包含模拟和真实数据的多机器人数据集来解决数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频异常检测框架在检测机器人执行高层任务时出现的复杂时间或空间错误方面存在不足，因为这些错误不一定表现为低级运动错误。因此，需要一种能够识别机器人时间依赖性错误的 VAD 框架。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为 TIMID 的 VAD 启发式架构。该架构接收视频和任务提示（包括潜在错误）作为输入，并输出视频中错误是否存在的帧级别预测。TIMID 采用 VAD 的弱监督训练方式，只需要每个视频一个标签。为了解决数据稀缺问题，研究人员创建了一个包含受控时间错误的多机器人模拟数据集，并结合了真实执行数据，用于零样本的模拟到真实迁移评估。
AI.result: 实验证明，开箱即用的视觉语言模型 (VLMs) 缺乏执行此任务所需显式时间推理能力。而 TIMID 框架能够成功检测不同类型的时间错误。
AI.conclusion: TIMID 框架能够有效地检测机器人执行高层任务时的时间依赖性错误，克服了现有 VAD 方法的局限性，并展示了在模拟和真实数据上的零样本迁移能力。

title: From Ideal to Real: Stable Video Object Removal under Imperfect Conditions
summary: Removing objects from videos remains difficult in the presence of real-world imperfections such as shadows, abrupt motion, and defective masks. Existing diffusion-based video inpainting models often struggle to maintain temporal stability and visual consistency under these challenges. We propose Stable Video Object Removal (SVOR), a robust framework that achieves shadow-free, flicker-free, and mask-defect-tolerant removal through three key designs: (1) Mask Union for Stable Erasure (MUSE), a windowed union strategy applied during temporal mask downsampling to preserve all target regions observed within each window, effectively handling abrupt motion and reducing missed removals; (2) Denoising-Aware Segmentation (DA-Seg), a lightweight segmentation head on a decoupled side branch equipped with Denoising-Aware AdaLN and trained with mask degradation to provide an internal diffusion-aware localization prior without affecting content generation; and (3) Curriculum Two-Stage Training: where Stage I performs self-supervised pretraining on unpaired real-background videos with online random masks to learn realistic background and temporal priors, and Stage II refines on synthetic pairs using mask degradation and side-effect-weighted losses, jointly removing objects and their associated shadows/reflections while improving cross-domain robustness. Extensive experiments show that SVOR attains new state-of-the-art results across multiple datasets and degraded-mask benchmarks, advancing video object removal from ideal settings toward real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SVOR的视频物体移除框架，通过MUSE（掩码联合策略）、DA-Seg（去噪感知分割）和课程两阶段训练，有效解决了现实世界视频中物体移除的挑战，如阴影、运动模糊和掩码缺陷，实现了无阴影、无闪烁、容忍掩码缺陷的移除，并在多个数据集上取得了SOTA成果。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于扩散的视频修复模型在处理视频中存在的阴影、突然运动和遮罩缺陷等现实世界不完美因素时，难以保持时间稳定性和视觉一致性。
AI.method: 1. Mask Union for Stable Erasure (MUSE)：采用窗口联合策略进行时间掩码降采样，保留窗口内所有目标区域，以处理突然运动并减少遗漏。2. Denoising-Aware Segmentation (DA-Seg)：在带有Denoising-Aware AdaLN的解耦侧分支上设计轻量级分割头，并通过掩码退化训练，提供与内容生成无关的内部扩散感知定位先验。3. Curriculum Two-Stage Training：第一阶段在无配对的真实背景视频上进行自监督预训练，学习背景和时间先验；第二阶段在合成配对数据上进行精炼，结合掩码退化和副作用加权损失，实现物体及其阴影/反射的联合移除。
AI.result: SVOR在多个数据集和退化掩码基准上取得了新的SOTA结果，在处理现实世界视频中的物体移除方面表现出色。
AI.conclusion: SVOR是一个鲁棒的视频物体移除框架，通过创新的设计克服了现实世界视频的挑战，将视频物体移除从理想场景推向实际应用。

title: SpaceSense-Bench: A Large-Scale Multi-Modal Benchmark for Spacecraft Perception and Pose Estimation
summary: Autonomous space operations such as on-orbit servicing and active debris removal demand robust part-level semantic understanding and precise relative navigation of target spacecraft, yet collecting large-scale real data in orbit remains impractical due to cost and access constraints. Existing synthetic datasets, moreover, suffer from limited target diversity, single-modality sensing, and incomplete ground-truth annotations. We present \textbf{SpaceSense-Bench}, a large-scale multi-modal benchmark for spacecraft perception encompassing 136~satellite models with approximately 70~GB of data. Each frame provides time-synchronized 1024$\times$1024 RGB images, millimeter-precision depth maps, and 256-beam LiDAR point clouds, together with dense 7-class part-level semantic labels at both the pixel and point level as well as accurate 6-DoF pose ground truth. The dataset is generated through a high-fidelity space simulation built in Unreal Engine~5 and a fully automated pipeline covering data acquisition, multi-stage quality control, and conversion to mainstream formats. We benchmark five representative tasks (object detection, 2D semantic segmentation, RGB--LiDAR fusion-based 3D point cloud segmentation, monocular depth estimation, and orientation estimation) and identify two key findings: (i)~perceiving small-scale components (\emph{e.g.}, thrusters and omni-antennas) and generalizing to entirely unseen spacecraft in a zero-shot setting remain critical bottlenecks for current methods, and (ii)~scaling up the number of training satellites yields substantial performance gains on novel targets, underscoring the value of large-scale, diverse datasets for space perception research. The dataset, code, and toolkit are publicly available at https://github.com/wuaodi/SpaceSense-Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SpaceSense-Bench，一个包含136个卫星模型、70GB数据的、大规模、多模态的航天器感知基准测试集。该数据集包含了RGB图像、深度图和LiDAR点云，并提供了像素级和点级的语义标签以及6-DoF姿态真值。研究发现，识别小型部件和零样本泛化是当前方法的关键瓶颈，而增加训练卫星数量可以显著提升对新目标的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前在轨服务和空间碎片清除等自主空间操作需要对目标航天器进行语义理解和精确相对导航。然而，由于成本和可及性限制，收集大规模真实轨道数据不切实际。现有的合成数据集在目标多样性、传感模态和地面真实标注方面存在不足。
AI.method: 利用Unreal Engine~5构建高保真空间模拟器，并通过全自动化流程生成数据集。数据采集包括时间同步的1024x1024 RGB图像、毫米级精度的深度图和256束LiDAR点云。为每个数据帧提供了像素级和点级的7类语义标签，以及精确的6-DoF姿态真值。对目标检测、2D语义分割、RGB-LiDAR融合3D点云分割、单目深度估计和姿态估计五个代表性任务进行了基准测试。
AI.result: 研究发现，当前方法在感知小型部件（如推进器和全向天线）以及在零样本设置下泛化到全新航天器方面存在关键瓶颈。同时，增加训练卫星的数量可以显著提高对新目标的性能，强调了大规模、多样化数据集在空间感知研究中的价值。
AI.conclusion: SpaceSense-Bench是一个大规模、多模态的航天器感知基准测试集，为解决空间操作中的感知挑战提供了重要资源。研究结果表明，提高对小型部件的感知能力和零样本泛化能力是未来研究的重点，并且大规模、多样化的数据集对于提升模型在新目标上的性能至关重要。

title: Robust Cooperative Localization in Featureless Environments: A Comparative Study of DCL, StCL, CCL, CI, and Standard-CL
comment: Presented at the 2026 12th International Conference on Automation, Robotics and Applications (ICARA); to be published in IEEE conference proceedings
summary: Cooperative localization (CL) enables accurate position estimation in multi-robot systems operating in GPS-denied environments. This paper presents a comparative study of five CL approaches: Centralized Cooperative Localization (CCL), Decentralized Cooperative Localization (DCL), Sequential Cooperative Localization (StCL), Covariance Intersection (CI), and Standard Cooperative Localization (Standard-CL). All methods are implemented in ROS and evaluated through Monte Carlo simulations under two conditions: weak data association and robust detection. Our analysis reveals fundamental trade-offs among the methods. StCL and Standard-CL achieve the lowest position errors but exhibit severe filter inconsistency, making them unsuitable for safety-critical applications. DCL demonstrates remarkable stability under challenging conditions due to its measurement stride mechanism, which provides implicit regularization against outliers. CI emerges as the most balanced approach, achieving near-optimal consistency while maintaining competitive accuracy. CCL provides theoretically optimal estimation but shows sensitivity to measurement outliers. These findings offer practical guidance for selecting CL algorithms based on application requirements.

AI.tldr: 该研究对五种合作定位（CL）方法进行了比较评估，发现在准确性和一致性之间存在权衡。StCL和Standard-CL精度最高但一致性差；DCL在挑战性条件下表现稳定；CI在精度和一致性之间达到最佳平衡；CCL理论上最优但对异常值敏感。
AI.motivation: 在GPS受限环境中，多机器人系统的精确定位需求促使研究者对不同的合作定位方法进行比较分析，以指导实际应用中的算法选择。
AI.method: 通过ROS实现了五种合作定位方法（CCL, DCL, StCL, CI, Standard-CL），并在弱数据关联和鲁棒检测两种条件下进行蒙特卡洛模拟评估。
AI.result: StCL和Standard-CL定位误差最低，但滤波器不一致性严重；DCL因其测量步幅机制在挑战性条件下表现出优异的稳定性；CI在保持较高精度的同时实现了近乎最优的一致性；CCL虽然理论上最优，但对异常值敏感。
