SurgFed is powered by two appealing designs, i.e., Language-guided Channel Selection (LCS) and Language-guided Hyper Aggregation (LHA), to address the challenge of fully exploration on corss-site and cross-task. Technically, the LCS is first designed a lightweight personalized channel selection network that enhances site-specific adaptation using pre-defined text inputs, which optimally the local model learn the specific embeddings. We further introduce the LHA that employs a layer-wise cross-attention mechanism with pre-defined text inputs to model task interactions across sites and guide a hypernetwork for personalized parameter updates. Extensive empirical evidence shows that SurgFed yields improvements over the state-of-the-art methods in five public datasets across four surgical types. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SurgFed-070E/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 SurgFed 的多任务联邦学习框架，用于机器人辅助微创手术（RAS）中的手术场景分割和深度估计。SurgFed 通过语言引导通道选择（LCS）和语言引导超聚合（LHA）来解决局部模型适应性差和服务器端聚合效率低的问题，并在五个公共数据集上取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前的手术场景多任务联邦学习（MTFL）在机器人辅助手术（RAS）中存在两个主要挑战：（1）组织多样性：局部模型难以适应特定部位的组织特征，限制了其在异构临床环境中的有效性；（2）任务多样性：服务器端聚合依赖于梯度聚类，容易因任务异质性导致参数更新不准确。
AI.method: 提出 SurgFed 框架，包含两种核心设计：1. 语言引导通道选择（LCS）：一个轻量级的个性化通道选择网络，利用预定义的文本输入增强特定部位的适应性。2. 语言引导超聚合（LHA）：一个层级的交叉注意力机制，利用预定义的文本输入对跨部位的任务交互建模，并指导超网络进行个性化参数更新。
AI.result: SurgFed 在五个公共数据集、四种手术类型上进行了广泛的实验，结果表明其在手术场景分割和深度估计任务上均优于现有的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SurgFed 框架通过 LCS 和 LHA 有效解决了手术场景多任务联邦学习中的组织多样性和任务多样性挑战，为机器人辅助手术提供了更准确、更具适应性的模型。

title: The Patrologia Graeca Corpus: OCR, Annotation, and Open Release of Noisy Nineteenth-Century Polytonic Greek Editions
summary: We present the Patrologia Graeca Corpus, the first large-scale open OCR and linguistic resource for nineteenthcentury editions of Ancient Greek. The collection covers the remaining undigitized volumes of the Patrologia Graeca (PG), printed in complex bilingual (Greek-Latin) layouts and characterized by highly degraded polytonic Greek typography. Through a dedicated pipeline combining YOLO-based layout detection and CRNN-based text recognition, we achieve a character error rate (CER) of 1.05% and a word error rate (WER) of 4.69%, largely outperforming existing OCR systems for polytonic Greek. The resulting corpus contains around six million lemmatized and part-of-speech tagged tokens, aligned with full OCR and layout annotations. Beyond its philological value, this corpus establishes a new benchmark for OCR on noisy polytonic Greek and provides training material for future models, including LLMs.

AI.tldr: 该研究发布了首个大规模、开放的古希腊语 OCR 和语言资源库——Patrologia Graeca Corpus。该资源库包含了《Patrologia Graeca》剩余未数字化的、印刷复杂的、排版复杂的、古希腊语字体高度退化的卷本，通过先进的 OCR 技术实现了较低的错误率，并提供了约六百万个词汇化和词性标注的词元，为古希腊语 OCR 研究树立了新标杆。
AI.motivation: 现有古希腊语 OCR 资源稀缺且质量不高，特别是对于印刷复杂、字体退化的十九世纪版本。研究者希望创建一个大规模、开放的资源库，以填补这一空白，并推动古希腊语的数字化研究和语言模型的发展。
AI.method: 研究者开发了一个专门的 OCR 流程，结合了基于 YOLO 的版面检测和基于 CRNN 的文本识别技术，以处理复杂的双语排版和退化的古希腊语字体。对处理结果进行了评估，计算了字符错误率 (CER) 和词错误率 (WER)。
AI.result: 该研究达到了 1.05% 的字符错误率 (CER) 和 4.69% 的词错误率 (WER)，显著优于现有的古希腊语 OCR 系统。生成的语料库包含约六百万个词汇化和词性标注的词元，并附带完整的 OCR 和版面标注。
AI.conclusion: Patrologia Graeca Corpus 是一个重要的古希腊语 OCR 和语言资源，具有重要的文献学价值。它不仅为处理嘈杂的古希腊语 OCR 设定了新的基准，还为未来的模型（包括大型语言模型）提供了训练数据。

title: Streaming Autoregressive Video Generation via Diagonal Distillation
summary: Large pretrained diffusion models have significantly enhanced the quality of generated videos, and yet their use in real-time streaming remains limited. Autoregressive models offer a natural framework for sequential frame synthesis but require heavy computation to achieve high fidelity. Diffusion distillation can compress these models into efficient few-step variants, but existing video distillation approaches largely adapt image-specific methods that neglect temporal dependencies. These techniques often excel in image generation but underperform in video synthesis, exhibiting reduced motion coherence, error accumulation over long sequences, and a latency-quality trade-off. We identify two factors that result in these limitations: insufficient utilization of temporal context during step reduction and implicit prediction of subsequent noise levels in next-chunk prediction (i.e., exposure bias). To address these issues, we propose Diagonal Distillation, which operates orthogonally to existing approaches and better exploits temporal information across both video chunks and denoising steps. Central to our approach is an asymmetric generation strategy: more steps early, fewer steps later. This design allows later chunks to inherit rich appearance information from thoroughly processed early chunks, while using partially denoised chunks as conditional inputs for subsequent synthesis. By aligning the implicit prediction of subsequent noise levels during chunk generation with the actual inference conditions, our approach mitigates error propagation and reduces oversaturation in long-range sequences. We further incorporate implicit optical flow modeling to preserve motion quality under strict step constraints. Our method generates a 5-second video in 2.61 seconds (up to 31 FPS), achieving a 277.3x speedup over the undistilled model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“Diagonal Distillation”的新方法，通过不对称生成策略和隐式光流建模，显著提高了扩散模型在视频生成中的效率和质量，解决了现有蒸馏方法在处理时序依赖性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型预训练扩散模型在视频生成质量上表现出色，但实时性不足。而自回归模型虽然适合序列生成，计算量巨大。现有的扩散蒸馏方法主要借鉴图像蒸馏技术，忽略了视频的时序依赖性，导致运动不连贯、误差累积和延迟-质量权衡等问题。
AI.method: 提出Diagonal Distillation，其核心是不对称生成策略（前期步数多，后期步数少），使得后期视频块能够继承前期充分处理的信息。同时，通过对齐生成过程中的噪声水平预测与实际推理条件，缓解了误差传播。此外，还引入了隐式光流建模来保持运动质量。
AI.result: 在严格的步数限制下，所提出的方法能够在2.61秒内生成一个5秒的视频（最高31 FPS），比未蒸馏的模型加速了277.3倍。
AI.conclusion: Diagonal Distillation能够更有效地利用时序信息，缓解误差传播和图像过度饱和问题，并在保持高质量视频生成的同时实现显著的速度提升，解决了现有视频扩散模型实时性差的瓶颈。

title: Component-Aware Sketch-to-Image Generation Using Self-Attention Encoding and Coordinate-Preserving Fusion
summary: Translating freehand sketches into photorealistic images remains a fundamental challenge in image synthesis, particularly due to the abstract, sparse, and stylistically diverse nature of sketches. Existing approaches, including GAN-based and diffusion-based models, often struggle to reconstruct fine-grained details, maintain spatial alignment, or adapt across different sketch domains. In this paper, we propose a component-aware, self-refining framework for sketch-to-image generation that addresses these challenges through a novel two-stage architecture. A Self-Attention-based Autoencoder Network (SA2N) first captures localised semantic and structural features from component-wise sketch regions, while a Coordinate-Preserving Gated Fusion (CGF) module integrates these into a coherent spatial layout. Finally, a Spatially Adaptive Refinement Revisor (SARR), built on a modified StyleGAN2 backbone, enhances realism and consistency through iterative refinement guided by spatial context. Extensive experiments across both facial (CelebAMask-HQ, CUFSF) and non-facial (Sketchy, ChairsV2, ShoesV2) datasets demonstrate the robustness and generalizability of our method. The proposed framework consistently outperforms state-of-the-art GAN and diffusion models, achieving significant gains in image fidelity, semantic accuracy, and perceptual quality. On CelebAMask-HQ, our model improves over prior methods by 21% (FID), 58% (IS), 41% (KID), and 20% (SSIM). These results, along with higher efficiency and visual coherence across diverse domains, position our approach as a strong candidate for applications in forensics, digital art restoration, and general sketch-based image synthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“component-aware, self-refining framework”的两阶段框架，用于将手绘草图转化为照片级真实感图像，该框架通过自注意力编码器、坐标保持门控融合以及空间自适应精炼器来解决细节重建、空间对齐和领域适应性问题，并在多个数据集上取得了优于现有方法的成果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理手绘草图（抽象、稀疏、风格多样）到照片级图像的转化时，常在细节重建、空间对齐和跨领域适应性方面遇到困难。
AI.method: 提出一个两阶段的框架：1. 自注意力自动编码器网络（SA2N）捕获组件级草图区域的局部语义和结构特征。2. 坐标保持门控融合（CGF）模块将这些特征整合到连贯的空间布局中。3. 基于修改版StyleGAN2的反思器（SARR）通过迭代精炼来提升真实感和一致性。
AI.result: 在CelebAMask-HQ、CUFSF、Sketchy、ChairsV2和ShoesV2等数据集上的实验表明，该方法在图像保真度、语义准确性和感知质量方面显著优于现有的GAN和扩散模型，并在CelebAMask-HQ上相比先前方法在FID、IS、KID和SSIM指标上分别提升了21%、58%、41%和20%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架展现了强大的鲁棒性和泛化能力，能够生成高保真度和高感知质量的图像，并且效率更高，在不同领域之间具有良好的视觉一致性，为法医学、数字艺术修复和通用草图生成图像合成等应用提供了有力支持。

title: Prune Redundancy, Preserve Essence: Vision Token Compression in VLMs via Synergistic Importance-Diversity
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) face significant computational inefficiencies caused by excessive generation of visual tokens. While prior work shows that a large fraction of visual tokens are redundant, existing compression methods struggle to balance importance preservation and information diversity. To address this, we propose PruneSID, a training-free Synergistic Importance-Diversity approach featuring a two-stage pipeline: (1) Principal Semantic Components Analysis (PSCA) for clustering tokens into semantically coherent groups, ensuring comprehensive concept coverage, and (2) Intra-group Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) for pruning redundant tokens while preserving key representative tokens within each group. Additionally, PruneSID incorporates an information-aware dynamic compression ratio mechanism that optimizes token compression rates based on image complexity, enabling more effective average information preservation across diverse scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, achieving 96.3% accuracy on LLaVA-1.5 with only 11.1% token retention, and 92.8% accuracy at extreme compression rates (5.6%) on LLaVA-NeXT, outperforming prior methods by 2.5% with 7.8 $\times$ faster prefilling speed compared to the original model. Our framework generalizes across diverse VLMs and both image and video modalities, showcasing strong cross-modal versatility. Code is available at https://github.com/ZhengyaoFang/PruneSID}{https://github.com/ZhengyaoFang/PruneSID.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为 PruneSID 的训练无关方法，通过主成分语义分析（PSCA）和组内非极大值抑制（NMS）来压缩视觉-语言模型（VLMs）中的视觉 token，同时保持信息多样性和重要性。该方法通过动态压缩比适应图像复杂度，并在 LLaVA-1.5 和 LLaVA-NeXT 上取得了最先进的性能，显著提高了效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在生成视觉 token 时存在严重的计算效率低下问题，因为会生成过多的冗余视觉 token。现有的压缩方法难以在保留重要信息和多样性之间取得平衡。
AI.method: PruneSID 采用一个无需训练的两阶段流水线：1. 主成分语义分析（PSCA）将 token 分组，以确保概念的全面覆盖；2. 组内非极大值抑制（NMS）在保留组内代表性 token 的同时，去除冗余 token。此外，PruneSID 还引入了一个信息感知动态压缩比机制，根据图像复杂度调整压缩率。
AI.result: 在 LLaVA-1.5 上，PruneSID 在仅保留 11.1% token 的情况下达到了 96.3% 的准确率。在 LLaVA-NeXT 上，在 5.6% 的极低 token 留存率下，准确率达到了 92.8%，比现有方法提高了 2.5%，预填充速度提高了 7.8 倍。该方法在不同 VLM 和模态（图像、视频）上都表现出良好的通用性。
AI.conclusion: PruneSID 是一种有效的视觉 token 压缩方法，能够显著提高 VLMs 的计算效率，同时保持高准确率和信息多样性，并且具有跨模态和跨模型的通用性。

title: Probing the Reliability of Driving VLMs: From Inconsistent Responses to Grounded Temporal Reasoning
summary: A reliable driving assistant should provide consistent responses based on temporally grounded reasoning derived from observed information. In this work, we investigate whether Vision-Language Models (VLMs), when applied as driving assistants, can response consistantly and understand how present observations shape future outcomes, or whether their outputs merely reflect patterns memorized during training without temporally grounded reasoning. While recent efforts have integrated VLMs into autonomous driving, prior studies typically emphasize scene understanding and instruction generation, implicitly assuming that strong visual interpretation naturally enables consistant future reasoning and thus ensures reliable decision-making, a claim we critically examine. We focus on two major challenges limiting VLM reliability in this setting: response inconsistency, where minor input perturbations yield different answers or, in some cases, responses degenerate toward near-random guessing, and limited temporal reasoning, in which models fail to reason and align sequential events from current observations, often resulting in incorrect or even contradictory responses. Moreover, we find that models with strong visual understanding do not necessarily perform best on tasks requiring temporal reasoning, indicating a tendency to over-rely on pretrained patterns rather than modeling temporal dynamics. To address these issues, we adopt existing evaluation methods and introduce FutureVQA, a human-annotated benchmark dataset specifically designed to assess future scene reasoning. In addition, we propose a simple yet effective self-supervised tuning approach with chain-of-thought reasoning that improves both consistency and temporal reasoning without requiring temporal labels.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了视觉语言模型（VLM）作为驾驶助手在时间推理和响应一致性方面的能力。研究发现，现有VLM在处理顺序事件时存在不足，并且对训练数据的依赖性强于实际推理。为了解决这些问题，研究提出了一个新的数据集FutureVQA，并开发了一种无需时间标签的自监督微调方法，以提高VLM的时间推理和响应一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在将VLM应用于自动驾驶时，虽然强调了场景理解和指令生成，但并未充分检验VLM在时间推理和响应一致性方面的能力，这可能导致不可靠的决策。作者希望探究VLM是否真正具备基于当前观察进行未来预测的能力，还是仅仅依赖于预训练的模式。
AI.method: 研究首先通过分析VLM在响应不一致性和有限时间推理方面的挑战来评估其在驾驶场景中的可靠性。接着，研究引入了一个新的人工标注基准数据集FutureVQA，专门用于评估对未来场景的推理能力。最后，提出了一种简单的自监督微调方法，结合链式思考（chain-of-thought）推理，以提高模型的一致性和时间推理能力，且无需标注时间信息。
AI.result: 研究发现，即使是具有强大视觉理解能力的VLM，在需要时间推理的任务上表现也未必最佳，这表明模型可能过度依赖预训练模式而非学习时间动态。提出的FutureVQA数据集和自监督微调方法能够有效提升VLM在响应一致性和时间推理方面的表现。
AI.conclusion: VLM在作为驾驶助手时，在时间推理和响应一致性方面仍面临挑战。对当前观察进行有效的时间推理对于可靠的自动驾驶至关重要。提出的FutureVQA数据集和自监督微调方法为解决这些问题提供了一种有效的途径，能够在不依赖时间标签的情况下提升VLM在时间推理和一致性方面的能力。

title: Towards Unified Multimodal Interleaved Generation via Group Relative Policy Optimization
summary: Unified vision-language models have made significant progress in multimodal understanding and generation, yet they largely fall short in producing multimodal interleaved outputs, which is a crucial capability for tasks like visual storytelling and step-by-step visual reasoning. In this work, we propose a reinforcement learning-based post-training strategy to unlock this capability in existing unified models, without relying on large-scale multimodal interleaved datasets. We begin with a warm-up stage using a hybrid dataset comprising curated interleaved sequences and limited data for multimodal understanding and text-to-image generation, which exposes the model to interleaved generation patterns while preserving its pretrained capabilities. To further refine interleaved generation, we propose a unified policy optimization framework that extends Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to the multimodal setting. Our approach jointly models text and image generation within a single decoding trajectory and optimizes it with our novel hybrid rewards covering textual relevance, visual-text alignment, and structural fidelity. Additionally, we incorporate process-level rewards to provide step-wise guidance, enhancing training efficiency in complex multimodal tasks. Experiments on MMIE and InterleavedBench demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances the quality and coherence of multimodal interleaved generation.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于强化学习的后训练策略，用于增强现有统一视觉语言模型生成多模态交错输出的能力，克服了对大规模交错数据集的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有统一视觉语言模型在生成多模态交错输出（如视觉故事叙述和分步视觉推理）方面存在不足，而这一能力对于许多关键任务至关重要。
AI.method: 采用基于强化学习的后训练策略。首先，通过混合数据集（包含精选的交错序列和用于多模态理解及文本到图像生成的数据）进行预热训练，以适应交错生成模式并保持预训练能力。然后，提出一个统一的策略优化框架（基于GRPO的扩展），将文本和图像生成建模在单一解码轨迹中，并使用结合文本相关性、视觉-文本对齐和结构保真度的混合奖励进行优化。此外，还引入了过程级别奖励以提供分步指导。
AI.result: 在MMIE和InterleavedBench数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提高了多模态交错生成的质量和连贯性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功地通过一种不依赖大规模交错数据集的强化学习后训练策略，增强了统一视觉语言模型的多模态交错生成能力，并在相关基准测试中取得了显著的性能提升。

title: Memory-Guided View Refinement for Dynamic Human-in-the-loop EQA
summary: Embodied Question Answering (EQA) has traditionally been evaluated in temporally stable environments where visual evidence can be accumulated reliably. However, in dynamic, human-populated scenes, human activities and occlusions introduce significant perceptual non-stationarity: task-relevant cues are transient and view-dependent, while a store-then-retrieve strategy over-accumulates redundant evidence and increases inference cost. This setting exposes two practical challenges for EQA agents: resolving ambiguity caused by viewpoint-dependent occlusions, and maintaining compact yet up-to-date evidence for efficient inference. To enable systematic study of this setting, we introduce DynHiL-EQA, a human-in-the-loop EQA dataset with two subsets: a Dynamic subset featuring human activities and temporal changes, and a Static subset with temporally stable observations. To address the above challenges, we present DIVRR (Dynamic-Informed View Refinement and Relevance-guided Adaptive Memory Selection), a training-free framework that couples relevance-guided view refinement with selective memory admission. By verifying ambiguous observations before committing them and retaining only informative evidence, DIVRR improves robustness under occlusions while preserving fast inference with compact memory. Extensive experiments on DynHiL-EQA and the established HM-EQA dataset demonstrate that DIVRR consistently improves over existing baselines in both dynamic and static settings while maintaining high inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 DIVRR 的新框架，用于解决动态环境中具身问答（EQA）的挑战，通过改进的视图精炼和自适应记忆选择来处理遮挡和瞬时信息，并在新的动态数据集 DynHiL-EQA 和现有数据集 HM-EQA 上进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 传统 EQA 在静态环境中评估，但在人类活动的动态场景中，遮挡和时间变化导致信息不稳定，现有策略效率低下。需要一种方法来处理这种动态性和瞬时性，同时保持推理效率。
AI.method: 提出 DIVRR 框架，包含两个主要部分：1. 相关性引导的视图精炼：在提交观察结果前进行验证，解决视角依赖性遮挡问题。2. 选择性记忆准入：只保留信息性证据，构建紧凑但最新的记忆，以降低推理成本。
AI.result: DIVRR 在新的 DynHiL-EQA 数据集（包括动态和静态子集）以及现有的 HM-EQA 数据集上，相比现有基线模型，在动态和静态设置下均表现出持续的性能提升，同时保持了高推理效率。
AI.conclusion: DIVRR 框架有效地解决了动态环境中 EQA 的挑战，通过结合视图精炼和自适应记忆选择，提高了在遮挡情况下的鲁棒性，并实现了高效的推理。该方法在不同环境设置下均具有普遍适用性。

title: RESBev: Making BEV Perception More Robust
summary: Bird's-eye-view (BEV) perception has emerged as a cornerstone of autonomous driving systems, providing a structured, ego-centric representation critical for downstream planning and control. However, real-world deployment faces challenges from sensor degradation and adversarial attacks, which can cause severe perceptual anomalies and ultimately compromise the safety of autonomous driving systems. To address this, we propose a resilient and plug-and-play BEV perception method, RESBev, which can be easily applied to existing BEV perception methods to enhance their robustness to diverse disturbances. Specifically, we reframe perception robustness as a latent semantic prediction problem. A latent world model is constructed to extract spatiotemporal correlations across sequential BEV observations, thereby learning the underlying BEV state transitions to predict clean BEV features for reconstructing corrupted observations. The proposed framework operates at the semantic feature level of the Lift-Splat-Shoot pipeline, enabling recovery that generalizes across both natural disturbances and adversarial attacks without modifying the underlying backbone. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate that, with few-shot fine-tuning, RESBev significantly improves the robustness of existing BEV perception models against various external disturbances and adversarial attacks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为RESBev的即插即用方法，用于增强自动驾驶鸟瞰图（BEV）感知的鲁棒性，使其能够抵抗传感器退化和对抗性攻击。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的传感器退化和对抗性攻击会严重影响自动驾驶系统的BEV感知能力，从而危及安全性。
AI.method: 将鲁棒性视为潜在语义预测问题，构建了一个潜在世界模型，提取时空相关性，学习BEV状态转换，以预测干净的BEV特征来重建损坏的观测。该方法应用于Lift-Splat-Shoot管线的语义特征层面。
AI.result: RESBev在nuScenes数据集上通过少量微调，显著提高了现有BEV感知模型对自然干扰和对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RESBev是一种有效的、即插即用的BEV感知增强方法，能够提高其对各种外部干扰和攻击的鲁棒性，且无需修改底层骨干网络。

title: GeoAlignCLIP: Enhancing Fine-Grained Vision-Language Alignment in Remote Sensing via Multi-Granular Consistency Learning
summary: Vision-language pretraining models have made significant progress in bridging remote sensing imagery with natural language. However, existing approaches often fail to effectively integrate multi-granular visual and textual information, relying primarily on global image-text alignment. This limitation hinders the model's ability to accurately capture fine-grained details in images, thus restricting its performance in complex, fine-grained tasks. To address this, we propose GeoAlignCLIP, a unified framework that achieves fine-grained alignment in remote sensing tasks by learning multi-granular semantic alignments and incorporating intra-modal consistency, enabling more precise visual-semantic alignment between image regions and text concepts. Additionally, we construct RSFG-100k, a fine-granular remote sensing dataset containing scene descriptions, region-level annotations, and challenging hard-negative samples, providing hierarchical supervision for model training. Extensive experiments conducted on multiple public remote-sensing benchmarks demonstrate that GeoAlignCLIP consistently outperforms existing RS-specific methods across diverse tasks, exhibiting more robust and accurate fine-grained vision-language alignment.

AI.tldr: GeoAlignCLIP是一个新的视觉-语言预训练框架，通过学习多粒度语义对齐和模型内一致性，实现了遥感图像与自然语言的细粒度对齐，并引入了新的遥感细粒度数据集RSFG-100k，在多项遥感任务中超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感领域的视觉-语言预训练模型主要依赖全局图像-文本对齐，无法有效整合多粒度的视觉和文本信息，导致模型在捕捉图像细节方面存在局限，影响了模型在复杂细粒度任务上的表现。
AI.method: 提出GeoAlignCLIP框架，通过学习多粒度的语义对齐和模型内一致性，实现图像区域与文本概念之间的精确对齐。同时构建了包含场景描述、区域级标注和挑战性难负样本的RSFG-100k数据集，提供层次化的监督信号。
AI.result: 在多个公开的遥感基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，GeoAlignCLIP在多样化的任务中一致优于现有的遥感特定方法，展现出更鲁棒和精确的细粒度视觉-语言对齐能力。
AI.conclusion: GeoAlignCLIP通过多粒度对齐和模型内一致性，有效解决了现有遥感视觉-语言模型在细粒度任务上的局限性，并在RSFG-100k数据集的训练下，证明了其在遥感细粒度视觉-语言对齐方面的优越性。

title: DCAU-Net: Differential Cross Attention and Channel-Spatial Feature Fusion for Medical Image Segmentation
comment: Submitted to IJCNN 2026, 6 pages, 5 tables, 4 figures
summary: Accurate medical image segmentation requires effective modeling of both long-range dependencies and fine-grained boundary details. While transformers mitigate the issue of insufficient semantic information arising from the limited receptive field inherent in convolutional neural networks, they introduce new challenges: standard self-attention incurs quadratic computational complexity and often assigns non-negligible attention weights to irrelevant regions, diluting focus on discriminative structures and ultimately compromising segmentation accuracy. Existing attention variants, although effective in reducing computational complexity, fail to suppress redundant computation and inadvertently impair global context modeling. Furthermore, conventional fusion strategies in encoder-decoder architectures, typically based on simple concatenation or summation, can not adaptively integrate high-level semantic information with low-level spatial details. To address these limitations, we propose DCAU-Net, a novel yet efficient segmentation framework with two key ideas. First, a new Differential Cross Attention (DCA) is designed to compute the difference between two independent softmax attention maps to adaptively highlight discriminative structures. By replacing pixel-wise key and value tokens with window-level summary tokens, DCA dramatically reduces computational complexity without sacrificing precision. Second, a Channel-Spatial Feature Fusion (CSFF) strategy is introduced to adaptively recalibrate features from skip connections and up-sampling paths through using sequential channel and spatial attention, effectively suppressing redundant information and amplifying salient cues. Experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate that DCAU-Net achieves competitive performance with enhanced segmentation accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DCAU-Net的新型医学图像分割框架，通过引入差分交叉注意力（DCA）和通道-空间特征融合（CSFF）策略，有效解决了现有模型在处理长距离依赖、边界细节、计算复杂度以及特征融合方面的不足，并在实验中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的医学图像分割方法在建模长距离依赖和精细边界细节方面存在挑战。Transformer虽然能弥补CNN感受野有限的问题，但其标准自注意力机制计算复杂度高，且容易关注无关区域，稀释了对关键结构的注意力。现有的注意力变体虽然降低了计算复杂度，但未能有效抑制冗余计算并可能损害全局上下文建模。此外，传统的编码器-解码器架构中的特征融合策略（如拼接或求和）无法自适应地融合高层语义信息和低层空间细节。
AI.method: 本文提出了DCAU-Net框架，包含两个核心组件：1. 差分交叉注意力（DCA）：通过计算两个独立softmax注意力图的差值来突出区分性结构。DCA将像素级key和value替换为窗口级摘要token，大幅降低计算复杂度。2. 通道-空间特征融合（CSFF）：利用顺序的通道和空间注意力来重校准跳跃连接和上采样路径的特征，有效抑制冗余信息并增强显著性线索。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上的实验表明，DCAU-Net在分割精度和鲁棒性方面均达到了具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: DCAU-Net通过差分交叉注意力和通道-空间特征融合策略，有效地解决了现有医学图像分割模型在计算效率、长距离依赖建模和特征融合方面的局限性，能够生成更准确、更鲁棒的分割结果。

title: GeoSolver: Scaling Test-Time Reasoning in Remote Sensing with Fine-Grained Process Supervision
summary: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly advanced remote sensing interpretation, enabling them to perform complex, step-by-step reasoning remains highly challenging. Recent efforts to introduce Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning to this domain have shown promise, yet ensuring the visual faithfulness of these intermediate steps remains a critical bottleneck. To address this, we introduce GeoSolver, a novel framework that transitions remote sensing reasoning toward verifiable, process-supervised reinforcement learning. We first construct Geo-PRM-2M, a large-scale, token-level process supervision dataset synthesized via entropy-guided Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) and targeted visual hallucination injection. Building upon this dataset, we train GeoPRM, a token-level process reward model (PRM) that provides granular faithfulness feedback. To effectively leverage these verification signals, we propose Process-Aware Tree-GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm that integrates tree-structured exploration with a faithfulness-weighted reward mechanism to precisely assign credit to intermediate steps. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our resulting model, GeoSolver-9B, achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse remote sensing benchmarks. Crucially, GeoPRM unlocks robust Test-Time Scaling (TTS). Serving as a universal geospatial verifier, it seamlessly scales the performance of GeoSolver-9B and directly enhances general-purpose VLMs, highlighting its remarkable cross-model generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出GeoSolver框架，通过引入过程监督的强化学习来解决遥感图像理解中多步推理的视觉一致性问题。构建了Geo-PRM-2M数据集，训练了GeoPRM奖励模型，并设计了Process-Aware Tree-GRPO算法，在多个遥感任务上取得了SOTA性能，并实现了模型无关的测试时可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型（VLMs）在遥感图像理解方面虽然取得了进展，但在执行复杂、逐步推理方面仍具挑战性。近期引入的链式思考（CoT）方法虽然有前景，但中间推理步骤的视觉一致性仍然是一个关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 1. 构建Geo-PRM-2M数据集：大规模、token级别的过程监督数据集，通过熵引导的MCTS和视觉幻觉注入合成。 2. 训练GeoPRM（过程奖励模型）：为token级别的过程提供细粒度的视觉一致性反馈。 3. 提出Process-Aware Tree-GRPO算法：结合树状探索和基于视觉一致性的加权奖励机制，以有效地利用验证信号。
AI.result: GeoSolver-9B在多个遥感基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。GeoPRM实现了鲁棒的测试时扩展（TTS），可以作为通用的地理空间验证器，提升GeoSolver-9B和其他通用VLMs的性能，展现出优异的跨模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: GeoSolver框架通过引入过程监督的强化学习，有效解决了遥感图像多步推理中的视觉一致性问题，并在多个任务上取得了SOTA性能。其提出的GeoPRM具有良好的跨模型泛化能力，能够直接提升通用VLMs的性能。

title: More than the Sum: Panorama-Language Models for Adverse Omni-Scenes
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. Project page: https://github.com/InSAI-Lab/PanoVQA
summary: Existing vision-language models (VLMs) are tailored for pinhole imagery, stitching multiple narrow field-of-view inputs to piece together a complete omni-scene understanding. Yet, such multi-view perception overlooks the holistic spatial and contextual relationships that a single panorama inherently preserves. In this work, we introduce the Panorama-Language Modeling (PLM)paradigm, a unified $360^\circ$ vision-language reasoning that is more than the sum of its pinhole counterparts. Besides, we present PanoVQA, a large-scale panoramic VQA dataset that involves adverse omni-scenes, enabling comprehensive reasoning under object occlusions and driving accidents. To establish a foundation for PLM, we develop a plug-and-play panoramic sparse attention module that allows existing pinhole-based VLMs to process equirectangular panoramas without retraining. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our PLM achieves superior robustness and holistic reasoning under challenging omni-scenes, yielding understanding greater than the sum of its narrow parts. Project page: https://github.com/InSAI-Lab/PanoVQA.

AI.tldr: 解析错误
AI.motivation: 解析错误
AI.method: 解析错误
AI.result: 解析错误
AI.conclusion: 解析错误

title: A comprehensive study of time-of-flight non-line-of-sight imaging
summary: Time-of-Flight non-line-of-sight (ToF NLOS) imaging techniques provide state-of-the-art reconstructions of scenes hidden around corners by inverting the optical path of indirect photons scattered by visible surfaces and measured by picosecond resolution sensors. The emergence of a wide range of ToF NLOS imaging methods with heterogeneous formulae and hardware implementations obscures the assessment of both their theoretical and experimental aspects. We present a comprehensive study of a representative set of ToF NLOS imaging methods by discussing their similarities and differences under common formulation and hardware. We first outline the problem statement under a common general forward model for ToF NLOS measurements, and the typical assumptions that yield tractable inverse models. We discuss the relationship of the resulting simplified forward and inverse models to a family of Radon transforms, and how migrating these to the frequency domain relates to recent phasor-based virtual line-of-sight imaging models for NLOS imaging that obey the constraints of conventional lens-based imaging systems. We then evaluate performance of the selected methods on hidden scenes captured under the same hardware setup and similar photon counts. Our experiments show that existing methods share similar limitations on spatial resolution, visibility, and sensitivity to noise when operating under equal hardware constraints, with particular differences that stem from method-specific parameters. We expect our methodology to become a reference in future research on ToF NLOS imaging to obtain objective comparisons of existing and new methods.

AI.tldr: 本文对现有多种飞行时间（ToF）非视线（NLOS）成像方法进行了全面比较研究，发现它们在相同硬件约束下存在相似的局限性，但方法参数的差异导致了一些区别。研究提出了一种通用的框架和评估方法，旨在为未来ToF NLOS成像研究提供客观的比较参考。
AI.motivation: 现有的ToF NLOS成像方法种类繁多，公式和硬件实现各不相同，难以对其理论和实验方面进行评估。因此，有必要对这些方法进行系统性的比较研究。
AI.method: 1. 提出一个通用的ToF NLOS测量前向模型，并讨论简化逆模型所需的典型假设。2. 分析简化模型与Radon变换族的关系，并将其迁移到频域，与基于相量（phasor）的虚拟视线成像模型进行关联。3. 在相同的硬件设置和相似的光子计数下，对选定的NLOS成像方法在隐藏场景下的性能进行评估。
AI.result: 在相同的硬件约束和相似的光子计数下，现有的ToF NLOS成像方法在空间分辨率、可见性和对噪声的敏感性方面表现出相似的局限性。然而，方法特有的参数导致了它们之间存在一些性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的通用框架和评估方法能够客观地比较不同的ToF NLOS成像方法，揭示了现有方法在相同硬件条件下存在的共同局限性。这项工作有望成为未来ToF NLOS成像研究的参考，以进行新旧方法的客观比较。

title: ParTY: Part-Guidance for Expressive Text-to-Motion Synthesis
summary: Text-to-motion synthesis aims to generate natural and expressive human motions from textual descriptions. While existing approaches primarily focus on generating holistic motions from text descriptions, they struggle to accurately reflect actions involving specific body parts. Recent part-wise motion generation methods attempt to resolve this but face two critical limitations: (i) they lack explicit mechanisms for aligning textual semantics with individual body parts, and (ii) they often generate incoherent full-body motions due to integrating independently generated part motions. To overcome these issues and resolve the fundamental trade-off in existing methods, we propose ParTY, a novel framework that enhances part expressiveness while generating coherent full-body motions. ParTY comprises: (1) Part-Guided Network, which first generates part motions to obtain part guidance, then uses it to generate holistic motions; (2) Part-aware Text Grounding, which diversely transforms text embeddings and appropriately aligns them with each body part; and (3) Holistic-Part Fusion, which adaptively fuses holistic motions and part motions. Extensive experiments, including part-level and coherence-level evaluations, demonstrate that ParTY achieves substantial improvements over previous methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ParTY的新型框架，用于解决现有文本到运动合成方法在生成涉及特定身体部位的动作时不够准确，以及在生成整体动作时缺乏连贯性的问题。ParTY通过引导式网络、部件感知文本对齐和整体-部件融合来增强部件表现力并生成连贯的全身运动。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到运动合成方法在准确反映涉及特定身体部位的动作以及生成连贯的全身动作方面存在困难。具体来说，部分方法缺乏将文本语义与身体部位明确对齐的机制，并且将独立生成的局部运动整合时，常常导致全身运动不连贯。
AI.method: ParTY框架包含三个主要组件：1. 部分引导网络：首先生成局部动作以获得部分引导，然后利用该引导生成整体动作。2. 部分感知文本对齐：多样化地转换文本嵌入，并将其适当地与每个身体部位对齐。3. 整体-部件融合：自适应地融合整体动作和局部动作。
AI.result: 通过在部分级别和连贯性级别进行的广泛实验评估，ParTY在各项指标上均取得了显著的改进，优于先前的方法。
AI.conclusion: ParTY框架成功地克服了现有方法的局限性，能够生成更具表现力的局部动作，同时保持整体动作的连贯性，从而在文本到运动合成任务上取得了更好的性能。

title: Physics-Driven 3D Gaussian Rendering for Zero-Shot MRI Super-Resolution
summary: High-resolution Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is vital for clinical diagnosis but limited by long acquisition times and motion artifacts. Super-resolution (SR) reconstructs low-resolution scans into high-resolution images, yet existing methods are mutually constrained: paired-data methods achieve efficiency only by relying on costly aligned datasets, while implicit neural representation approaches avoid such data needs at the expense of heavy computation. We propose a zero-shot MRI SR framework using explicit Gaussian representation to balance data requirements and efficiency. MRI-tailored Gaussian parameters embed tissue physical properties, reducing learnable parameters while preserving MR signal fidelity. A physics-grounded volume rendering strategy models MRI signal formation via normalized Gaussian aggregation. Additionally, a brick-based order-independent rasterization scheme enables highly parallel 3D computation, lowering training and inference costs. Experiments on two public MRI datasets show superior reconstruction quality and efficiency, demonstrating the method's potential for clinical MRI SR.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种零样本、基于高斯显式表示的MRI超分辨率（SR）框架，通过利用MRI参数嵌入物理属性并采用高效并行计算，在保证图像质量的同时降低了数据需求和计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有的高分辨率MRI采集耗时且易受运动伪影影响，而现有的超分辨率方法要么需要昂贵的配对数据集，要么计算成本高昂，因此研究动机是开发一种数据需求少、效率高的MRI超分辨率方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种零样本MRI超分辨率框架，采用显式高斯表示，其中MRI定制的高斯参数嵌入组织物理属性。使用基于物理的体积渲染策略通过归一化高斯聚合来模拟MRI信号形成。此外，采用基于砖块的、顺序无关的光栅化方案实现高度并行的3D计算。
AI.result: 在两个公开的MRI数据集上的实验表明，该方法在重建质量和效率方面优于现有方法，展示了其在临床MRI超分辨率方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于显式高斯表示的零样本MRI超分辨率框架成功地平衡了数据需求和计算效率，并通过实验证明了其在提高MRI图像质量和降低采集时间方面的有效性。

title: BinaryAttention: One-Bit QK-Attention for Vision and Diffusion Transformers
summary: Transformers have achieved widespread and remarkable success, while the computational complexity of their attention modules remains a major bottleneck for vision tasks. Existing methods mainly employ 8-bit or 4-bit quantization to balance efficiency and accuracy. In this paper, with theoretical justification, we indicate that binarization of attention preserves the essential similarity relationships, and propose BinaryAttention, an effective method for fast and accurate 1-bit qk-attention. Specifically, we retain only the sign of queries and keys in computing the attention, and replace the floating dot products with bit-wise operations, significantly reducing the computational cost. We mitigate the inherent information loss under 1-bit quantization by incorporating a learnable bias, and enable end-to-end acceleration. To maintain the accuracy of attention, we adopt quantization-aware training and self-distillation techniques, mitigating quantization errors while ensuring sign-aligned similarity. BinaryAttention is more than 2x faster than FlashAttention2 on A100 GPUs. Extensive experiments on vision transformer and diffusion transformer benchmarks demonstrate that BinaryAttention matches or even exceeds full-precision attention, validating its effectiveness. Our work provides a highly efficient and effective alternative to full-precision attention, pushing the frontier of low-bit vision and diffusion transformers. The codes and models can be found at https://github.com/EdwardChasel/BinaryAttention.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 BinaryAttention 的 1-bit 量化注意力机制，通过保留查询和键的符号并使用位运算替代浮点运算，显著降低了计算成本，并在视觉Transformer和扩散Transformer任务上取得了与全精度注意力相当甚至更好的性能。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型在视觉任务中取得了巨大成功，但其注意力模块的计算复杂度是主要的瓶颈。现有方法主要采用8位或4位量化来平衡效率和准确性，作者希望探索更低比特的量化以获得更高的效率。
AI.method: 提出BinaryAttention，一种1-bit qk-attention机制。具体做法是：1. 在计算注意力时仅保留查询（Query）和键（Key）的符号。2. 使用位运算替代浮点点积运算。3. 引入可学习的偏置项来补偿1-bit量化带来的信息损失。4. 采用量化感知训练（quantization-aware training）和自蒸馏（self-distillation）技术来维持模型精度。
AI.result: BinaryAttention在A100 GPU上的速度比FlashAttention2快2倍以上。在视觉Transformer和扩散Transformer的基准测试中，BinaryAttention的性能与全精度注意力相当，甚至有所超越。
AI.conclusion: BinaryAttention是一种高效且有效的全精度注意力替代方案，它通过1-bit量化显著降低了计算成本，同时保持了甚至提高了模型的准确性，为低比特视觉和扩散Transformer的研究开辟了新方向。

title: Improving 3D Foot Motion Reconstruction in Markerless Monocular Human Motion Capture
comment: Accepted at the 2026 International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV)
summary: State-of-the-art methods can recover accurate overall 3D human body motion from in-the-wild videos. However, they often fail to capture fine-grained articulations, especially in the feet, which are critical for applications such as gait analysis and animation. This limitation results from training datasets with inaccurate foot annotations and limited foot motion diversity. We address this gap with FootMR, a Foot Motion Refinement method that refines foot motion estimated by an existing human recovery model through lifting 2D foot keypoint sequences to 3D. By avoiding direct image input, FootMR circumvents inaccurate image-3D annotation pairs and can instead leverage large-scale motion capture data. To resolve ambiguities of 2D-to-3D lifting, FootMR incorporates knee and foot motion as context and predicts only residual foot motion. Generalization to extreme foot poses is further improved by representing joints in global rather than parent-relative rotations and applying extensive data augmentation. To support evaluation of foot motion reconstruction, we introduce MOOF, a 2D dataset of complex foot movements. Experiments on MOOF, MOYO, and RICH show that FootMR outperforms state-of-the-art methods, reducing ankle joint angle error on MOYO by up to 30% over the best video-based approach.

AI.tldr: 提出FootMR方法，通过提取2D足部关键点序列并结合膝盖和足部运动作为上下文来优化现有3D人体动作恢复模型中的足部动作，以提高足部细节的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人体动作恢复方法在捕捉足部精细关节方面存在不足，主要原因是训练数据中足部标注不准确以及足部运动多样性有限。这影响了步态分析和动画等应用。
AI.method: FootMR方法通过将2D足部关键点序列提升到3D来细化现有的人体动作恢复模型估计出的足部动作。它利用膝盖和足部运动作为上下文来解决2D到3D提升中的歧义，并仅预测残差足部运动。为了泛化到极端足部姿势，使用了全局旋转表示和大量数据增强。
AI.result: 在MOOF、MOYO和RICH数据集上的实验表明，FootMR在足部动作重建方面优于现有技术，在MOYO数据集上将踝关节角度误差降低了高达30%。
AI.conclusion: FootMR能够有效地细化现有3D人体动作恢复模型中的足部动作，弥补了现有方法的不足，并在多个数据集上取得了显著的性能提升。

title: A saccade-inspired approach to image classification using visiontransformer attention maps
comment: 16 page, 11 figure main paper + 3 pages, 6 appendix
summary: Human vision achieves remarkable perceptual performance while operating under strict metabolic constraints. A key ingredient is the selective attention mechanism, driven by rapid saccadic eye movements that constantly reposition the high-resolution fovea onto task-relevant locations, unlike conventional AI systems that process entire images with equal emphasis. Our work aims to draw inspiration from the human visual system to create smarter, more efficient image processing models. Using DINO, a self-supervised Vision Transformer that produces attention maps strikingly similar to human gaze patterns, we explore a saccade inspired method to focus the processing of information on key regions in visual space. To do so, we use the ImageNet dataset in a standard classification task and measure how each successive saccade affects the model's class scores. This selective-processing strategy preserves most of the full-image classification performance and can even outperform it in certain cases. By benchmarking against established saliency models built for human gaze prediction, we demonstrate that DINO provides superior fixation guidance for selecting informative regions. These findings highlight Vision Transformer attention as a promising basis for biologically inspired active vision and open new directions for efficient, neuromorphic visual processing.

AI.tldr: 受人类视觉系统启发，研究利用 DINO 模型（一种具有类似人类注视模式的 Transformer）的注意力机制，通过模拟眼跳（saccade）来选择性地处理图像的关键区域，以实现更高效的图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 人类视觉系统在代谢受限的情况下仍能实现卓越的感知能力，这得益于其通过眼跳将高分辨率的中央凹聚焦于任务相关区域的选择性注意力机制。当前的 AI 系统通常对整个图像进行同等处理，效率低下。因此，本研究旨在借鉴人类视觉系统的原理，开发更智能、更高效的图像处理模型。
AI.method: 研究者利用 DINO（一种自监督 Vision Transformer）生成的注意力图，该图与人类的注视模式相似。他们提出了一种模拟眼跳（saccade）的方法，通过 DINO 的注意力机制来聚焦于视觉空间中的关键区域。在 ImageNet 数据集上进行图像分类任务，并评估每次连续眼跳对模型类别得分的影响。此外，还将 DINO 的眼跳引导与现有的人类注视预测显著性模型进行了比较。
AI.result: 采用选择性处理策略后，模型在保留大部分全图像分类性能的同时，在某些情况下甚至超越了全图像处理的性能。DINO 在为选择信息区域提供眼跳引导方面，优于已有的显著性模型。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，Vision Transformer 的注意力机制为受生物启发的（biologically inspired）主动视觉（active vision）提供了一个有前景的基础，并为高效、神经形态（neuromorphic）的视觉处理开辟了新的方向。

title: DiffWind: Physics-Informed Differentiable Modeling of Wind-Driven Object Dynamics
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2026. Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/DiffWind/
summary: Modeling wind-driven object dynamics from video observations is highly challenging due to the invisibility and spatio-temporal variability of wind, as well as the complex deformations of objects. We present DiffWind, a physics-informed differentiable framework that unifies wind-object interaction modeling, video-based reconstruction, and forward simulation. Specifically, we represent wind as a grid-based physical field and objects as particle systems derived from 3D Gaussian Splatting, with their interaction modeled by the Material Point Method (MPM). To recover wind-driven object dynamics, we introduce a reconstruction framework that jointly optimizes the spatio-temporal wind force field and object motion through differentiable rendering and simulation. To ensure physical validity, we incorporate the Lattice Boltzmann Method (LBM) as a physics-informed constraint, enforcing compliance with fluid dynamics laws. Beyond reconstruction, our method naturally supports forward simulation under novel wind conditions and enables new applications such as wind retargeting. We further introduce WD-Objects, a dataset of synthetic and real-world wind-driven scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms prior dynamic scene modeling approaches in both reconstruction accuracy and simulation fidelity, opening a new avenue for video-based wind-object interaction modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 DiffWind 的物理信息可微分框架，用于从视频中模拟风驱动的物体动力学，该框架结合了风场重建、物体运动恢复和前向模拟，并通过 Lattice Boltzmann Method (LBM) 保证了物理有效性。
AI.motivation: 从视频中建模风驱动的物体动力学非常困难，因为风是不可见的且时空变化，物体也会发生复杂形变。
AI.method: 使用基于网格的物理场表示风，使用3D高斯喷涂派生的粒子系统表示物体，并使用Material Point Method (MPM) 建模风-物相互作用。通过可微分渲染和模拟，联合优化风力场和物体运动。引入Lattice Boltzmann Method (LBM) 作为物理约束。
AI.result: DiffWind 在风场重建和物体运动恢复方面取得了优于现有方法的准确性和保真度。该方法还能支持在新的风况下的前向模拟和风重定向等应用。
AI.conclusion: DiffWind 是一个新颖的物理信息可微分框架，能够有效地从视频中建模风驱动的物体动力学，并在重建精度和模拟保真度方面取得了显著成果，为视频驱动的风-物交互建模开辟了新途径。

title: Decoder-Free Distillation for Quantized Image Restoration
summary: Quantization-Aware Training (QAT), combined with Knowledge Distillation (KD), holds immense promise for compressing models for edge deployment. However, joint optimization for precision-sensitive image restoration (IR) to recover visual quality from degraded images remains largely underexplored. Directly adapting QAT-KD to low-level vision reveals three critical bottlenecks: teacher-student capacity mismatch, spatial error amplification during decoder distillation, and an optimization "tug-of-war" between reconstruction and distillation losses caused by quantization noise. To tackle these, we introduce Quantization-aware Distilled Restoration (QDR), a framework for edge-deployed IR. QDR eliminates capacity mismatch via FP32 self-distillation and prevents error amplification through Decoder-Free Distillation (DFD), which corrects quantization errors strictly at the network bottleneck. To stabilize the optimization tug-of-war, we propose a Learnable Magnitude Reweighting (LMR) that dynamically balances competing gradients. Finally, we design an Edge-Friendly Model (EFM) featuring a lightweight Learnable Degradation Gating (LDG) to dynamically modulate spatial degradation localization. Extensive experiments across four IR tasks demonstrate that our Int8 model recovers 96.5% of FP32 performance, achieves 442 frames per second (FPS) on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin, and boosts downstream object detection by 16.3 mAP

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为QDR的框架，用于通过量化感知训练（QAT）和知识蒸馏（KD）来压缩图像恢复（IR）模型，以应对边缘部署的挑战。该框架解决了师生模型容量不匹配、空间误差放大和重构与蒸馏损失之间的优化冲突等问题，并在多项IR任务中取得了高性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的QAT-KD方法在低级别视觉任务（如图像恢复）上的应用研究不足，尤其是在精度敏感的图像恢复任务上。直接将QAT-KD应用于低级别视觉任务会遇到师生模型容量不匹配、空间误差放大和量化噪声导致的优化冲突等问题。
AI.method: 提出了Quantization-aware Distilled Restoration (QDR) 框架，通过以下技术解决现有瓶颈：1. FP32自蒸馏消除师生模型容量不匹配；2. Decoder-Free Distillation (DFD) 避免空间误差放大；3. Learnable Magnitude Reweighting (LMR) 动态平衡重构和蒸馏损失；4. Edge-Friendly Model (EFM) 包含Learnable Degradation Gating (LDG) 以动态调整空间退化定位。
AI.result: 在四种IR任务上进行的大量实验表明，QDR框架下的Int8模型能够恢复FP32模型96.5%的性能，在NVIDIA Jetson Orin上达到442 FPS，并将下游目标检测的mAP提升了16.3。
AI.conclusion: QDR框架有效地解决了在低级别视觉任务中联合优化QAT和KD所面临的挑战，实现了高性能的边缘部署IR模型，并在图像恢复和下游任务上取得了显著的改进。

title: VarSplat: Uncertainty-aware 3D Gaussian Splatting for Robust RGB-D SLAM
summary: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) with 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables fast, differentiable rendering and high-fidelity reconstruction across diverse real-world scenes. However, existing 3DGS-SLAM approaches handle measurement reliability implicitly, making pose estimation and global alignment susceptible to drift in low-texture regions, transparent surfaces, or areas with complex reflectance properties. To this end, we introduce VarSplat, an uncertainty-aware 3DGS-SLAM system that explicitly learns per-splat appearance variance. By using the law of total variance with alpha compositing, we then render differentiable per-pixel uncertainty map via efficient, single-pass rasterization. This map guides tracking, submap registration, and loop detection toward focusing on reliable regions and contributes to more stable optimization. Experimental results on Replica (synthetic) and TUM-RGBD, ScanNet, and ScanNet++ (real-world) show that VarSplat improves robustness and achieves competitive or superior tracking, mapping, and novel view synthesis rendering compared to existing studies for dense RGB-D SLAM.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为VarSplat的不确定性感知3D高斯飞溅（3DGS）SLAM系统，通过显式学习每个高斯点的外观方差，并利用高斯飞溅的alpha合成特性，能够渲染出可微分的每像素不确定性图，从而提高SLAM在低纹理、透明表面等复杂场景下的鲁棒性和精度。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS-SLAM方法隐式处理测量可靠性，在低纹理、透明表面或复杂反射区域容易导致位姿估计和全局对齐漂移。需要一种能够显式处理不确定性、提高鲁棒性的3DGS-SLAM系统。
AI.method: 通过学习每个高斯点的外观方差（appearance variance），并利用全总方差定律（law of total variance）结合alpha合成（alpha compositing）技术，在高效的单程光栅化（single-pass rasterization）中渲染出可微分的每像素不确定性图。该不确定性图用于指导跟踪、子图配准和回环检测，使优化过程更稳定。
AI.result: 在Replica（合成）、TUM-RGBD、ScanNet和ScanNet++（真实世界）等数据集上进行了实验，VarSplat在跟踪、建图和新视角合成渲染方面，相比现有的密集RGB-D SLAM方法，实现了更强的鲁棒性和有竞争力的甚至更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: VarSplat是一种不确定性感知3DGS-SLAM系统，通过引入可微分的每像素不确定性图，显著提高了SLAM在复杂场景下的鲁棒性和准确性，并在多个基准数据集上取得了优于现有方法的性能。

title: ProGS: Towards Progressive Coding for 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: With the emergence of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), numerous pioneering efforts have been made to address the effective compression issue of massive 3DGS data. 3DGS offers an efficient and scalable representation of 3D scenes by utilizing learnable 3D Gaussians, but the large size of the generated data has posed significant challenges for storage and transmission. Existing methods, however, have been limited by their inability to support progressive coding, a crucial feature in streaming applications with varying bandwidth. To tackle this limitation, this paper introduce a novel approach that organizes 3DGS data into an octree structure, enabling efficient progressive coding. The proposed ProGS is a streaming-friendly codec that facilitates progressive coding for 3D Gaussian splatting, and significantly improves both compression efficiency and visual fidelity. The proposed method incorporates mutual information enhancement mechanisms to mitigate structural redundancy, leveraging the relevance between nodes in the octree hierarchy. By adapting the octree structure and dynamically adjusting the anchor nodes, ProGS ensures scalable data compression without compromising the rendering quality. ProGS achieves a remarkable 45X reduction in file storage compared to the original 3DGS format, while simultaneously improving visual performance by over 10%. This demonstrates that ProGS can provide a robust solution for real-time applications with varying network conditions.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为 ProGS 的新型 3DGS 数据压缩方法，它利用八叉树结构实现渐进式编码，显著提高了压缩效率和视觉质量，文件大小减少了 45 倍，视觉性能提升了 10% 以上。
AI.motivation: 3DGS 生成的 3D 场景数据量巨大，存储和传输面临挑战。现有方法不支持渐进式编码，无法满足流式传输应用的需求。
AI.method: 将 3DGS 数据组织成八叉树结构，利用节点间的相关性引入互信息增强机制来降低结构冗余，并通过动态调整锚点节点实现可扩展的数据压缩。
AI.result: ProGS 实现了 45 倍的文件存储减小，视觉性能提升了 10% 以上。
AI.conclusion: ProGS 是一种流式友好的 3DGS 编解码器，能够有效地支持渐进式编码，显著提高压缩效率和视觉保真度，为网络条件多变的实时应用提供了鲁棒的解决方案。

title: TemporalDoRA: Temporal PEFT for Robust Surgical Video Question Answering
summary: Surgical Video Question Answering (VideoQA) requires accurate temporal grounding while remaining robust to natural variation in how clinicians phrase questions, where linguistic bias can arise. Standard Parameter Efficient Fine Tuning (PEFT) methods adapt pretrained projections without explicitly modeling frame-to-frame interactions within the adaptation pathway, limiting their ability to exploit sparse temporal evidence. We introduce TemporalDoRA, a video-specific PEFT formulation that extends Weight-Decomposed Low-Rank Adaptation by (i) inserting lightweight temporal Multi-Head Attention (MHA) inside the low-rank bottleneck of the vision encoder and (ii) selectively applying weight decomposition only to the trainable low-rank branch rather than the full adapted weight. This design enables temporally-aware updates while preserving a frozen backbone and stable scaling. By mixing information across frames within the adaptation subspace, TemporalDoRA steers updates toward temporally consistent visual cues and improves robustness with minimal parameter overhead. To benchmark this setting, we present REAL-Colon-VQA, a colonoscopy VideoQA dataset with 6,424 clip--question pairs, including paired rephrased Out-of-Template questions to evaluate sensitivity to linguistic variation. TemporalDoRA improves Out-of-Template performance, and ablation studies confirm that temporal mixing inside the low-rank branch is the primary driver of these gains. We also validate on EndoVis18-VQA adapted to short clips and observe consistent improvements on the Out-of-Template split. Code and dataset available at~\href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/TemporalDoRA-BFC8/}{Anonymous GitHub}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 TemporalDoRA 的视频特定参数高效微调（PEFT）方法，通过在低秩瓶颈中引入时序多头注意力，并选择性地应用权重分解，以解决手术视频问答（VideoQA）中的时序理解和对语言变化的鲁棒性问题。同时，发布了一个新的结肠镜 VideoQA 数据集 REAL-Colon-VQA，用于评估模型对语言变化的敏感度。
AI.motivation: 现有的 PEFT 方法在适应预训练模型时，未能有效利用视频中的稀疏时序信息，并且在处理临床问题中的语言变化和偏差时鲁棒性不足，限制了 VideoQA 的性能。
AI.method: TemporalDoRA 是一种视频特定的 PEFT 方法，它扩展了权重分解低秩适应（DoRA）。具体而言，它在视觉编码器的低秩瓶颈中插入了轻量级时序多头注意力（MHA），并将权重分解仅应用于可训练的低秩分支。此外，还提出了 REAL-Colon-VQA 数据集，包含配对的重述模板外问题，以评估对语言变化的敏感度。
AI.result: TemporalDoRA 在 REAL-Colon-VQA 数据集上显著提高了对模板外问题的性能，证明了在低秩分支中进行时序信息混合是提升鲁棒性的关键。在 EndoVis18-VQA 数据集上也观察到了类似的改进。
AI.conclusion: TemporalDoRA 通过引入时序感知更新，有效地提高了手术 VideoQA 模型在处理语言变化时的鲁棒性，并且参数开销很小。所提出的 REAL-Colon-VQA 数据集为此类研究提供了一个有价值的基准。

title: GSStream: 3D Gaussian Splatting based Volumetric Scene Streaming System
summary: Recently, the 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) technique for real-time radiance field rendering has revolutionized the field of volumetric scene representation, providing users with an immersive experience. But in return, it also poses a large amount of data volume, which is extremely bandwidth-intensive. Cutting-edge researchers have tried to introduce different approaches and construct multiple variants for 3DGS to obtain a more compact scene representation, but it is still challenging for real-time distribution. In this paper, we propose GSStream, a novel volumetric scene streaming system to support 3DGS data format. Specifically, GSStream integrates a collaborative viewport prediction module to better predict users' future behaviors by learning collaborative priors and historical priors from multiple users and users' viewport sequences and a deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based bitrate adaptation module to tackle the state and action space variability challenge of the bitrate adaptation problem, achieving efficient volumetric scene delivery. Besides, we first build a user viewport trajectory dataset for volumetric scenes to support the training and streaming simulation. Extensive experiments prove that our proposed GSStream system outperforms existing representative volumetric scene streaming systems in visual quality and network usage. Demo video: https://youtu.be/3WEe8PN8yvA.

AI.tldr: GSStream 提出了一种新的 3D 高斯泼溅（3DGS）数据流系统，通过结合视口预测和 DRL 驱动的比特率自适应，实现了高效的体积场景传输，显著提高了视觉质量和网络利用率。
AI.motivation: 3DGS 技术虽然带来了沉浸式体验，但产生了巨大的数据量，对实时分发造成挑战。现有压缩方法仍无法满足实时传输需求。
AI.method: GSStream 包含一个协同视口预测模块，通过学习多用户历史和序列信息来预测用户未来视口；以及一个基于深度强化学习（DRL）的比特率自适应模块，以应对复杂的比特率调整问题。此外，该研究还构建了一个用户视口轨迹数据集。
AI.result: GSStream 在视觉质量和网络使用方面优于现有的体积场景流媒体系统。实验证明了该系统的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GSStream 是一种新颖的 3DGS 数据流系统，通过协同视口预测和 DRL 比特率自适应，能够高效地传输体积场景，为实现实时 3DGS 分发提供了解决方案。

title: FetalAgents: A Multi-Agent System for Fetal Ultrasound Image and Video Analysis
summary: Fetal ultrasound (US) is the primary imaging modality for prenatal screening, yet its interpretation relies heavily on the expertise of the clinician. Despite advances in deep learning and foundation models, existing automated tools for fetal US analysis struggle to balance task-specific accuracy with the whole-process versatility required to support end-to-end clinical workflows. To address these limitations, we propose FetalAgents, the first multi-agent system for comprehensive fetal US analysis. Through a lightweight, agentic coordination framework, FetalAgents dynamically orchestrates specialized vision experts to maximize performance across diagnosis, measurement, and segmentation. Furthermore, FetalAgents advances beyond static image analysis by supporting end-to-end video stream summarization, where keyframes are automatically identified across multiple anatomical planes, analyzed by coordinated experts, and synthesized with patient metadata into a structured clinical report. Extensive multi-center external evaluations across eight clinical tasks demonstrate that FetalAgents consistently delivers the most robust and accurate performance when compared against specialized models and multimodal large language models (MLLMs), ultimately providing an auditable, workflow-aligned solution for fetal ultrasound analysis and reporting.

AI.tldr: FetalAgents 是一个多智能体系统，用于全面的胎儿超声分析，通过协调专门的视觉专家来提高诊断、测量和分割的准确性，并支持端到端的视频流摘要和报告生成。
AI.motivation: 现有胎儿超声自动分析工具难以平衡任务特异性准确性和支持端到端临床工作流所需的整体流程通用性。
AI.method: 提出 FetalAgents，一个多智能体系统，使用轻量级的智能体协调框架，动态协调专门的视觉专家来处理诊断、测量和分割任务，并支持端到端的视频流摘要和结构化报告生成。
AI.result: 在八项临床任务的广泛多中心外部评估中，FetalAgents 与专门模型和多模态大型语言模型 (MLLMs) 相比，始终提供最稳健和准确的性能。
AI.conclusion: FetalAgents 是一个符合工作流程的可审计解决方案，用于胎儿超声分析和报告，通过其多智能体协调框架克服了现有方法的局限性。

title: LAP: A Language-Aware Planning Model For Procedure Planning In Instructional Videos
summary: Procedure planning requires a model to predict a sequence of actions that transform a start visual observation into a goal in instructional videos. While most existing methods rely primarily on visual observations as input, they often struggle with the inherent ambiguity where different actions can appear visually similar. In this work, we argue that language descriptions offer a more distinctive representation in the latent space for procedure planning. We introduce Language-Aware Planning (LAP), a novel method that leverages the expressiveness of language to bridge visual observation and planning. LAP uses a finetuned Vision Language Model (VLM) to translate visual observations into text descriptions and to predict actions and extract text embeddings. These text embeddings are more distinctive than visual embeddings and are used in a diffusion model for planning action sequences. We evaluate LAP on three procedure planning benchmarks: CrossTask, Coin, and NIV. LAP achieves new state-of-the-art performance across multiple metrics and time horizons by large margin, demonstrating the significant advantage of language-aware planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 LAP (Language-Aware Planning) 的新方法，该方法利用语言描述来弥补视觉信息在程序规划中的不足，通过 VLM 将视觉观察转化为文本描述并提取文本嵌入，用于扩散模型进行动作序列预测，并在多个基准测试中取得了最新的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的程序规划方法主要依赖视觉观察，但视觉信息存在歧义性，不同动作在视觉上可能相似。因此，需要一种更具区分度的表示方法。研究者认为语言描述能提供更独特的潜在空间表示。
AI.method: LAP 方法使用微调后的 Vision-Language Model (VLM) 将视觉观察转化为文本描述，并预测动作和提取文本嵌入。这些文本嵌入比视觉嵌入更具区分度，并被用于扩散模型进行动作序列规划。
AI.result: LAP 在 CrossTask、Coin 和 NIV 三个程序规划基准测试中，在多个指标和时间范围内都取得了显著优于现有方法的性能，展示了语言感知规划的优势。
AI.conclusion: 将语言描述引入程序规划能够有效克服视觉信息的歧义性，提供更具区分度的表示，从而显著提升规划性能。

title: LogoDiffuser: Training-Free Multilingual Logo Generation and Stylization via Letter-Aware Attention Control
summary: Recent advances in text-to-image generation have been remarkable, but generating multilingual design logos that harmoniously integrate visual and textual elements remains a challenging task. Existing methods often distort character geometry when applying creative styles and struggle to support multilingual text generation without additional training. To address these challenges, we propose LogoDiffuser, a training-free method that synthesizes multilingual logo designs using the multimodal diffusion transformer. Instead of using textual prompts, we input the target characters as images, enabling robust character structure control regardless of language. We first analyze the joint attention mechanism to identify core tokens, which are tokens that strongly respond to textual structures. With this observation, our method integrates character structure and visual design by injecting the most informative attention maps. Furthermore, we perform layer-wise aggregation of attention maps to mitigate attention shifts across layers and obtain consistent core tokens. Extensive experiments and user studies demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in multilingual logo generation.

AI.tldr: LogoDiffuser 是一种无需训练的方法，利用多模态扩散 Transformer 生成多语言设计徽标，通过将目标字符作为图像输入来保持字符结构，并注入注意力图以融合字符结构和视觉设计。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成方法在生成包含视觉和文本元素的多语言设计徽标时存在挑战，容易扭曲字符几何形状，并且难以支持多语言文本生成。
AI.method: 提出 LogoDiffuser 方法，采用无训练模式，输入目标字符的图像而非文本提示，利用多模态扩散 Transformer。通过分析联合注意力机制识别核心 token，并将最能反映文本结构的信息性注意力图注入模型，同时进行层级注意力图聚合以增强一致性。
AI.result: LogoDiffuser 在多语言徽标生成方面取得了最先进的性能，并通过大量实验和用户研究得到验证。
AI.conclusion: LogoDiffuser 能够有效地解决现有方法在多语言徽标生成中的不足，通过图像输入字符和注意力图注入，实现了对字符结构的鲁棒控制和视觉设计的融合，生成高质量的多语言徽标。

title: TriFusion-SR: Joint Tri-Modal Medical Image Fusion and SR
summary: Multimodal medical image fusion facilitates comprehensive diagnosis by aggregating complementary structural and functional information, but its effectiveness is limited by resolution degradation and modality discrepancies. Existing approaches typically perform image fusion and super-resolution (SR) in separate stages, leading to artifacts and degraded perceptual quality. These limitations are further amplified in tri-modal settings that combine anatomical modalities (e.g., MRI, CT) with functional scans (e.g., PET, SPECT) due to pronounced frequency domain imbalances. We propose TriFusionSR, a wavelet-guided conditional diffusion framework for joint tri-modal fusion and SR. The framework explicitly decomposes multimodal features into frequency bands using the 2D Discrete Wavelet Transform, enabling frequency-aware crossmodal interaction. We further introduce a Rectified Wavelet Features (RWF) strategy for latent coefficient calibration, followed by an Adaptive Spatial-Frequency Fusion (ASFF) module with gated channel-spatial attention to enable structure-driven multimodal refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, achieving 4.8-12.4% PSNR improvement and substantial reductions in RMSE and LPIPS across multiple upsampling scales.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为TriFusionSR的基于小波引导的条件扩散框架，用于联合三模态医学图像融合和超分辨率，解决了现有方法在分辨率退化、模态差异和频率不平衡方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有的医学图像融合和超分辨率方法通常是分阶段进行的，容易产生伪影并降低感知质量，尤其是在三模态设置下，由于频率域失衡问题更为严重。
AI.method: 采用2D离散小波变换将多模态特征分解到不同频带，实现频率感知跨模态交互。引入了用于潜在系数校准的修正小波特征（RWF）策略，并结合了门控通道-空间注意力的自适应空间-频率融合（ASFF）模块，以实现结构驱动的多模态精炼。
AI.result: 在多个放大尺度下，实验结果显示出最先进的性能，PSNR提高了4.8-12.4%，同时RMSE和LPIPS显著降低。
AI.conclusion: TriFusionSR框架通过联合进行三模态融合和超分辨率，有效克服了现有方法的不足，显著提升了医学图像的质量和诊断信息量。

title: What is Missing? Explaining Neurons Activated by Absent Concepts
summary: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) aims to provide human-interpretable insights into the behavior of deep neural networks (DNNs), typically by estimating a simplified causal structure of the model. In existing work, this causal structure often includes relationships where the presence of a concept is associated with a strong activation of a neuron. For example, attribution methods primarily identify input pixels that contribute most to a prediction, and feature visualization methods reveal inputs that cause high activation of a target neuron - the former implicitly assuming that the relevant information resides in the input, and the latter that neurons encode the presence of concepts. However, a largely overlooked type of causal relationship is that of encoded absences, where the absence of a concept increases neural activation. In this work, we show that such missing but relevant concepts are common and that mainstream XAI methods struggle to reveal them when applied in their standard form. To address this, we propose two simple extensions to attribution and feature visualization techniques that uncover encoded absences. Across experiments, we show how mainstream XAI methods can be used to reveal and explain encoded absences, how ImageNet models exploit them, and that debiasing can be improved when considering them.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种新的 XAI 方法，用于识别和解释 DNN 中“编码的缺失”概念，即某个概念的缺失反而会激活神经元。现有 XAI 方法在这方面存在不足，提出的扩展方法能够揭示这些缺失概念，并可用于改进模型去偏。
AI.motivation: 现有 XAI 方法主要关注概念的“存在”及其与神经元激活的关系，却忽略了“概念的缺失”这一重要的因果关系。这种被忽视的“编码的缺失”现象在 DNN 中普遍存在，但主流 XAI 方法难以发现。
AI.method: 研究者提出了两种简单的扩展方法，分别应用于归因（attribution）和特征可视化（feature visualization）技术，以揭示 DNN 中“编码的缺失”概念。
AI.result: 实验证明，提出的扩展方法能够有效揭示 DNN 中被编码的缺失概念。研究还展示了 ImageNet 模型如何利用这些概念，并且在考虑了这些概念后，模型的去偏效果得到了改善。
AI.conclusion: “编码的缺失”是 DNN 中一种普遍且重要的因果关系，主流 XAI 方法的标准形式无法揭示。通过对现有 XAI 方法进行简单扩展，可以有效地发现和解释这些被编码的缺失概念，这对于理解模型行为、改进模型去偏具有重要意义。

title: ENIGMA-360: An Ego-Exo Dataset for Human Behavior Understanding in Industrial Scenarios
summary: Understanding human behavior from complementary egocentric (ego) and exocentric (exo) points of view enables the development of systems that can support workers in industrial environments and enhance their safety. However, progress in this area is hindered by the lack of datasets capturing both views in realistic industrial scenarios. To address this gap, we propose ENIGMA-360, a new ego-exo dataset acquired in a real industrial scenario. The dataset is composed of 180 egocentric and 180 exocentric procedural videos temporally synchronized offering complementary information of the same scene. The 360 videos have been labeled with temporal and spatial annotations, enabling the study of different aspects of human behavior in industrial domain. We provide baseline experiments for 3 foundational tasks for human behavior understanding: 1) Temporal Action Segmentation, 2) Keystep Recognition and 3) Egocentric Human-Object Interaction Detection, showing the limits of state-of-the-art approaches on this challenging scenario. These results highlight the need for new models capable of robust ego-exo understanding in real-world environments. We publicly release the dataset and its annotations at https://iplab.dmi.unict.it/ENIGMA-360.

AI.tldr: 该论文发布了一个名为ENIGMA-360的新型数据集，该数据集包含同步的自我中心（ego）和外中心（exo）视频，用于理解工业环境中的人类行为。研究人员还展示了现有方法在该数据集上的局限性，并呼吁开发新的模型。
AI.motivation: 缺乏同时包含自我中心和外中心视角的真实工业场景数据集，阻碍了对人类行为的理解及其在工业环境中的应用（如工人支持和安全增强）。
AI.method: 提出并发布了ENIGMA-360数据集，其中包含180对同步的自我中心和外中心360度视频，并进行了时间段和空间标注。进行了三种基础任务的基线实验：时间动作分割、关键步骤识别和自我中心人-物交互检测。
AI.result: 现有最先进的方法在ENIGMA-360数据集上的表现存在局限性，表明该数据集的挑战性。基线实验突显了对能够进行稳健的自我中心-外中心理解的新模型的需求。
AI.conclusion: ENIGMA-360数据集为研究工业环境中的人类行为提供了宝贵的资源，并表明需要开发新的模型来处理这种复杂的自我中心和外中心视角下的理解任务。

title: Removing the Trigger, Not the Backdoor: Alternative Triggers and Latent Backdoors
summary: Current backdoor defenses assume that neutralizing a known trigger removes the backdoor. We show this trigger-centric view is incomplete: \emph{alternative triggers}, patterns perceptually distinct from training triggers, reliably activate the same backdoor. We estimate the alternative trigger backdoor direction in feature space by contrasting clean and triggered representations, and then develop a feature-guided attack that jointly optimizes target prediction and directional alignment. First, we theoretically prove that alternative triggers exist and are an inevitable consequence of backdoor training. Then, we verify this empirically. Additionally, defenses that remove training triggers often leave backdoors intact, and alternative triggers can exploit the latent backdoor feature-space. Our findings motivate defenses targeting backdoor directions in representation space rather than input-space triggers.

AI.tldr: 现有后门防御依赖于消除已知触发器，但本研究发现即使触发器不同，后门仍然可以被激活。研究提出了一种基于特征空间的方法来检测和攻击这种“替代触发器”，并建议防御措施应侧重于特征空间而非输入空间。
AI.motivation: 现有后门防御方法假设消除训练时使用的触发器就能彻底清除后门，但这种“以触发器为中心”的观点是不完整的。研究者发现，即使触发器在感知上与训练时的触发器不同，但仍然能够激活相同的后门。这促使研究者探索更鲁棒的后门检测和防御机制。
AI.method: 研究者首先通过对比干净样本和触发样本的特征表示，估计了替代触发器在特征空间中的后门方向。然后，他们开发了一种联合优化目标预测和方向一致性的特征引导攻击方法。此外，他们进行了理论证明以说明替代触发器的存在是后门训练的必然结果，并通过实验进行了验证。
AI.result: 研究表明，替代触发器确实存在，并且能够可靠地激活与训练触发器相同的后门。对训练触发器进行移除的防御措施往往无法完全清除后门，而替代触发器可以利用潜藏在特征空间中的后门。研究的理论证明和实验验证了这一发现。
AI.conclusion: 后门防御不应仅局限于输入空间中的触发器，而应关注表示（特征）空间中的后门方向。未来的防御策略应针对特征空间中的后门进行优化，以应对由替代触发器带来的挑战。

title: FrameDiT: Diffusion Transformer with Frame-Level Matrix Attention for Efficient Video Generation
summary: High-fidelity video generation remains challenging for diffusion models due to the difficulty of modeling complex spatio-temporal dynamics efficiently. Recent video diffusion methods typically represent a video as a sequence of spatio-temporal tokens which can be modeled using Diffusion Transformers (DiTs). However, this approach faces a trade-off between the strong but expensive Full 3D Attention and the efficient but temporally limited Local Factorized Attention. To resolve this trade-off, we propose Matrix Attention, a frame-level temporal attention mechanism that processes an entire frame as a matrix and generates query, key, and value matrices via matrix-native operations. By attending across frames rather than tokens, Matrix Attention effectively preserves global spatio-temporal structure and adapts to significant motion. We build FrameDiT-G, a DiT architecture based on MatrixAttention, and further introduce FrameDiT-H, which integrates Matrix Attention with Local Factorized Attention to capture both large and small motion. Extensive experiments show that FrameDiT-H achieves state-of-the-art results across multiple video generation benchmarks, offering improved temporal coherence and video quality while maintaining efficiency comparable to Local Factorized Attention.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Matrix Attention的新型帧级时间注意力机制，用于解决扩散模型视频生成中时空动力学建模的效率和效果的权衡问题。所提出的FrameDiT-G和FrameDiT-H模型在多个视频生成基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在高效建模复杂时空动力学方面存在挑战，特别是3D注意力机制计算成本高，而局部因子化注意力在时间建模上能力有限，两者之间存在权衡。研究旨在解决这一权衡问题，以提高视频生成的时空连贯性和质量。
AI.method: 提出Matrix Attention，一种帧级时间注意力机制，将整个帧视为矩阵进行处理，通过矩阵原生操作生成查询、键和值矩阵。在此基础上构建了FrameDiT-G模型，并进一步提出FrameDiT-H，该模型结合了Matrix Attention和局部因子化注意力，以同时捕捉大尺度和小尺度运动。
AI.result: FrameDiT-H在多个视频生成基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，展示了更高的时空连贯性和视频质量，同时保持了与局部因子化注意力相当的效率。
AI.conclusion: Matrix Attention是一种有效的时间注意力机制，能够解决现有视频扩散模型在时空建模上的效率和性能权衡问题。基于Matrix Attention的FrameDiT-H模型在视频生成任务上表现出色，有望成为一种更优的视频生成方法。

title: RA-SSU: Towards Fine-Grained Audio-Visual Learning with Region-Aware Sound Source Understanding
summary: Audio-Visual Learning (AVL) is one fundamental task of multi-modality learning and embodied intelligence, displaying the vital role in scene understanding and interaction. However, previous researchers mostly focus on exploring downstream tasks from a coarse-grained perspective (e.g., audio-visual correspondence, sound source localization, and audio-visual event localization). Considering providing more specific scene perception details, we newly define a fine-grained Audio-Visual Learning task, termed Region-Aware Sound Source Understanding (RA-SSU), which aims to achieve region-aware, frame-level, and high-quality sound source understanding. To support this goal, we innovatively construct two corresponding datasets, i.e. fine-grained Music (f-Music) and fine-grained Lifescene (f-Lifescene), each containing annotated sound source masks and frame-by-frame textual descriptions. The f-Music dataset includes 3,976 samples across 22 scene types related to specific application scenarios, focusing on music scenes with complex instrument mixing. The f-Lifescene dataset contains 6,156 samples across 61 types representing diverse sounding objects in life scenarios. Moreover, we propose SSUFormer, a Sound-Source Understanding TransFormer benchmark that facilitates both the sound source segmentation and sound region description with a multi-modal input and multi-modal output architecture. Specifically, we design two modules for this framework, Mask Collaboration Module (MCM) and Mixture of Hierarchical-prompted Experts (MoHE), to respectively enhance the accuracy and enrich the elaboration of the sound source description. Extensive experiments are conducted on our two datasets to verify the feasibility of the task, evaluate the availability of the datasets, and demonstrate the superiority of the SSUFormer, which achieves SOTA performance on the Sound Source Understanding benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的细粒度音频-视觉学习任务（RA-SSU），用于实现区域感知、帧级、高质量的声源理解。为此，作者构建了两个新数据集（f-Music和f-Lifescene），并提出了一个名为SSUFormer的Transformer模型，该模型在声源分割和声场区域描述方面均取得了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-视觉学习研究主要集中在粗粒度的任务上，未能提供更具体的场景感知细节。作者旨在通过定义细粒度的RA-SSU任务来解决这一问题，以实现更精细的声源理解。
AI.method: 1. 定义了细粒度的音频-视觉学习任务——区域感知声源理解（RA-SSU）。 2. 构建了两个新的数据集：f-Music（音乐场景）和f-Lifescene（生活场景），包含声源掩码和逐帧文本描述。 3. 提出了SSUFormer模型，一个多模态输入/输出的Transformer框架，包含掩码协作模块（MCM）和分层提示专家混合（MoHE）模块，用于声源分割和描述。
AI.result: 在f-Music和f-Lifescene数据集上的实验表明：1. RA-SSU任务是可行的。 2. 新构建的数据集是有效的。 3. SSUFormer模型优于现有方法，并在声源理解基准测试中达到了SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功定义并支持了一个新的细粒度音频-视觉学习任务（RA-SSU），并提出了一个强大的基线模型SSUFormer。该研究为更精细的场景感知和多模态理解提供了新的方向和工具。

title: Test-time Ego-Exo-centric Adaptation for Action Anticipation via Multi-Label Prototype Growing and Dual-Clue Consistency
summary: Efficient adaptation between Egocentric (Ego) and Exocentric (Exo) views is crucial for applications such as human-robot cooperation. However, the success of most existing Ego-Exo adaptation methods relies heavily on target-view data for training, thereby increasing computational and data collection costs. In this paper, we make the first exploration of a Test-time Ego-Exo Adaptation for Action Anticipation (TE$^{2}$A$^{3}$) task, which aims to adjust the source-view-trained model online during test time to anticipate target-view actions. It is challenging for existing Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) methods to address this task due to the multi-action candidates and significant temporal-spatial inter-view gap. Hence, we propose a novel Dual-Clue enhanced Prototype Growing Network (DCPGN), which accumulates multi-label knowledge and integrates cross-modality clues for effective test-time Ego-Exo adaptation and action anticipation. Specifically, we propose a Multi-Label Prototype Growing Module (ML-PGM) to balance multiple positive classes via multi-label assignment and confidence-based reweighting for class-wise memory banks, which are updated by an entropy priority queue strategy. Then, the Dual-Clue Consistency Module (DCCM) introduces a lightweight narrator to generate textual clues indicating action progressions, which complement the visual clues containing various objects. Moreover, we constrain the inferred textual and visual logits to construct dual-clue consistency for temporally and spatially bridging Ego and Exo views. Extensive experiments on the newly proposed EgoMe-anti and the existing EgoExoLearn benchmarks show the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms related state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/ZhaofengSHI/DCPGN}{https://github.com/ZhaofengSHI/DCPGN}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DCPGN的新型网络，用于在测试时进行Egocentric（Ego）和Exocentric（Exo）视角之间的自适应，以实现动作预测。该方法通过多标签原型增长模块（ML-PGM）和双线索一致性模块（DCCM）来解决现有方法在目标视角数据依赖性、多动作候选以及时空跨视图差异方面的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有Ego-Exo自适应方法高度依赖目标视角数据进行训练，导致计算和数据收集成本增加。本文旨在探索一种无需目标视角训练数据，仅在测试时进行自适应以实现动作预测的方法（TE$^{2}$A$^{3}$）。
AI.method: 提出了一种双线索增强原型增长网络（DCPGN），包含：1. 多标签原型增长模块（ML-PGM），通过多标签分配和基于置信度的重加权来平衡多个正类，并使用熵优先队列策略更新类存储库。2. 双线索一致性模块（DCCM），引入轻量级叙述者生成文本线索，补充包含各种对象的视觉线索。通过约束推断的文本和视觉logits构建双线索一致性，以桥接Ego和Exo视图。
AI.result: 在EgoMe-anti和EgoExoLearn基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明DCPGN在Ego-Exo自适应和动作预测任务上表现出色，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DCPGN是一种有效的测试时Ego-Exo自适应方法，能够弥合Ego和Exo视图之间的时空差异，并准确预测目标视角下的动作，无需目标视角训练数据，显著降低了成本。

title: ConfCtrl: Enabling Precise Camera Control in Video Diffusion via Confidence-Aware Interpolation
summary: We address the challenge of novel view synthesis from only two input images under large viewpoint changes. Existing regression-based methods lack the capacity to reconstruct unseen regions, while camera-guided diffusion models often deviate from intended trajectories due to noisy point cloud projections or insufficient conditioning from camera poses. To address these issues, we propose ConfCtrl, a confidence-aware video interpolation framework that enables diffusion models to follow prescribed camera poses while completing unseen regions. ConfCtrl initializes the diffusion process by combining a confidence-weighted projected point cloud latent with noise as the conditioning input. It then applies a Kalman-inspired predict-update mechanism, treating the projected point cloud as a noisy measurement and using learned residual corrections to balance pose-driven predictions with noisy geometric observations. This allows the model to rely on reliable projections while down-weighting uncertain regions, yielding stable, geometry-aware generation. Experiments on multiple datasets show that ConfCtrl produces geometrically consistent and visually plausible novel views, effectively reconstructing occluded regions under large viewpoint changes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ConfCtrl的视频插值框架，用于从两张图像合成新视角，解决了现有方法无法重建未知区域和相机引导扩散模型偏离轨迹的问题。ConfCtrl通过置信度加权的投影点云潜变量和噪声初始化扩散过程，并采用卡尔曼滤波启发的预测-更新机制，在保持相机姿态的同时，有效处理模糊或不确定的几何信息，从而实现稳定且几何感知的生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理仅两张输入图像且视角变化大的新视角合成任务时存在不足：回归方法难以重建未见区域；相机引导的扩散模型容易因点云投影噪声或相机姿态条件不足而偏离预期轨迹。因此，需要一种能够同时遵循相机姿态并补全未见区域的方法。
AI.method: ConfCtrl框架通过以下步骤实现：1. 初始化扩散过程：将置信度加权的投影点云潜变量与噪声结合作为条件输入。2. 采用卡尔曼滤波启发的预测-更新机制：将投影点云视为噪声测量值，并利用学习到的残差校正来平衡由姿态驱动的预测和有噪声的几何观测。3. 核心思想：根据投影的可靠性调整模型权重，依赖于可靠的投影，同时降低不确定区域的影响。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，ConfCtrl在视角变化较大的情况下，能够生成几何一致且视觉上逼真的新视角，并能有效地重建被遮挡的区域。
AI.conclusion: ConfCtrl是一个置信度感知视频插值框架，能够引导扩散模型遵循指定的相机姿态，同时有效重建未见区域，在具有大视角变化的新视角合成任务上表现出色，能够生成稳定且几何感知的视图。

title: BrainSTR: Spatio-Temporal Contrastive Learning for Interpretable Dynamic Brain Network Modeling
summary: Dynamic functional connectivity captures time-varying brain states for better neuropsychiatric diagnosis and spatio-temporal interpretability, i.e., identifying when discriminative disease signatures emerge and where they reside in the connectivity topology. Reliable interpretability faces major challenges: diagnostic signals are often subtle and sparsely distributed across both time and topology, while nuisance fluctuations and non-diagnostic connectivities are pervasive. To address these issues, we propose BrainSTR, a spatio-temporal contrastive learning framework for interpretable dynamic brain network modeling. BrainSTR learns state-consistent phase boundaries via a data-driven Adaptive Phase Partition module, identifies diagnostically critical phases with attention, and extracts disease-related connectivity within each phase using an Incremental Graph Structure Generator regularized by binarization, temporal smoothness, and sparsity. Then, we introduce a spatio-temporal supervised contrastive learning approach that leverages diagnosis-relevant spatio-temporal patterns to refine the similarity metric between samples and capture more discriminative spatio-temporal features, thereby constructing a well-structured semantic space for coherent and interpretable representations. Experiments on ASD, BD, and MDD validate the effectiveness of BrainSTR, and the discovered critical phases and subnetworks provide interpretable evidence consistent with prior neuroimaging findings. Our code: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/BrainSTR1.

AI.tldr: BrainSTR是一个时空对比学习框架，用于动态脑网络建模，以提高神经精神疾病的诊断准确性和可解释性。它通过自适应相位划分识别关键时间段，并利用图结构生成器提取疾病相关连接，最终通过时空监督对比学习优化模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的动态功能连接分析在识别疾病相关的细微且稀疏的时空信号方面面临挑战，容易受到非诊断性波动和连接性的干扰。因此，需要一种能够提高诊断信号鲁棒性、同时保留时空可解释性的方法。
AI.method: BrainSTR框架包括：1. 自适应相位划分模块（Adaptive Phase Partition module）用于学习状态一致的相位边界。2. 注意力机制用于识别诊断关键相位。3. 增量图结构生成器（Incremental Graph Structure Generator），通过二值化、时间平滑和稀疏性正则化，提取各相位内的疾病相关连接。4. 时空监督对比学习（spatio-temporal supervised contrastive learning）用于优化样本相似性度量，提取更具区分度的时空特征。
AI.result: 在ASD、BD和MDD数据集上的实验表明，BrainSTR能够有效识别出与疾病相关的关键相位和脑网络子结构，其结果与先前的神经影像学研究发现一致，证明了该方法的有效性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: BrainSTR为可解释的动态脑网络建模提供了一种有效的方法，能够克服诊断信号的细微性和稀疏性挑战，并为神经精神疾病的诊断提供时空层面的可解释证据。

title: VLM-Loc: Localization in Point Cloud Maps via Vision-Language Models
summary: Text-to-point-cloud (T2P) localization aims to infer precise spatial positions within 3D point cloud maps from natural language descriptions, reflecting how humans perceive and communicate spatial layouts through language. However, existing methods largely rely on shallow text-point cloud correspondence without effective spatial reasoning, limiting their accuracy in complex environments. To address this limitation, we propose VLM-Loc, a framework that leverages the spatial reasoning capability of large vision-language models (VLMs) for T2P localization. Specifically, we transform point clouds into bird's-eye-view (BEV) images and scene graphs that jointly encode geometric and semantic context, providing structured inputs for the VLM to learn cross-modal representations bridging linguistic and spatial semantics. On top of these representations, we introduce a partial node assignment mechanism that explicitly associates textual cues with scene graph nodes, enabling interpretable spatial reasoning for accurate localization. To facilitate systematic evaluation across diverse scenes, we present CityLoc, a benchmark built from multi-source point clouds for fine-grained T2P localization. Experiments on CityLoc demonstrate VLM-Loc achieves superior accuracy and robustness compared to state-of-the-art methods. Our code, model, and dataset are available at \href{https://github.com/MCG-NKU/nku-3d-vision}{repository}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VLM-Loc的框架，利用大型视觉语言模型（VLMs）进行文本到点云（T2P）的定位，通过将点云转换为鸟瞰图（BEV）图像和场景图，并引入部分节点分配机制，提高了在复杂环境中的定位精度，并在新提出的CityLoc基准上取得了优于现有方法的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有T2P定位方法在复杂环境中缺乏有效的空间推理能力，精度受限。本文旨在利用VLMs的空间推理能力来提升T2P定位的准确性。
AI.method: 将点云转换为BEV图像和场景图，作为VLMs的结构化输入，学习跨模态表示。引入部分节点分配机制，将文本线索与场景图节点关联，实现可解释的空间推理。
AI.result: 在CityLoc基准测试中，VLM-Loc在T2P定位任务上取得了优于现有最先进方法的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: VLM-Loc框架通过结合BEV图像、场景图和VLMs的空间推理能力，有效解决了T2P定位中的空间推理挑战，并在新提出的CityLoc基准上验证了其优越性。

title: MissBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Affective Analysis under Imbalanced Missing Modalities
summary: Multimodal affective computing underpins key tasks such as sentiment analysis and emotion recognition. Standard evaluations, however, often assume that textual, acoustic, and visual modalities are equally available. In real applications, some modalities are systematically more fragile or expensive, creating imbalanced missing rates and training biases that task-level metrics alone do not reveal. We introduce MissBench, a benchmark and framework for multimodal affective tasks that standardizes both shared and imbalanced missing-rate protocols on four widely used sentiment and emotion datasets. MissBench also defines two diagnostic metrics. The Modality Equity Index (MEI) measures how fairly different modalities contribute across missing-modality configurations.
