The Modality Learning Index (MLI) quantifies optimization imbalance by comparing modality-specific gradient norms during training, aggregated across modality-related modules. Experiments on representative method families show that models that appear robust under shared missing rates can still exhibit marked modality inequity and optimization imbalance under imbalanced conditions. These findings position MissBench, together with MEI and MLI, as practical tools for stress-testing and analyzing multimodal affective models in realistic incomplete-modality settings.For reproducibility, we release our code at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MissBench-4098/

AI.tldr: 本文提出 MissBench，一个用于评估多模态情感计算在模态缺失情况下的基准和框架，并引入 MEI 和 MLI 指标来衡量模态公平性和学习不平衡性。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法假设各模态（文本、声学、视觉）可用性均等，但实际应用中模态缺失率不平衡，会导致训练偏差，现有指标无法揭示。
AI.method: 提出 MissBench 基准，包含四种常用情感数据集，并定义了共享和不平衡模态缺失率协议。引入两个诊断指标：模态公平指数 (MEI) 和模态学习指数 (MLI)。
AI.result: 在代表性方法族上的实验表明，在共享缺失率下看似鲁棒的模型，在不平衡缺失率下仍可能表现出显著的模态不公平和优化不平衡。
AI.conclusion: MissBench、MEI 和 MLI 是在不完整的模态设置下应激测试和分析多模态情感计算模型的实用工具。

title: WikiCLIP: An Efficient Contrastive Baseline for Open-domain Visual Entity Recognition
comment: Accepted by CVPR26, codes and weights are publicly available
summary: Open-domain visual entity recognition (VER) seeks to associate images with entities in encyclopedic knowledge bases such as Wikipedia. Recent generative methods tailored for VER demonstrate strong performance but incur high computational costs, limiting their scalability and practical deployment. In this work, we revisit the contrastive paradigm for VER and introduce WikiCLIP, a simple yet effective framework that establishes a strong and efficient baseline for open-domain VER. WikiCLIP leverages large language model embeddings as knowledge-rich entity representations and enhances them with a Vision-Guided Knowledge Adaptor (VGKA) that aligns textual semantics with visual cues at the patch level. To further encourage fine-grained discrimination, a Hard Negative Synthesis Mechanism generates visually similar but semantically distinct negatives during training. Experimental results on popular open-domain VER benchmarks, such as OVEN, demonstrate that WikiCLIP significantly outperforms strong baselines. Specifically, WikiCLIP achieves a 16% improvement on the challenging OVEN unseen set, while reducing inference latency by nearly 100 times compared with the leading generative model, AutoVER. The project page is available at https://artanic30.github.io/project_pages/WikiCLIP/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 WikiCLIP 的新框架，用于在开放域中识别视觉实体（VER），通过结合大型语言模型嵌入和视觉引导知识适配器，实现了比现有方法更高效、性能更强的基线，并大幅降低了推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成式VER方法虽然性能强大，但计算成本高昂，限制了其可扩展性和实际应用。因此，需要一种更高效的框架来实现开放域VER。
AI.method: WikiCLIP 框架结合了大型语言模型（LLM）的实体嵌入和视觉引导知识适配器（VGKA），VGKA 能够在块级别对齐文本语义和视觉线索。此外，还引入了一种硬负例合成机制来生成在训练期间更具挑战性的负例。
AI.result: 在 OVEN 等公开VER基准测试中，WikiCLIP 显著优于现有基线。在 OVEN 的“未见”数据集上，WikiCLIP 取得了 16% 的性能提升，并且推理延迟比领先的生成模型 AutoVER 降低了近 100 倍。
AI.conclusion: WikiCLIP 提供了一种简单而有效的开放域VER基线，它在性能和效率上都取得了显著的改进，为后续研究提供了一个强大的起点。

title: Fine-grained Motion Retrieval via Joint-Angle Motion Images and Token-Patch Late Interaction
summary: Text-motion retrieval aims to learn a semantically aligned latent space between natural language descriptions and 3D human motion skeleton sequences, enabling bidirectional search across the two modalities. Most existing methods use a dual-encoder framework that compresses motion and text into global embeddings, discarding fine-grained local correspondences, and thus reducing accuracy. Additionally, these global-embedding methods offer limited interpretability of the retrieval results. To overcome these limitations, we propose an interpretable, joint-angle-based motion representation that maps joint-level local features into a structured pseudo-image, compatible with pre-trained Vision Transformers. For text-to-motion retrieval, we employ MaxSim, a token-wise late interaction mechanism, and enhance it with Masked Language Modeling regularization to foster robust, interpretable text-motion alignment. Extensive experiments on HumanML3D and KIT-ML show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art text-motion retrieval approaches while offering interpretable fine-grained correspondences between text and motion. The code is available in the supplementary material.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于关节角度的运动表示方法，将运动分解为伪图像，并与预训练的 Vision Transformer 兼容，以改进文本-运动检索的准确性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本-运动检索方法采用全局嵌入，忽略了细粒度的局部对应关系，导致准确率下降且可解释性有限。研究旨在克服这些局限。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于关节角度的运动表示，将运动编码为结构化的伪图像，并利用 MaxSim（一种逐令牌的 late interaction 机制）和 Masked Language Modeling 正则化来增强文本-运动的对齐。
AI.result: 在 HumanML3D 和 KIT-ML 数据集上的实验表明，该方法在文本-运动检索方面优于现有的最先进方法，并能提供可解释的细粒度文本-运动对应关系。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于关节角度的运动表示和 MaxSim 机制能够有效地提高文本-运动检索的性能和可解释性，克服了全局嵌入方法的不足。

title: InternVL-U: Democratizing Unified Multimodal Models for Understanding, Reasoning, Generation and Editing
summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) that integrate understanding, reasoning, generation, and editing face inherent trade-offs between maintaining strong semantic comprehension and acquiring powerful generation capabilities. In this report, we present InternVL-U, a lightweight 4B-parameter UMM that democratizes these capabilities within a unified framework. Guided by the principles of unified contextual modeling and modality-specific modular design with decoupled visual representations, InternVL-U integrates a state-of-the-art Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) with a specialized MMDiT-based visual generation head. To further bridge the gap between aesthetic generation and high-level intelligence, we construct a comprehensive data synthesis pipeline targeting high-semantic-density tasks, such as text rendering and scientific reasoning, under a reasoning-centric paradigm that leverages Chain-of-Thought (CoT) to better align abstract user intent with fine-grained visual generation details. Extensive experiments demonstrate that InternVL-U achieves a superior performance - efficiency balance. Despite using only 4B parameters, it consistently outperforms unified baseline models with over 3x larger scales such as BAGEL (14B) on various generation and editing tasks, while retaining strong multimodal understanding and reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: InternVL-U是一个轻量级的40亿参数统一多模态模型，在保持强大理解能力的同时，通过模块化设计、数据合成和CoT推理，实现了高效且高质量的视觉生成和编辑，超越了规模更大的基线模型。
AI.motivation: 统一多模态模型在理解和生成能力之间存在权衡，研究者希望开发一个在保持强大语义理解能力的同时，也能获得强大生成能力的轻量级模型。
AI.method: 设计了一个40亿参数的统一多模态模型InternVL-U，采用统一上下文建模和模块化设计，视觉表示解耦。集成了先进的多模态大语言模型和基于MMDiT的视觉生成头。构建了一个针对文本渲染和科学推理等高语义密度任务的数据合成管道，并利用链式思考（CoT）对齐用户意图和视觉细节。
AI.result: InternVL-U在性能-效率平衡方面表现优越。尽管参数量仅为40亿，但在多项生成和编辑任务上，其性能持续超越规模超过3倍的基线模型（如BAGEL，140亿参数），同时保持了强大的多模态理解和推理能力。
AI.conclusion: InternVL-U成功地在一个轻量级的框架内实现了强大的多模态理解、推理和生成能力，展示了在性能和效率方面的优势，为多模态模型的研究和应用提供了新的方向。

title: DISPLAY: Directable Human-Object Interaction Video Generation via Sparse Motion Guidance and Multi-Task Auxiliary
summary: Human-centric video generation has advanced rapidly, yet existing methods struggle to produce controllable and physically consistent Human-Object Interaction (HOI) videos. Existing works rely on dense control signals, template videos, or carefully crafted text prompts, which limit flexibility and generalization to novel objects. We introduce a framework, namely DISPLAY, guided by Sparse Motion Guidance, composed only of wrist joint coordinates and a shape-agnostic object bounding box. This lightweight guidance alleviates the imbalance between human and object representations and enables intuitive user control. To enhance fidelity under such sparse conditions, we propose an Object-Stressed Attention mechanism that improves object robustness. To address the scarcity of high-quality HOI data, we further develop a Multi-Task Auxiliary Training strategy with a dedicated data curation pipeline, allowing the model to benefit from both reliable HOI samples and auxiliary tasks. Comprehensive experiments show that our method achieves high-fidelity, controllable HOI generation across diverse tasks. The project page can be found at \href{https://mumuwei.github.io/DISPLAY/}.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DISPLAY的框架，使用稀疏的运动指导（手腕关节坐标和对象边界框）来生成可控且物理一致的人体-对象交互（HOI）视频，解决了现有方法对密集控制信号的依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的人体中心视频生成方法在生成可控且物理一致的HOI视频方面存在困难，需要密集的控制信号、模板视频或精心设计的文本提示，这限制了灵活性和对新对象的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为DISPLAY的框架，使用稀疏运动指导（仅手腕关节坐标和形状无关的对象边界框）来生成HOI视频。引入了对象应激注意力机制来提高对象鲁棒性，并采用多任务辅助训练策略和专门的数据策管流程来克服高质量HOI数据的稀缺性。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法在各种任务中实现了高保真、可控的HOI生成。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的DISPLAY框架通过稀疏运动指导、对象应激注意力机制和多任务辅助训练策略，有效解决了HOI视频生成中的挑战，实现了灵活、可控和高质量的视频生成。

title: On the Structural Failure of Chamfer Distance in 3D Shape Optimization
summary: Chamfer distance is the standard training loss for point cloud reconstruction, completion, and generation, yet directly optimizing it can produce worse Chamfer values than not optimizing it at all. We show that this paradoxical failure is gradient-structural. The per-point Chamfer gradient creates a many-to-one collapse that is the unique attractor of the forward term and cannot be resolved by any local regularizer, including repulsion, smoothness, and density-aware re-weighting. We derive a necessary condition for collapse suppression: coupling must propagate beyond local neighborhoods. In a controlled 2D setting, shared-basis deformation suppresses collapse by providing global coupling; in 3D shape morphing, a differentiable MPM prior instantiates the same principle, consistently reducing the Chamfer gap across 20 directed pairs with a 2.5$\times$ improvement on the topologically complex dragon. The presence or absence of non-local coupling determines whether Chamfer optimization succeeds or collapses. This provides a practical design criterion for any pipeline that optimizes point-level distance metrics.

AI.tldr: 直接优化 Chamfer 距离作为点云任务的损失函数会导致性能下降，原因是梯度结构问题。该问题可以通过引入非局部耦合（例如共享基变形或 MPM 先验）来解决，从而提高 Chamfer 距离的优化效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现，直接优化 Chamfer 距离作为点云重建、补全和生成任务的损失函数，反而可能导致比不优化时更差的 Chamfer 距离值，这种悖论式的失败促使研究者深入探究其原因。
AI.method: 文章首先分析了 Chamfer 距离的梯度结构，指出其存在“多对一坍塌”的问题。然后，提出了一个必要条件：耦合必须超越局部邻域。接着，在受控的二维设置中，通过共享基变形来抑制坍塌，并通过在三维形状变形中使用可微 MPM 先验来实例化这一原理，并在不同形状对上验证了其效果。
AI.result: 研究表明，Chamfer 距离的梯度结构导致了“多对一坍塌”，局部正则化方法无法解决此问题。引入非局部耦合，如二维的共享基变形和三维的 MPM 先验，能够有效抑制坍塌，并在各种形状变形任务中显著降低 Chamfer 距离的优化差距，尤其在处理拓扑复杂的龙形物体时，性能提升了 2.5 倍。
AI.conclusion: 非局部耦合的存在与否决定了 Chamfer 优化是成功还是坍塌。这为任何优化点级距离度量的管线提供了一个实用的设计标准。

title: Stepping VLMs onto the Court: Benchmarking Spatial Intelligence in Sports
summary: Sports have long attracted broad attention as they push the limits of human physical and cognitive capabilities. Amid growing interest in spatial intelligence for vision-language models (VLMs), sports provide a natural testbed for understanding high-intensity human motion and dynamic object interactions. To this end, we present CourtSI, the first large-scale spatial intelligence dataset tailored to sports scenarios. CourtSI contains over 1M QA pairs, organized under a holistic taxonomy that systematically covers spatial counting, distance measurement, localization, and relational reasoning, across representative net sports including badminton, tennis, and table tennis. Leveraging well-defined court geometry as metric anchors, we develop a semi-automatic data engine to reconstruct sports scenes, enabling scalable curation of CourtSI. In addition, we introduce CourtSI-Bench, a high-quality evaluation benchmark comprising 3,686 QA pairs with rigorous human verification. We evaluate 25 proprietary and open-source VLMs on CourtSI-Bench, revealing a remaining human-AI performance gap and limited generalization from existing spatial intelligence benchmarks. These findings indicate that sports scenarios expose limitations in spatial intelligence capabilities captured by existing benchmarks. Further, fine-tuning Qwen3-VL-8B on CourtSI improves accuracy on CourtSI-Bench by 23.5 percentage points. The adapted model also generalizes effectively to CourtSI-Ext, an evaluation set built on a similar but unseen sport, and demonstrates enhanced spatial-aware commentary generation. Together, these findings demonstrate that CourtSI provides a scalable pathway toward advancing spatial intelligence of VLMs in sports.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CourtSI，一个大规模的体育场景空间智能数据集，包含超过100万个问答对，涵盖了空间计数、距离测量、定位和关系推理等任务。研究人员还引入了CourtSI-Bench评估基准，并在其中评估了25个视觉语言模型（VLMs），发现现有模型在体育场景下存在性能差距，并且泛化能力有限。通过在CourtSI上微调Qwen3-VL-8B模型，显著提高了在CourtSI-Bench上的准确率，并改善了其在类似场景下的泛化能力和空间感知评论生成能力。
AI.motivation: 随着人们对视觉语言模型（VLMs）空间智能的兴趣日益增长，体育运动提供了一个理想的测试平台，用于理解高强度人类运动和动态物体交互。现有空间智能基准在体育场景下表现出局限性，因此需要一个专门针对体育场景的空间智能数据集来推动VLM的发展。
AI.method: 构建了一个名为CourtSI的大规模数据集，包含超过100万个问答对，覆盖羽毛球、网球、乒乓球等净类运动，并设计了包含空间计数、距离测量、定位和关系推理的分类体系。利用明确的场地几何作为度量锚点，开发了一个半自动数据引擎来重建体育场景。此外，创建了一个包含3,686个经过人工严格验证的问答对的评估基准CourtSI-Bench。在CourtSI-Bench上评估了25个VLM，并将Qwen3-VL-8B模型在该数据集上进行微调。
AI.result: 在CourtSI-Bench上评估的25个VLM普遍存在性能差距，并且现有空间智能基准的泛化能力有限。在CourtSI数据集上微调Qwen3-VL-8B模型后，其在CourtSI-Bench上的准确率提高了23.5个百分点。微调后的模型在类似但未见过的运动场景（CourtSI-Ext）上展现出良好的泛化能力，并能生成更具空间意识的评论。
AI.conclusion: CourtSI数据集能够有效推动VLMs在体育场景下的空间智能发展。通过构建和利用CourtSI，可以为VLM提供一个可扩展的途径，以提高其在复杂动态体育环境中的理解和推理能力，并缩小人机在这些任务上的性能差距。

title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation with Target-Only Margin Disparity Discrepancy
summary: In interventional radiology, Cone-Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) is a helpful imaging modality that provides guidance to practicians during minimally invasive procedures. CBCT differs from traditional Computed Tomography (CT) due to its limited reconstructed field of view, specific artefacts, and the intra-arterial administration of contrast medium. While CT benefits from abundant publicly available annotated datasets, interventional CBCT data remain scarce and largely unannotated, with existing datasets focused primarily on radiotherapy applications. To address this limitation, we leverage a proprietary collection of unannotated interventional CBCT scans in conjunction with annotated CT data, employing domain adaptation techniques to bridge the modality gap and enhance liver segmentation performance on CBCT. We propose a novel unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework based on the formalism of Margin Disparity Discrepancy (MDD), which improves target domain performance through a reformulation of the original MDD optimization framework. Experimental results on CT and CBCT datasets for liver segmentation demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in UDA, as well as in the few-shot setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于MDD的无监督域适应方法，利用CT数据来提升缺乏标注的介入放射学CBCT图像的肝脏分割性能，并在CBCT和CT数据集上实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 介入放射学中的CBCT数据稀缺且缺乏标注，现有数据集多用于放疗，难以直接用于肝脏分割，而CT数据则拥有丰富的标注数据集。研究旨在弥合CBCT和CT之间的模态差异，提升CBCT上的肝脏分割准确性。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的无监督域适应（UDA）框架，该框架基于Margin Disparity Discrepancy（MDD）的理论，通过重构原始MDD优化框架来提升目标域（CBCT）的性能。利用专有的未标注CBCT扫描数据和标注的CT数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在CT和CBCT数据集上进行的肝脏分割实验表明，所提出的方法在UDA和少样本学习（few-shot）设置下均达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功地利用域适应技术，有效地利用了CT的丰富标注数据来改善了CBCT图像上的肝脏分割效果，克服了CBCT数据缺乏标注的限制，并在实验中取得了优异的结果。

title: ReCoSplat: Autoregressive Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting Using Render-and-Compare
summary: Online novel view synthesis remains challenging, requiring robust scene reconstruction from sequential, often unposed, observations. We present ReCoSplat, an autoregressive feed-forward Gaussian Splatting model supporting posed or unposed inputs, with or without camera intrinsics. While assembling local Gaussians using camera poses scales better than canonical-space prediction, it creates a dilemma during training: using ground-truth poses ensures stability but causes a distribution mismatch when predicted poses are used at inference. To address this, we introduce a Render-and-Compare (ReCo) module. ReCo renders the current reconstruction from the predicted viewpoint and compares it with the incoming observation, providing a stable conditioning signal that compensates for pose errors. To support long sequences, we propose a hybrid KV cache compression strategy combining early-layer truncation with chunk-level selective retention, reducing the KV cache size by over 90% for 100+ frames. ReCoSplat achieves state-of-the-art performance across different input settings on both in- and out-of-distribution benchmarks. Code and pretrained models will be released. Our project page is at https://freemancheng.com/ReCoSplat .

AI.tldr: ReCoSplat是一种自回归前馈高斯泼溅模型，支持带或不带相机位姿和内参的输入，通过引入Render-and-Compare（ReCo）模块来解决训练时位姿不匹配问题，并采用混合KV缓存压缩策略支持长序列，实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 在线新视角合成具有挑战性，需要从序列化、通常未加位姿的观测中进行鲁棒的场景重建。现有方法在训练时使用真实位姿会与推理时使用的预测位姿产生分布不匹配问题，影响性能。此外，支持长序列的重建也是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出ReCoSplat，一个自回归前馈高斯泼溅模型。核心是Render-and-Compare（ReCo）模块，该模块渲染当前重建并与观测进行比较，提供稳定的条件信号以补偿位姿误差。对于长序列，采用混合KV缓存压缩策略，结合早期层截断和块级选择性保留，显著减小KV缓存大小。
AI.result: ReCoSplat在支持和不支持相机位姿、以及是否提供相机内参的各种输入设置下，在in-distribution和out-of-distribution基准测试中均取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: ReCoSplat成功解决了在线新视角合成中的位姿不匹配和长序列处理难题，通过ReCo模块和高效的KV缓存压缩策略，实现了鲁棒且高性能的新视角合成。

title: Leveraging whole slide difficulty in Multiple Instance Learning to improve prostate cancer grading
summary: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) has been widely applied in histopathology to classify Whole Slide Images (WSIs) with slide-level diagnoses. While the ground truth is established by expert pathologists, the slides can be difficult to diagnose for non-experts and lead to disagreements between the annotators. In this paper, we introduce the notion of Whole Slide Difficulty (WSD), based on the disagreement between an expert and a non-expert pathologist. We propose two different methods to leverage WSD, a multi-task approach and a weighted classification loss approach, and we apply them to Gleason grading of prostate cancer slides. Results show that integrating WSD during training consistently improves the classification performance across different feature encoders and MIL methods, particularly for higher Gleason grades (i.e. worse diagnosis).

AI.tldr: 提出一种衡量整张病理切片（WSD）难度的方法，并将其用于提高癌症分级任务的分类性能，尤其是在诊断困难的高等级癌症中。
AI.motivation: 病理学家在诊断整张病理切片（WSIs）时，专家与非专家之间可能存在分歧，导致诊断困难，本研究旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 引入“整张病理切片难度”（WSD）的概念，该概念基于专家和非专家病理学家之间的分歧。提出了两种利用WSD的方法：多任务学习方法和加权分类损失方法。将这些方法应用于前列腺癌格里森评分。
AI.result: 将WSD集成到训练过程中，可以持续提高不同特征编码器和多实例学习（MIL）方法的分类性能，尤其是在诊断难度较高（格里森评分较高）的病例中。
AI.conclusion: WSD是一个有效的概念，可以用来指导模型训练，从而提高病理图像分类的准确性，特别是在处理主观性强、专家意见不一致的诊断任务时。

title: From Semantics to Pixels: Coarse-to-Fine Masked Autoencoders for Hierarchical Visual Understanding
summary: Self-supervised visual pre-training methods face an inherent tension: contrastive learning (CL) captures global semantics but loses fine-grained detail, while masked image modeling (MIM) preserves local textures but suffers from "attention drift" due to semantically-agnostic random masking. We propose C2FMAE, a coarse-to-fine masked autoencoder that resolves this tension by explicitly learning hierarchical visual representations across three data granularities: semantic masks (scene-level), instance masks (object-level), and RGB images (pixel-level). Two synergistic innovations enforce a strict top-down learning principle. First, a cascaded decoder sequentially reconstructs from scene semantics to object instances to pixel details, establishing explicit cross-granularity dependencies that parallel decoders cannot capture. Second, a progressive masking curriculum dynamically shifts the training focus from semantic-guided to instance-guided and finally to random masking, creating a structured learning path from global context to local features. To support this framework, we construct a large-scale multi-granular dataset with high-quality pseudo-labels for all 1.28M ImageNet-1K images. Extensive experiments show that C2FMAE achieves significant performance gains on image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation, validating the effectiveness of our hierarchical design in learning more robust and generalizable representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 C2FMAE 的自监督视觉预训练方法，通过引入多粒度（场景、实例、像素）的表示学习以及级联解码器和渐进式掩码策略，有效解决了对比学习丢失细节和掩码图像建模注意力漂移的问题，并在下游任务中取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的自监督视觉预训练方法，如对比学习（CL）和掩码图像建模（MIM），存在各自的局限性。CL 擅长捕捉全局语义但忽略细节，而 MIM 关注局部纹理但易受注意力漂移影响。研究动机在于解决这种固有的张力，学习能够同时保留全局语义和局部细节的视觉表示。
AI.method: C2FMAE 是一种粗粒度到细粒度的掩码自编码器，它在三个数据粒度上学习视觉表示：语义掩码（场景级别）、实例掩码（对象级别）和 RGB 图像（像素级别）。其核心创新在于：1. 级联解码器：按顺序从场景语义重建到实例再到像素细节，建立显式的跨粒度依赖。2. 渐进式掩码课程：训练重点从语义引导、实例引导逐渐过渡到随机掩码，形成从全局到局部的结构化学习路径。此外，研究者构建了一个大规模、多粒度的图像数据集，并为 128 万张 ImageNet-1K 图像提供了高质量的伪标签。
AI.result: C2FMAE 在图像分类、对象检测和语义分割等下游任务上均取得了显著的性能提升。实验结果验证了其分层设计在学习更鲁棒和更通用的表示方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: C2FMAE 通过学习分层的视觉表示，成功地弥合了对比学习和掩码图像建模的局限性，提供了一种更有效、更通用的自监督预训练框架，能够显著提升模型在多种视觉任务上的表现。
